name: Kathryn Harvey
subject: Now seems like a good time to get better people into office.
body:
Call your Congressperson.

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/58bd80b13b7e/kathryn-harvey-for-congresscampaign-kickoff-6420303?e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
|
---
| Welcome to Keeping Up with Kathryn Harvey. A weekly digest covering South Carolina politics and opportunities for engagement and action in the Upstate.
---
|
# Now seems like a nice time to elect good people to office.
# I’m fighting for working families, and they stand to be impacted most by the federal budget bill. Now seems like a good time to elect someone to office who will truly serve everyone in our community, who will focus on smart growth, and preserving quality of life in Spartanburg County. [Check out my campaign video here.](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=d8ca137cf5&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| [Contribute to Kathryn](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=baf9888692&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | | | [|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=b53dc3d32a&e=edbde6c9b1)
| The latest episode of the Upstate Tea with Kathryn Harvey [drops at noon ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=5df3577891&e=edbde6c9b1)on Wednesday with former Spartanburg County Councilman Michael Brown.
---
|
# Canvass with my campaign this Sunday
---
| Join me this Sunday for a neighborhood canvass in Hillbrook! We’ll start at 3pm and you can register to volunteer at the link below.
---
| [Volunteer this Sunday](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=7be568a163&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=4ccdf579e5&e=edbde6c9b1)
|
# We made our first fundraising deadline
---
| Thank you to the nearly 50 donors that stepped up in the first two weeks of this campaign to help us meet our first deadline. This local race is an extraordinary opportunity to assume a leadership role in one of the fastest growing counties in the United States - the place I’m proud to call home. And it's also an opportunity to elect another woman to council (we currently only have one serving).
[**Your efforts will help us contact the voters we need to win.**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=d80c8f3a29&e=edbde6c9b1)
If you’re as ready as I am to see a positive change in our community I hope you’ll join us. Thank you for staying with me, we can do this - together.
---
|
---
|
# Join me July 27 for the Stop the Violence Community Fest
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=cfb8225118&e=edbde6c9b1)
|
---
|
---
|
---
| **Spartanburg NAACP Branch 5550** The Spartanburg NAACP Branch 5550 is hosting a Sheriff’s Candidate Forum on July 15 from 6-8pm moderated by Director Michael Brown. This event is free and open to the public.
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
|
**July 7: SPCDP Monthly Meeting at 6pm Dr. TK Gregg Community Center**[**RSVP Here**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=58ce876f92&e=edbde6c9b1)**July 15:** NAACP 5550 Branch Sheriff’s Candidate Forum CC Woodson 6-8pm**July 17:** Good Trouble Day TBD Greenville/Spartanburg**July 21-Aug 1:** Early Voting for Primary Election 8:30am-5:00pm County Admin Building**July 27:** Stop the Violence Community Fest 2-7pm Conway Park 103 Pendleton Dr.**Aug 3:** **SPCDP Monthly Meeting at 6pm Dr. TK Gregg Community Center**[**RSVP Here**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=fa34603eeb&e=edbde6c9b1)**August 5** Primary Election for Spartanburg County Sheriff and County Council District 3 **August 6:** Cornerstone Baptist Precinct Town Hall - S. Converse Neighborhood**August 13-15:** Primary Election Runoff Early Voting **August 19:** Primary Election Runoff (7:00 a.m. to 7:00 p.m.)**October 21 - 31:** Early Voting for the 2025 General Election 8:30 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. daily (Closed Saturday and Sunday), County Administration Building.**October 20:** 2025 General Election (7:00 a.m. to 7:00 p.m.)**November 4:** 2025 General Election (7:00 a.m. to 7:00 p.m.)
---
|
---
|
---
|
**What’s at stake with the Big Beautiful Bill?**| In South Carolina alone, 1.1 million people rely upon Medicaid or CHIP for healthcare while 581,000 South Carolinians rely upon SNAP for daily food purchases.

Congressional GOP members voted to strip away funding for these critical programs — all for billionaires in this country to receive tax cuts. The Upstate’s very own [Ralph Norman fell asleep during the budget hearing, and then cast the deciding vote](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=600e41bddc&e=edbde6c9b1) on this “Big, Beautiful Bill.”
The time is now. **Call your Congressperson AGAIN and tell them to vote no.** Join us in fighting for working-class families across South Carolina. They need to hear from all of us.
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| This past week I enjoyed celebrating the good work of our Greenville Democrats with former Chair Amanda MacDougald Scott and Greenville City Council candidate Tina Belge. My family came in town this past weekend and we took the kids to Cowpens Battlefield (it was amazing), and we made it to a Spartanburgers Game.
I walked in the Upstate Pride Parade with our Dem leadership team and had the distinct pleasure of celebrating Project 100 this morning, the new initiative between OneSpartanburg, Quality Counts and the Mary Black Foundation that will increase local childcare spot by over 100 with this first local cohort. Democracy is a participatory experience, join us at [kathrynforcouncil.com](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=5d0bf31eac&e=edbde6c9b1).
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---

name: Colin Allred
subject: I have an exciting announcement to make
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Folks, Colin Allred here, and I have some exciting news to share: I am officially launching my campaign today to be Texas’ next U.S. Senator.

[Will you split a donation of $5 between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project right now to help me raise $1 million in the first 24 hours of my campaign for Senate? I need your support so we can flip Texas blue and take on the corrupt politicians like John Cornyn and Ken Paxton who are rigging the economy against hard working Texans.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91628?t=6&akid=20474%2E878179%2Eu8baMe) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91628?t=7&akid=20474%2E878179%2Eu8baMe) | [DONATE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91628?t=8&akid=20474%2E878179%2Eu8baMe)
---
Here's why you giving $5 today matters more than ever:

\- Republicans are already in a messy primary, with front-runner Texas AG Ken Paxton trying to throw doctors in jail for providing abortion care.

**\- Now, not just one but TWO brand-new polls show me leading in this race.**

\- With Trump and the GOP wreaking havoc on our economy, our fundamental rights, and our democracy, we need leaders who will take on corruption.

People are fired up – _and they’re ready to fight back!_

[That’s why I’m asking for $5 today.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91628?t=9&akid=20474%2E878179%2Eu8baMe) Seriously, it can make a HUGE difference in these early days of our grassroots campaign.

I know $5 might not sound like much when you think of the tens of millions the GOP and their rich mega donors have. But it adds up quickly! If everyone reading this chips in, we'll hit our goal in minutes – and we'll be that much closer to finally bringing Texas the leadership we deserve.

[Will you be a Founding Donor of this campaign by giving $5 now to split between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project, so that I can reach voters in every corner of Texas and win this race?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91628?t=10&akid=20474%2E878179%2Eu8baMe)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Colin Allred and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91629?t=11&akid=20474%2E878179%2Eu8baMe)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91630?t=12&akid=20474%2E878179%2Eu8baMe)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91631?t=13&akid=20474%2E878179%2Eu8baMe)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91632?t=14&akid=20474%2E878179%2Eu8baMe)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91628?t=15&akid=20474%2E878179%2Eu8baMe)
I want to finish the job we started last year, but I need your help to do it.

– Colin Allred
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20474%2E878179%2Eu8baMe). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20474%2E878179%2Eu8baMe).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20474%2E878179%2Eu8baMe) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=16&akid=20474%2E878179%2Eu8baMe). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20474%2E878179%2Eu8baMe)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=20474%2E878179%2Eu8baMe)

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: The Senate passed Trump’s bill. What comes next:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110698297/555040312/753003349?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2NjYTI0Yy1kODU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZlFTxlQUEBEtaWVVjewbAkWjIUOkA1RNnuKjVGq_v6o=)
Friend,

I want to personally thank you for your support these last few weeks. With your help, we met our end-of-quarter goal and are building the movement we need to keep IL-13 blue – and flip the House majority.

**That couldn’t come at a more important time: Just hours ago, Senate Republicans failed working families and passed Trump's so-called “Big Beautiful Bill.”**

I want you to know that I will continue to fight this with everything I have when it comes back to the House for a vote before being signed into law. This bill is a disaster of historic proportions.

If Republicans get their way, billions will be cut from critical programs including Medicaid and SNAP, rural hospitals will be shuttered and forced to turn folks away, and the national debt will balloon by trillions – all to give tax breaks to billionaires.

I know I’ve asked a lot of you these last few days before the FEC deadline. **[Right now, I’m only asking for your signature of support to stand with me against this bill.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110698298/555040313/726077113?refcode=em-7.1.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2NjYTI0Yy1kODU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZlFTxlQUEBEtaWVVjewbAkWjIUOkA1RNnuKjVGq_v6o=&emci=94cca24c-d856-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=97cca24c-d856-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13891387)**
| **[Sign on](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110698299/555040314/726077113?refcode=em-7.1.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2NjYTI0Yy1kODU2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZlFTxlQUEBEtaWVVjewbAkWjIUOkA1RNnuKjVGq_v6o=&emci=94cca24c-d856-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=97cca24c-d856-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13891387)**
---

This bill is a total betrayal of thousands of working families across Illinois and the country who deserve leaders who fight for them instead of hanging them out to dry.

Thank you,

Nikki

Now, she’s delivering in Congress for the people of Illinois' 13th Congressional District. clean_body: | = Friend, I want to personally thank you for your support these last few weeks. With your help, we met our end-of-quarter goal and are building the movement we need to keep IL-13 blue – and flip the House majority. That couldn’t come at a more important time: Just hours ago, Senate Republicans failed working families and passed Trump's so-called “Big Beautiful Bill.” I want you to know that I will continue to fight this with everything I have when it comes back to the House for a vote before being signed into law. This bill is a disaster of historic proportions. If Republicans get their way, billions will be cut from critical programs including Medicaid and SNAP, rural hospitals will be shuttered and forced to turn folks away, and the national debt will balloon by trillions – all to give tax breaks to billionaires. I know I’ve asked a lot of you these last few days before the FEC deadline. | This bill is a total betrayal of thousands of working families across Illinois and the country who deserve leaders who fight for them instead of hanging them out to dry. Thank you, Nikki | = = = Nikki is a champion for working families – from leading the fight to pass a $15 minimum wage in Illinois, to bringing manufacturing back to America. Now, she’s delivering in Congress for the people of Illinois' 13th Congressional District. = To learn more about Nikki and her commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Nikki for Congress Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States

name: Wes Moore
subject: Peter, you are getting hosed
body:
[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=259%2E1086043%2E8AF9hM ]Wes Moore for Governor[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1002&akid=259%2E1086043%2E8AF9hM ]Wes Moore for Governor

Peter, I just
finished my latest brief on Trump’s Big Beautiful Bill, which has passed
the Senate.

I cannot explain enough how heartless this bill is, and how deeply
devastating it will be to the people in our state.

Here’s the snapshot: If you’re a multimillionaire, this bill is for you.
Congratulations. But if you’re everybody else — all of our working
families, our seniors, our public servants — you are getting hosed.

Close to 200,000 Marylanders could lose their health coverage. And rural
hospitals in Maryland could lose a quarter of a billion dollars in
funding.

To our working families who are just trying to take care of each other,
our seniors who deserve to age in dignity, to people with disabilities, to
everyone who has earned SNAP: They’re trying to take food assistance away
that helps you pay for groceries and provide for your families.

The Trump administration has already tried to sever the relationship
between the federal government and our states. But this bill severs the
relationship between the federal government and its people.

There’s one thing I know about this state, though: We are resilient. We
stay together. And Marylanders leave no one behind.

I’ll keep you posted.

Elevate,

Wes

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250701-2?refcode=em-20250701-2&refcode2=259_1086043_8AF9hM&akid=259%2E1086043%2E8AF9hM ]Donate >>

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

name: Squad Victory HQ
subject: BREAKING: TRUMP’s bill just passed the Senate — here’s what’s in it
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250701-1409-foote&t=1001&akid=1409%2E342411%2EhAe9m5 ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

The Senate just passed Trump’s tax break and spending cuts bill — a
sweeping package that hands trillions in tax breaks to billionaires and
slashes funding for the rest of us.

Let’s be clear: This bill is designed to benefit Trump and line the
pockets of his allies, while everyone else pays the price.

Here’s what Republicans aren’t telling you:

🔴 Over 17 million Americans could lose health insurance due to Medicaid
cuts;

🔴 $3.3 trillion in tax cuts for the ultra-wealthy;

🔴 SNAP benefits slashed — putting kids and families at risk hunger;

🔴 Green energy programs gutted;

🔴 ...and so much more.

This bill is a direct attack on working-class Americans, and it rolls back
hard-won progress on climate change, healthcare, and human rights.

The Squad Victory Fund is organizing to speak out against this bill and
support progressive champions who actually fight for our fundamental
rights rather than strip them away.

But right now, we’re up against the full weight of Trump’s political
machine — and we need your help to fight back.

In solidarity,

Squad Victory HQ

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

clean_body: [ ]Squad Victory Fund Peter, The Senate just passed Trump’s tax break and spending cuts bill — a sweeping package that hands trillions in tax breaks to billionaires and slashes funding for the rest of us. Let’s be clear: This bill is designed to benefit Trump and line the pockets of his allies, while everyone else pays the price. Here’s what Republicans aren’t telling you: 🔴 Over 17 million Americans could lose health insurance due to Medicaid cuts; 🔴 $3.3 trillion in tax cuts for the ultra-wealthy; 🔴 SNAP benefits slashed — putting kids and families at risk hunger; 🔴 Green energy programs gutted; 🔴 ...and so much more. This bill is a direct attack on working-class Americans, and it rolls back hard-won progress on climate change, healthcare, and human rights. The Squad Victory Fund is organizing to speak out against this bill and support progressive champions who actually fight for our fundamental rights rather than strip them away. But right now, we’re up against the full weight of Trump’s political machine — and we need your help to fight back. In solidarity, Squad Victory HQ

subject: Sign on to our emergency letter to Congress and take a stand AGAINST Donald Trump’s tax bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
The GOP is aiming to send the bill to Trump’s desk by THIS FRIDAY, July 4
#

_We’re counting on your signature before midnight, Peter._ **[STAND AGAINST DONALD TRUMP’S BILL: SIGN ON](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-letter-20250701?t=1&akid=9079%2E614464%2EvKJaIn)** **Here’s what we know about the version of Donald Trump’s big disastrous bill that passed through the Senate earlier today:** ❌ **17 MILLION** Americans would be kicked off their health insurance
❌ **Over $200 BILLION** would be cut from food assistance programs
❌ **$1 TRILLION** would be given away in tax cuts for the ultra-rich
❌ **$4 TRILLION** would be added to our nation’s deficit **[If you stand AGAINST this bill, please add your name to our letter to Congress before midnight tonight »](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-letter-20250701?t=2&akid=9079%2E614464%2EvKJaIn)** **[STAND AGAINST DONALD TRUMP’S BILL: SIGN ON](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-letter-20250701?t=3&akid=9079%2E614464%2EvKJaIn)** **This version of Donald Trump’s big disastrous bill is _EVEN WORSE_ than the version that passed through the House earlier this year.** It’s got even more cuts to Medicaid. It adds trillions of dollars to our national deficit. And it’s all to fund massive tax breaks for a handful of billionaire mega-donors. _It’s disgusting._ **The GOP is aiming to send the final version of this bill to Trump’s desk so it can be signed by this Friday, July 4.** We are running out of time to show Congress that the majority of Americans are firmly opposed to this blatant attack on working families. We’re counting on your help to do it, Peter: **[Please make it crystal clear where you stand on Trump’s big disastrous bill by signing on to our emergency letter to Congress before midnight »](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-letter-20250701?t=4&akid=9079%2E614464%2EvKJaIn)** **[STAND AGAINST DONALD TRUMP’S BILL: SIGN ON](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-letter-20250701?t=5&akid=9079%2E614464%2EvKJaIn)**

name: Shawnna Bolick
subject: 2025 Legislative Wrap Up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
| | | [ ](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=684cf26857&e=a7ab36849c)
---
| | Good evening!

A few weekends ago, I volunteered with dozens of others in our community to help assemble “Zach Packs” to be distributed to the area’s homeless population, providing snacks and water in easy to grab disposable bags to distribute to unsheltered individuals throughout the district. This annual event is named in honor of a young man who took his life far too early. I believe we exceeded their goal of assembling 1,000 ready to go care packages this year. Thank you to a few of my gal pals for joining me in this effort.

In mid-June, I co-signed a [letter](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=096d0cbc07&e=a7ab36849c) to Congress to reassert its control over the unconstitutional tariffs. On June 18th, I attended the Greater Phoenix Chamber’s annual Excellence in Business Awards gathering. At this event I was recognized as one of their two [2025 Sentinel Award recipients](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=18d01ad979&e=a7ab36849c) due to my work championing Arizona’s business community and killing regulatory bills that would destroy our state’s businesses and thriving economy. You can hear a brief clip of my speech [HERE](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=d2f956050b&e=a7ab36849c).

Early last week, I stopped by [North Canyon High School](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=21a64f89ba&e=a7ab36849c) to present the girls high school volleyball coach and district athletic director a State Senate sanctioned proclamation for this year’s team successes. Go Rattlers!

Last Friday, the governor signed two more of my bills, [Senate Bill 1405](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=6693dc8910&e=a7ab36849c) and [Senate Bill 1658](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=33621aba37&e=a7ab36849c) into law. SB 1658, the animal cruelty bill has changed a lot since it was first introduced last year by Senator T.J. Shope. We held extensive stakeholder meetings and drafted several amendments to get this bill to where it is for a signature. Thank you to everyone who helped get this bill across the finish line, including so many of my constituents who love their pets, the Arizona Humane Society, County Sheriffs [Joe Arpaio](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=04f0ffd8bb&e=a7ab36849c), David Rhodes, and Jerry Sheridan, the Arizona Police Association, the Arizona Fraternal Order of Police, the Arizona Association of Counties, Pinal County Attorney Bradley Miller, and Maricopa County Attorney Rachel Mitchell, and so many more. As you may recall, this bill was brought forward by our law enforcement and prosecutors in the aftermath of the [Chandler 55](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=b6b712747e&e=a7ab36849c). Ninety days after the legislature Sine Die on September 26th this bill and most other bills signed into law this session will go into effect.

For the last two months, the House and Senate have been at odds with one another, unable to derive at an agreed upon state budget that the governor would sign. Each chamber sent the opposite chamber at least one, if not two, bill packages. The Senate budget was negotiated with the governor’s office after the House walked away. If you want to read about what has taken place you can do so [HERE](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=fed1d0efbc&e=a7ab36849c). It’s crazy how the House’s chief budget negotiator left Arizona for several weeks expecting everyone to stop and maybe wait for them to return from their 3-week vacation.

A look at each budget proposal introduced between the House and Senate:
* The House’s initial [budget](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=901273ebe4&e=a7ab36849c) was vetoed by the governor on June 25th.
* The Senate’s initial introduced [budget](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=b8f25e1aa5&e=a7ab36849c) that was brokered with the governor’s office after the House stopped working with the Senate and governor on a budget.
* The House’s introduced [baseline budget](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=9bb223a156&e=a7ab36849c) to continue to fund state government “until we can find a solution” was vetoed by the governor on June 25th.
* The bipartisan Senate [budget bill](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=ff2b82457b&e=a7ab36849c)[s](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=d09b52b8ad&e=a7ab36849c) that were amended by the House was signed by Hobbs on June 27th.

Last Thursday, the House voted on [Senate Bill 1507](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=0410361439&e=a7ab36849c), a prison oversight bill I have been championing. On Friday, the full Senate voted out SB 1507 near unanimously. It was signed today by the governor making it the 15th bill of mine signed this legislative session. Through the budget negotiation process, the governor refused to allow an appropriation on this bill to fund the office. [Read](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=8c8d78ad7a&e=a7ab36849c) what Justice Action Network said about this prison oversight bill.

On July 7th, there will be a bill signing ceremony for Senate Bill 1658 if you’d like to attend you can RSVP [HERE](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=1bfbb2dbb9&e=a7ab36849c).

The Fifty-seventh Legislature, First Regular Session adjourned Sine Die, Friday, June 27, 2025, at 1:20 p.m.

_Bolick In the News_

**Civil Legal Aid**
[https://azcapitoltimes.com/news/2025/06/15/federal-funding-for-civil-legal-aid-in-jeopardy-state-solution-sought/](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=307741acc5&e=a7ab36849c)

**Senate Bill 1658 Animal Cruelty Legislation**
[https://www.kjzz.org/politics/2025-06-21/legislature-passes-watered-down-arizona-animal-cruelty-bill-following-right-wing-pushback](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=822ca12b64&e=a7ab36849c)

[https://hoodline.com/2025/06/arizona-legislature-passes-compromise-bill-to-strengthen-animal-cruelty-laws-amidst-political-debates/](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=35b9daf69e&e=a7ab36849c)

[https://pro.stateaffairs.com/az/legislative-report/news/animal-cruelty-makes-it-across-the-senates-finish-line](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=31b05b2ebe&e=a7ab36849c)

[https://azcapitoltimes.com/news/2025/06/13/animal-cruelty-bill-heads-to-senate-after-weeks-of-negotiations/](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=b666078ced&e=a7ab36849c)

[https://azcapitoltimes.com/news/2025/06/06/supporters-of-animal-cruelty-measure-still-hopeful/](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=e246d1dc0e&e=a7ab36849c)

**Senate Bill 1507 Prison Oversight Reform Legislation**
[https://azcapitoltimes.com/news/2025/06/29/another-prison-death-reignites-gop-push-for-oversight/](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=bc8c5745ab&e=a7ab36849c)

[https://www.paysonroundup.com/news/legislator-want-oversight-committee-for-state-prison-system/article_94c06990-db1c-52a8-9511-3a1a4f99fcec.html](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=4d02c251c4&e=a7ab36849c)

[https://x.com/azsenategop/status/1938289626244157929?s=46&t=ve4XQJ0oA2ruD3ye7jMXeQ](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=1b065e39f2&e=a7ab36849c)

[https://azcapitoltimes.com/news/2025/06/21/push-for-new-prison-oversight-office-stalls-with-governor/](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=0b9fc6fd5d&e=a7ab36849c)

[https://pro.stateaffairs.com/az/news/gov-gives-a-big-thumbs-down-on-corrections-oversight-office](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=e0b02600f8&e=a7ab36849c)

[https://tucson.com/news/local/subscriber/article_820d1510-80c2-409d-bc67-f8751e67b543.html](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=ce89935dfc&e=a7ab36849c)

I was in a car accident near the Capitol over the weekend. If I am slow to respond in the coming days, I am trying limit my time on my laptop and phone as much as I can to give my head, neck, back, arms and shoulders a bit of a break due to whiplash.

---
| **Campaign Information**

Do you reside in one of these Legislative District 2 zip codes:
85022 85023 85024 85027 85029 85032 85050 85053 85085 85308 85310 85331

If you answered yes and you are a registered Republican or an Independent voter, [**please take a minute to sign my secure online nomination petition**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=3e3dcb97aa&e=a7ab36849c) ensuring my name appears on the Republican primary ballot on the August 4, 2026.

Now that the legislative session has come to a close, my team and I, will be actively working to accomplish our campaign goals during the interim, so I’d surely appreciate your help. Today, you can use your driver's license to log on and sign my online nomination petition.

As you may know, I will have to raise a significant amount of resources to retain this State Senate seat. If you are so inclined, please donate to our campaign today. A BIG thank you to those of you who continued to support me during this past legislative session.

Thank you for your continued support!

Take care,
Shawnna

For the last two months, the House and Senate have been at odds with one another, unable to derive at an agreed upon state budget that the governor would sign. Each chamber sent the opposite chamber at least one, if not two, bill packages. The Senate budget was negotiated with the governor’s office after the House walked away. If you want to read about what has taken place you can do so . It’s crazy how the House’s chief budget negotiator left Arizona for several weeks expecting everyone to stop and maybe wait for them to return from their 3-week vacation. A look at each budget proposal introduced between the House and Senate: The House’s initial was vetoed by the governor on June 25th. The Senate’s initial introduced that was brokered with the governor’s office after the House stopped working with the Senate and governor on a budget. The House’s introduced to continue to fund state government “until we can find a solution” was vetoed by the governor on June 25th. The bipartisan Senate that were amended by the House was signed by Hobbs on June 27th. Last Thursday, the House voted on , a prison oversight bill I have been championing. On Friday, the full Senate voted out SB 1507 near unanimously. It was signed today by the governor making it the 15th bill of mine signed this legislative session. Through the budget negotiation process, the governor refused to allow an appropriation on this bill to fund the office. what Justice Action Network said about this prison oversight bill. On July 7th, there will be a bill signing ceremony for Senate Bill 1658 if you’d like to attend you can RSVP . The Fifty-seventh Legislature, First Regular Session adjourned Sine Die, Friday, June 27, 2025, at 1:20 p.m. Bolick In the News Civil Legal Aid Senate Bill 1658 Animal Cruelty Legislation Senate Bill 1507 Prison Oversight Reform Legislation I was in a car accident near the Capitol over the weekend. If I am slow to respond in the coming days, I am trying limit my time on my laptop and phone as much as I can to give my head, neck, back, arms and shoulders a bit of a break due to whiplash. | Campaign Information Do you reside in one of these Legislative District 2 zip codes: 85022 85023 85024 85027 85029 85032 85050 85053 85085 85308 85310 85331 If you answered yes and you are a registered Republican or an Independent voter, ensuring my name appears on the Republican primary ballot on the August 4, 2026. Now that the legislative session has come to a close, my team and I, will be actively working to accomplish our campaign goals during the interim, so I’d surely appreciate your help. Today, you can use your driver's license to log on and sign my online nomination petition. As you may know, I will have to raise a significant amount of resources to retain this State Senate seat. If you are so inclined, please donate to our campaign today. A BIG thank you to those of you who continued to support me during this past legislative session. Thank you for your continued support! Mississippi stands at a critical crossroads. In a time when our values are under assault and our freedoms are too often taken for granted, we must elect leaders who understand that government is not the answer to every problem -- God is. We need a governor whose vision is not shaped by political convenience, but by enduring Christian principles and the practical realities of business leadership.
The strength of Mississippi's future will not be determined merely by policies and programs, but by the moral compass of those we entrust with power. A true governor must be a faithful steward: guarding liberty, promoting righteousness, defending the family, encouraging enterprise, and humbly seeking God's wisdom every step of the way.

subject: Mansharamani Update, July 1, 2025
body:
My latest thinking...

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mansharamani/vikram-update-17442165?e=93b2c2b824)
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=53c4982593&e=93b2c2b824)
| | | | |
# Mansharamani Musings
---
| This month, I provide links to my latest posts and then share a link to an excerpt from [_**The Making of a Generalist**_](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=f8c4bda94a&e=93b2c2b824) that I posted on Father’s Day. I hope you enjoy... And as always, I welcome your feedback!
[ _B_](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=9f52029f85&e=93b2c2b824) _est,**
Vikram**_

---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=46e9e71ca2&e=93b2c2b824)
| JUNE 1, 2025
On the campaign trail, President Trump made a promise to revive the American economy and deliver greater opportunity for working families: to create “a middle class that is once again the envy of the entire world.” Making that pledge a reality starts with tax cuts and deregulation but doesn’t end there. It will require policymakers to reconsider who has access to wealth-building opportunities.
Unfortunately, far too many Americans lack the tools available to the wealthy. More Americans deserve the opportunity to invest in private markets, and that’s something Trump’s administration can provide. The Securities and Exchange Commission has a unique opportunity to...
---
| [CLICK HERE TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=2aa881012c&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=90a8d7e1b7&e=93b2c2b824)
| JUNE 4, 2025
It was a surreal moment...while Harvard’s graduation [ceremony](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=e54da7f53f&e=93b2c2b824) was underway last week, the Trump Administration’s effort to ban the school from enrolling international students was making its way through the courts. Alan Garber, the University’s President, took aim at this policy during his opening address when he welcomed graduating students from “[around the world, **just as it should be**](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=e7d932d705&e=93b2c2b824)**.** ”
The assembled crowd cheered at the reference, and [speaker](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=7927cc5822&e=93b2c2b824) after [speaker](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=0160305e46&e=93b2c2b824) reiterated the sentiment that Harvard should be free to educate the world. And when news [broke](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=3f47007c04&e=93b2c2b824) that a judge had issued a preliminary injunction against the Trump attempt to ban foreign students, the _New York Times_ [reported](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=e715b4218b&e=93b2c2b824) that celebratory reactions rippled through the crowd...
---
| [CLICK HERE TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=ac1844f398&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=da79a06162&e=93b2c2b824)
|
---
| JUNE 14, 2025
For many business leaders, the cross currents of a global trade war, military conflict in the Middle East, shifting geopolitical pressures, and disruption from new technologies have created a paralyzing level of uncertainty. Does it make sense to invest when artificial intelligence may replace your entire industry? What if tariffs create chaos in your supply chain? **For many, the obvious course of action is, well, no action at all.**
As a generalist with a contrarian bent, I’ve decided instead to look at the big picture, connect the dots across different trends, and come up with a probabilistic assessment of how the future may unfold for the pizza industry. It’s led me to a different course: I’m proactively investing amidst today’s uncertainty as I see a bright future ahead...
---
| [CLICK HERE TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=17416942a7&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=10763ee461&e=93b2c2b824)
| JUNE 21, 2025
Recently, I’ve been intensely focused on all things pizza – a natural consequence of [my having recently started a frozen pizza manufacturing business](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=0f8d252b34&e=93b2c2b824). Pizza news, the pizza market, anything affecting the pizza ingredient supply chain...all grab my attention. And I always detour to the frozen section of any grocery store to see the offerings, placement, and pricing of the pizza products they offer. But I also continue to monitor the context in which the pizza industry operates and regularly watch Sunday morning news shows, skim about 5 newspapers each day, and religiously listen to [Bloomberg News](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=269855d51d&e=93b2c2b824).
Given my long-standing interest in foreign affairs, geopolitics, and economics, it should be no surprise that a recent headline about the “Pentagon Pizza Index” caught my attention. The index, which tracks pizza orders heading to the headquarters of the US Department of Defense from local pizza shops, tends to surge immediately before geopolitical or military events transpire. Why’s that? When the world is on the cusp of major events, those working at the Pentagon usually work late and order pizza...
---
| [CLICK HERE TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=9d6b7df0b0&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=fef971a8ab&e=93b2c2b824)
| JUNE 29, 2025
Last week I [wrote](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=4bbdfb3013&e=93b2c2b824) about the Pentagon Pizza Index, which for decades has seemingly predicted world events. The idea is to monitor DC-area pizza shops for spikes in business, the thinking being that a crisis would require late nights for those working in national security, and they would need to order something to eat.
The practice apparently originated with Soviet spies in the 1980’s, who used to track pizza delivery cars, and journalists at the time also noted increases before the invasions of Grenada and Panama, respectively. After pizza deliveries to the Pentagon and Langley spiked the night before the U.S. invasion of Iraq in 1990, the concept broke out into the public imagination. At the time, CNN’s Wolf Blitzer remarked, “Always monitor the pizzas.”
---
| [CLICK HERE TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=e62789015a&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
|
# Special Father’s Day (re)Post
---
| **(FROM JUNE 2024)**
While celebrating Father’s Day with my own children, I couldn’t help but think about my own father. He’s an amazing individual who embodies the adventurous spirit and can-do attitude that drives America. He came here with little, worked hard to build financial stability, and eventually started a family. He’s never felt the need to hyphenate his identity and continues to believe America is that shining city on the hill that drew him (and millions like him) to this land of opportunity. One of his proudest days continues to be the day he took an oath to America and became an American citizen. He exudes wisdom that comes from a life filled with character-building experiences. He is an inspiration to me and has been a caring and dedicated father to me and my sister and devoted husband to my mother. In honor of Father’s Day, I am posting an excerpt from my recent book, _**The Making of a Generalist**_ , about his decision to come to the United States. I hope you enjoy reading it as much as I did writing it.
### _\- Vikram
_
_**THE PURSUIT OF BETTER**_
My father arrived in America in the mid-1960s as a student seeking an automotive technical education. Armed with an associate of applied science degree that he had earned in India in 1957, he enrolled in Roberts’ Technical and Trade Schools in Manhattan and began his journey toward acquiring a skill, some know-how, that might enable a better life. Unsurprisingly, there were struggles along the way. He ran out of tuition money. To secure room and board, he lived in a hotel and worked as the overnight front-desk clerk. He made money driving a cab. Throughout it all, he never wavered. He knew America was where he wanted to stay, where he intended to set down roots.
After his stint in Manhattan and now armed with his technical certification...
---
| [CLICK HERE TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=9a0951cc67&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=2c98e0fdd4&e=93b2c2b824)
|
# NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY
---
| As many of you are aware, I’ve returned to writing my weekly newsletter and have been pleased by the rapidly growing interest in my thoughts. As I have in the past, I’m addressing a wide range of topics, ranging from geopolitics and economics to social trends to technology. The overall theme of my work is focused on “navigating uncertainty” and how a generalist approach can help us all make sense of what seems like chaos. If you have not already done so, please consider subscribing! (**It’s Free**!)
---
| [Subscribe to “Navigating Uncertainty” by Vikram Mansharamani](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=0ea5c3963d&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
|
# Want Vikram to speak at your event?
---

# About Vikram
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=0501916b49&e=93b2c2b824)
| **VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. **He’s currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza**. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, [ _**The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World**_](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=1d9e8b5748&e=93b2c2b824) , [ _**Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence**_](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=3cb5af36f8&e=93b2c2b824) and [ _**Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst**_](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=0ad9fa164f&e=93b2c2b824). Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.

clean_body: My latest thinking... | | | | | | | | | | | Mansharamani Musings | This month, I provide links to my latest posts and then share a link to an excerpt from that I posted on Father’s Day. I hope you enjoy... And as always, I welcome your feedback! est, Vikram | JUNE 1, 2025 On the campaign trail, President Trump made a promise to revive the American economy and deliver greater opportunity for working families: to create “a middle class that is once again the envy of the entire world.” Making that pledge a reality starts with tax cuts and deregulation but doesn’t end there. It will require policymakers to reconsider who has access to wealth-building opportunities. Unfortunately, far too many Americans lack the tools available to the wealthy. More Americans deserve the opportunity to invest in private markets, and that’s something Trump’s administration can provide. The Securities and Exchange Commission has a unique opportunity to... | | | JUNE 4, 2025 It was a surreal moment...while Harvard’s graduation was underway last week, the Trump Administration’s effort to ban the school from enrolling international students was making its way through the courts. Alan Garber, the University’s President, took aim at this policy during his opening address when he welcomed graduating students from “. ” The assembled crowd cheered at the reference, and after reiterated the sentiment that Harvard should be free to educate the world. And when news that a judge had issued a preliminary injunction against the Trump attempt to ban foreign students, the New York Times that celebratory reactions rippled through the crowd... | | | | JUNE 14, 2025 For many business leaders, the cross currents of a global trade war, military conflict in the Middle East, shifting geopolitical pressures, and disruption from new technologies have created a paralyzing level of uncertainty. Does it make sense to invest when artificial intelligence may replace your entire industry? What if tariffs create chaos in your supply chain? For many, the obvious course of action is, well, no action at all. As a generalist with a contrarian bent, I’ve decided instead to look at the big picture, connect the dots across different trends, and come up with a probabilistic assessment of how the future may unfold for the pizza industry. It’s led me to a different course: I’m proactively investing amidst today’s uncertainty as I see a bright future ahead... | | | JUNE 21, 2025 Recently, I’ve been intensely focused on all things pizza – a natural consequence of . Pizza news, the pizza market, anything affecting the pizza ingredient supply chain...all grab my attention. And I always detour to the frozen section of any grocery store to see the offerings, placement, and pricing of the pizza products they offer. But I also continue to monitor the context in which the pizza industry operates and regularly watch Sunday morning news shows, skim about 5 newspapers each day, and religiously listen to . Given my long-standing interest in foreign affairs, geopolitics, and economics, it should be no surprise that a recent headline about the “Pentagon Pizza Index” caught my attention. The index, which tracks pizza orders heading to the headquarters of the US Department of Defense from local pizza shops, tends to surge immediately before geopolitical or military events transpire. Why’s that? When the world is on the cusp of major events, those working at the Pentagon usually work late and order pizza... | | | JUNE 29, 2025 Last week I about the Pentagon Pizza Index, which for decades has seemingly predicted world events. The idea is to monitor DC-area pizza shops for spikes in business, the thinking being that a crisis would require late nights for those working in national security, and they would need to order something to eat. The practice apparently originated with Soviet spies in the 1980’s, who used to track pizza delivery cars, and journalists at the time also noted increases before the invasions of Grenada and Panama, respectively. After pizza deliveries to the Pentagon and Langley spiked the night before the U.S. invasion of Iraq in 1990, the concept broke out into the public imagination. At the time, CNN’s Wolf Blitzer remarked, “Always monitor the pizzas.” | | | Special Father’s Day (re)Post | (FROM JUNE 2024) While celebrating Father’s Day with my own children, I couldn’t help but think about my own father. He’s an amazing individual who embodies the adventurous spirit and can-do attitude that drives America. He came here with little, worked hard to build financial stability, and eventually started a family. He’s never felt the need to hyphenate his identity and continues to believe America is that shining city on the hill that drew him (and millions like him) to this land of opportunity. One of his proudest days continues to be the day he took an oath to America and became an American citizen. He exudes wisdom that comes from a life filled with character-building experiences. He is an inspiration to me and has been a caring and dedicated father to me and my sister and devoted husband to my mother. In honor of Father’s Day, I am posting an excerpt from my recent book, The Making of a Generalist , about his decision to come to the United States. I hope you enjoy reading it as much as I did writing it. \- Vikram THE PURSUIT OF BETTER My father arrived in America in the mid-1960s as a student seeking an automotive technical education. Armed with an associate of applied science degree that he had earned in India in 1957, he enrolled in Roberts’ Technical and Trade Schools in Manhattan and began his journey toward acquiring a skill, some know-how, that might enable a better life. Unsurprisingly, there were struggles along the way. He ran out of tuition money. To secure room and board, he lived in a hotel and worked as the overnight front-desk clerk. He made money driving a cab. Throughout it all, he never wavered. He knew America was where he wanted to stay, where he intended to set down roots. After his stint in Manhattan and now armed with his technical certification... | | | NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY | As many of you are aware, I’ve returned to writing my weekly newsletter and have been pleased by the rapidly growing interest in my thoughts. As I have in the past, I’m addressing a wide range of topics, ranging from geopolitics and economics to social trends to technology. The overall theme of my work is focused on “navigating uncertainty” and how a generalist approach can help us all make sense of what seems like chaos. If you have not already done so, please consider subscribing! Illinois Review is the largest conservative media source in Illinois, and the only source in Illinois that has been shared by President Donald Trump.

Chicago AM560 Axes Local Morning Radio Personality Amy Jacobson, Keeps Florida-based Host in Cost-Cutting Move (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/07/chicago-am560-axes-local-morning-radio-personality-amy-jacobson-keeps-florida-based-host-in-cost-cutting-move.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=82d588796a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/07/chicago-am560-axes-local-morning-radio-personality-amy-jacobson-keeps-florida-based-host-in-cost-cutting-move.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=82d588796a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
(Source: AM560 The Answer)
By Illinois Review

In a shocking cost-cutting move Tuesday, Chicago’s AM560 The Answer terminated longtime morning host Amy Jacobson, as the struggling conservative station grapples with declining relevance – fueled in part by its own hosts repeatedly attacking prominent, respected Trump supporters.

Jacobson, a beloved and nearly 16-year veteran of the station made the unexpected announcement late Tuesday on X, writing:

“After 15 1/2 years at WIND AM560 radio, due to staffing reductions, today was my last day on the air.”

For years, Jacobson co-hosted Chicago’s Morning Answer alongside Dan Proft – a polarizing and hyper-local media figure who delivers commentary on Chicago politics from his home base in south Florida.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/07/chicago-am560-axes-local-morning-radio-personality-amy-jacobson-keeps-florida-based-host-in-cost-cutting-move.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=82d588796a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
In 2022, Proft relocated to Florida, while studio executives scrambled to hide the fact that he no longer broadcasts from the Chicagoland suburban studio.

Besides hosting a Chicago radio show remotely from Florida, Proft has built a fortune as a political consultant for Illinois campaigns — but unfortunately, most of his candidates have ended up losing. His track record is as disappointing as former Chicago Bears head coach Matt Eberflus’ 14-32 record before being fired in 2024.
http://In?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=82d588796a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823 2022, Proft relocated to Florida, while studio executives scrambled to hide the fact that he no longer broadcasts from the Chicagoland suburban studio. Besides hosting a Chicago radio show remotely from Florida, Proft has built a fortune as a political consultant for Illinois campaigns — but unfortunately, most of his candidates have ended up losing. His track record is as disappointing as former Chicago Bears head coach Matt Eberflus’ 14-32 record before being fired in 2024.
Conservative political operative Dan Proft testifies in a hearing focused on allegations that he illegally coordinated campaign expenses with Darren Bailey’s 2022 run for governor. (Capitol News Illinois photo by Andrew Adams)
While Jacobson – who many believed represented the heart and soul of the morning show, will no longer be on air, she is however, launching a new venture, writing,

“I am still processing this but I am happy to announce I have launched AmyJacobsonLive.com where I will be hosting a weekly podcast, posting behind-the-scenes blogs, live streaming.”

It’s widely known across northern Illinois that AM560 hosts
Shaun Thompson (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/06/naples-based-chicago-radio-host-shaun-thompson-attacks-am-560-listeners-brands-them-as-filthy-scum-cockroaches-for-calling-out-his-vile-weekend-rant.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=82d588796a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823) — who broadcasts his Chicago-based show from Naples, Florida — and Jeanne Ives frequently criticize prominent Trump supporters on air, including this publication, the only major conservative news outlet in Illinois ever shared by President Donald Trump on his personal Truth Social page.

In September 2023, Ives criticized a local event featuring Donald Trump Jr., falsely claiming it struggled to sell tickets. During the 2024 presidential primary, she endorsed Florida Governor Ron DeSantis over former President Donald Trump — despite Trump leading DeSantis by more than 35 points at the time.

In an April 2023 interview with
Crain’s Chicago Business (https://www.chicagobusiness.com/greg-hinz-politics/conservative-news-site-illinois-review-critical-gop-insiders?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=82d588796a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823) , Ives gave a blunt on-the-record response about IR, saying, “I don’t read their garbage.” Similarly, Thompson – a close friend of Proft and his Florida-based realtor – has dismissed the Trump-supporting publication as a “rag.”

In June 2023, IR editor-in-chief and Trump administration advisor Mark Vargas
resigned (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/06/am-560-radio-host-mark-vargas-resigns-in-disgust-after-weekday-host-shaun-thompsons-vile-rant-calling-black-and-right-co-host-a-moron-with-the-taffy-apple-head-in-racist-h.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=82d588796a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823) from AM560 as their Sunday evening radio host after Thompson went on a vile, racist rant after calling-into Black and Right Radio – calling the co-host a “moron with the taffy apple head,” as the two sparred over politics.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/07/chicago-am560-axes-local-morning-radio-personality-amy-jacobson-keeps-florida-based-host-in-cost-cutting-move.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=82d588796a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
AM 560 radio host Shaun Thompson takes his show on the road, hosting a live show in front of an empty room. Thompson was prepared for 100 people, but less than 20 showed up. (Facebook)
Thompson continued his hate-filled rant aimed directly at the cohost, telling him, “you’re a disgrace, you shouldn’t go near a microphone, you’re too stupid.”

But Thompson didn’t stop there – he escalated the insult on air by telling the Black co-host, “80 percent of you people are morons; 80 percent of you idiots who pretend to be Republican.”

As Vargas pointed out in his resignation letter,

“This vile and disgusting behavior does not represent my values. The phone calls and texts that I have received over the last few days only echo the shock and disgust that I felt while listening to Saturday’s show. It’s hard to listen too – and for very good reason.

And while Shaun continues to be one of the most promoted and celebrated on-air radio personalities at the station, I cannot in good conscience continue hosting my radio show, sharing a microphone and a studio with an individual that’s so full of anger – and can say such terrible things. Therefore, I resign, effective immediately.”

The station wasted no time removing Jacobson from its website and social media platforms on Tuesday — a move likely to send shockwaves through its already limited listener base.

| Hi team — Camille here, Finance Director for the California Democratic Party. Just a quick note to say thank you. Thanks to your incredible support, we hit our ambitious end-of-quarter fundraising goal before the FEC deadline. Your support means we can keep expanding our organizing footprint in the California swing seats that will determine control of the U.S. House. That means more field organizers. More regional offices. More canvases. More direct voter contact. And more chances to hold GOP incumbents accountable for selling out Californians to Donald Trump’s extreme agenda. Plenty of vulnerable Republicans have stood behind Donald Trump’s “Big Ugly Bill” which cuts Medicaid and other critical services to fund giveaways for billionaires. **And we intend to let swing voters know.** Because we’re not just working to compete in California — _the tossup seats we fight for here will determine the House Majority in 2026_. So thank you for being in this with us. Thank you for donating, opening our emails, sharing with friends — all of it makes a real difference. Now, let’s keep going. 💙 Gratefully, Camille

Thanks to your incredible support, we hit our ambitious end-of-quarter fundraising goal before the FEC deadline. Your support means we can keep expanding our organizing footprint in the California swing seats that will determine control of the U.S. House. That means more field organizers. More regional offices. More canvases. More direct voter contact. And more chances to hold GOP incumbents accountable for selling out Californians to Donald Trump’s extreme agenda. Plenty of vulnerable Republicans have stood behind Donald Trump’s “Big Ugly Bill” which cuts Medicaid and other critical services to fund giveaways for billionaires. And we intend to let swing voters know. Because we’re not just working to compete in California — the tossup seats we fight for here will determine the House Majority in 2026. So thank you for being in this with us. Thank you for donating, opening our emails, sharing with friends — all of it makes a real difference. Now, let’s keep going. 💙 Gratefully, Camille | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. ---

Let me be blunt: The "Big Ugly Bill" just passed the Senate. And if we don't act now, it will become law.
Despite bipartisan opposition, Senate Republicans rammed it through anyway--with JD Vance casting the tie-breaking vote. Speaker Mike Johnson is already fast-tracking the bill in the House. And what's inside? Nothing short of a blueprint for MAGA fascism that will devastate millions of working Americans. **Let 's Address This.**
**I am doing everything in my power to raise awareness and fight fascism in America. I need your partnership. Join us as a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..HobP2fE8UE8NZDKOQ53VGBBtxL3exz0h-xIDiqxFBvc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=167324858)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3f4cba41-b680-44d9-99ea-3c1b4c4b1f2f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Before I get too far into this short piece, I'm going to ask you to join the coalition I'm building to fight back by adding your name here: [Join Our Coalition](https://substack.com/redirect/d38b8747-f4f1-49b7-95a3-3957b4b93432?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## Here's what the Big Ugly Bill does:
🩸 **Guts Medicaid for 16 million people**
🥫 **Slashes SNAP and food access** , even for children
🏥 **Shuts down rural hospitals** -- with zero alternatives
💸 **Hands billions in tax breaks to multi-millionaires**
📈 **Raises taxes on working people**
❄️ **Injects $8 billion into ICE** to detain and deport more immigrants -- including U.S. citizens
🧱 **Burns $50 billion** on a pointless border wall
🚨 **Builds $59 billion in new prisons** to run a for-profit concentration camp system
💣 **Spends $150 billion on endless war** while cutting healthcare and food for our most vulnerable
If this becomes law, over 50,000 Americans a year will die -- not from war, not from disease, but from deliberate cruelty. Let's be honest: this bill isn't about fiscal responsibility. It's about fascism.
It is class warfare.
It is race warfare.
And it is the clearest sign yet that Trumpism is not some fringe ideology--it is the official policy of today's GOP.
## We Can Stop The Big Ugly Bill
But here's the thing: **House Republicans can still stop this**. They know this bill is wildly unpopular. They know voters are watching. We need to make their phones ring off the hook, flood their inboxes, and show them this is a career-ending vote if they move forward.
📣 **SIGN THE PETITION NOW**
Join the coalition of Americans rising up to stop this atrocity:
[Join Our Coalition To Act](https://substack.com/redirect/d38b8747-f4f1-49b7-95a3-3957b4b93432?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
This isn't just a moment--it's a movement. When you sign, we'll follow up with the next steps: how to call, who to pressure, and what actions to take _together_ to stop this nightmare from becoming law.
If you've ever wondered _when_ to speak up, _when_ to act, _when_ to demand justice--**it 's now**. Let's get to work.
**Let's Address This exists and thrives due to your support, the thoughtful person reading this. Elevate our advocacy as a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..HobP2fE8UE8NZDKOQ53VGBBtxL3exz0h-xIDiqxFBvc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=167324858)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3e19eeed-cf28-4067-be6c-b343fb7942da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity”on DVD
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zacksj89t3qbvne6hfi2v5b0a9va7g3oe7k7ek2o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5im0ob1chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfoj668crjqeu663kvap2ksjc4s118ht229d3q70_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5im0ob1chh2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjq254iagdmi6ki703tdgdsk474d1ce9qal9iht8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5im0ob1chh2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zap7ritvkh1mpvdq1ttgc6oedqtgpr3bsctrlv30_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5im0ob1chh2bs)[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpukh3fagcc0o7ei41jao4i0rfqkaik6s4halcco_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5im0ob1chh2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

body:
With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again!

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. **Our pain is your gain.** Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. "I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity”on DVD
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from Updates for Great Americans is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zn3jpe9v2jlcad8bb5aig8d1qf3i2cn2hgsp5r6o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5im8pj2chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zndugdjovei9m2b922qngkr882buemlq3i1fccu8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5im8pj2chh2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8otdd2qk7ft0jcv42eigoa8m3lmga9v246vd4g0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5im8pj2chh2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8agaviksq3hl61tq99pn9egb36h4l13bn92nv78_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5im8pj2chh2bs)**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zechm6cgmq3so0gvv55jmm6vtvt351mk6kbqlie8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5im8pj2chh2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

# **[Cardinal Ambongo: Opposition to same-sex blessings not an 'African exception'](http://trk.libertyledger.-FfytUy1QD1xlw)**
---
Cardinal Fridolin Ambongo, president of the Symposium of Episcopal Conferences of Africa and Madagascar. / Credit: François-Régis Salefran CC BY-SA 4.0 DEED Vatican City, Jul 1, 2025 / 14:47 pm (CNA). The leader of Africa’s Catholic bishops pushed back Tuesday on the narrative that it was only Africans who objected to a 2023 Vatican declaration permitting blessings for same-sex couples.“The position taken by Africa [on the declaration] was also the position of so many bishops here in Europe. It’s not just an African exception,” Cardinal Fridolin Ambongo Besungu, OFM Cap, told EWTN News on July 1.The 65-year-old cardinal added that homosexuality is fundamentally a “doctrinal, theological problem,” and Church moral teaching on the subject has not changed.

name: Dominic Rapini
subject: Liberal Flag Fatigue
body:
There is only one true flag, our American Flag

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us16.campaign-archive.com/?e=8763c56857&u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=8afab487b5)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | “When we honor our flag, we honor what we stand for as a nation — freedom, equality, justice, and hope.” – Ronald Reagan
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| **Burning the American flag is not a protest. It is a declaration of war on the values of this country**
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
# _Opinion_ | Liberals Struggle to Keep Up With Flag-of-the-Month Club Ahead of Fourth of July
---
| _By Dominic Rapini, American Businessman and Political Commentator_
As America gears up to celebrate 249 years of **flipping tyranny the bird with fireworks,** BBQ, and Toby Keith playlists, one group of citizens finds themselves completely overwhelmed: Liberals are experiencing unprecedented levels of flag-related burnout.
Sources confirm that in liberal enclaves from Brooklyn to Berkeley, exhausted residents are collapsing under the sheer logistical nightmare of keeping their symbolic solidarity flags up to date.**It’s flag fatigue, folks** — and it’s real.
“It started with the Trans flag, then the Ukrainian flag was the hot moral accessory,” said Kayden, a self-described progressive activist and Etsy sticker mogul. “Then Palestine became the urgent humanitarian cause of the moment, so we swapped again. **Now Iran’s in the mix and, frankly, I’m running out of porch space.** ”
Psychologists call it**Reactive Banner Syndrome** — a condition in which one’s moral worth is directly tied to the number of non-American flags you can fly before brunch.Meanwhile, Etsy sellers are reporting surging demand for Iranian flags — a product so rare even Hamas has to backorder it. “I had to custom print it on a recycled kombucha label,” said one flag vendor in Portland. “It’s the most oppressed fabric I’ve ever worked with.”
But the irony hits like a July 4th bottle rocket to the face: While liberals exhaust themselves **collecting foreign banners like it’s the United Nations’ version of Pokémon** , the one flag they consistently burn is — yep — Old Glory.
And here’s the kicker:**burning American flags has sparked renewed global interest in... American flags**. In Tel Aviv, red-white-and-blue is flying in the streets. In parts of Eastern Europe, folks are waving it in protest of actual authoritarianism — the kind that throws people off rooftops, not misgenders them. Yet somehow, in parts of America, the Stars and Stripes are considered passé. Outdated. Problematic.
This is what happens when identity becomes a yard sign hobby and patriotism gets filed under**“problematic colonizer vibes.”** Never mind that the American flag represents a nation where all these ideologies can openly clash without anyone getting disappeared in the night. (Try that with the Iranian flag and see how long your TikTok account lasts.)
So this Fourth of July, while liberals scramble to remember if they’re supposed to be waving the flag of Gaza, Tehran, Tijuana, or TikTok Nation, the rest of us will be proudly hoisting one banner: the American flag.
Not because it’s trendy. Not because it gets us likes. But because it’s the symbol of the most radical idea in human history: that people can govern themselves, speak freely, and celebrate their disagreements without killing each other —**a wild notion still illegal in half the countries liberals love to glorify.**
To our liberal friends: You’re welcome to bring your latest flag to the cookout. But when the fireworks start and the anthem plays, **you might just remember why the red, white, and blue is the only flag that deserves to fly above them all.**
**God bless America — and someone please hide the lighter fluid.** ——————————-

body:
Former U.S. Rep. Colin Allred has announced he is [running for the U.S. Senate](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2SozAQhJ8GMlHS8HcECi4h86UXUmPNANoSiJIGY-_Tb9mvsHFXd_X3_b9NN_TB78s_3NjKc47TzlcOLMJpwhASUzr33e9LPvPBTpjy8ZpAQ6t0rzRMhD68pqYke9c0mJKt6VvTtI0e2nK1bUedxmGumZHRDcBNNyMQ3YfeQT2U3r7HdK_BGG3qutLNzGjmgYhNR21bNJrJS0yVrCz8xDyHV3xwqlzcymBXkSMX9d8CxgLG67qqOT7fFO-8gPGIwYt3uYDx01bEW3QJRV1rVCFmUcKkXDq_1R-1xV3WrHCJ6uvcjqxAQ6cy7yisEjouk6Xj8iH43PVFo5cNffhckd8JfFj4CQAA__9l8oii) in a bid to become the first Democrat to win a statewide election in Texas since 1994. Last year, he lost a challenge to U.S. Sen. Ted Cruz by nearly 9 percentage points despite Democrats spending more than $130 million on the race.
