[ Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/7c921ef8-eae3-41de-b14d-1a802a922fd1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Trump sues the HECK out of CBS and Paramount for election interference and scores big settlement
Paramount Global and CBS **[agreed Tuesday to pay President Donald Trump more than $30 million](https://substack.com/redirect/080dba66-73fd-47a8-ab47-16cbfd91f0ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to settle his election interference lawsuit over the network's editing of a Kamala Harris interview, with the deal including new editorial standards requiring full transcripts of future presidential candidate interviews.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/858357de-c4a5-458d-92f4-c31c7a5621b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Trump will receive $16 million upfront** for legal fees and future presidential library or charitable causes, plus an anticipated mid-eight-figure allocation for conservative-focused advertisements and public service announcements on the network.

* **CBS must implement new editorial standards including a "Trump Rule" for future presidential interviews** \- The network agreed to promptly release full, unedited transcripts of all future presidential candidate interviews, a requirement that sources involved in settlement talks specifically called the "Trump Rule."
* **The lawsuit centered on CBS's editing of a Kamala Harris "60 Minutes" interview during the 2024 campaign** \- Trump accused the network of election interference for airing different portions of Harris's response to a question about Netanyahu on different programs, claiming CBS deceitfully edited her "word salad" answer to shield the Democratic nominee from criticism.
* **The settlement may have been motivated by CBS's pending merger with Skydance Media** \- Paramount controlling shareholder Shari Redstone reportedly wanted to resolve the lawsuit before the multi-billion-dollar merger to prevent potential retaliation from Trump's FCC, which has authority to block media transactions, though CBS denies any journalistic wrongdoing.

* * *
# Trump nominates Alina Habba after sanctuary city mayor crackdown
President Donald Trump **[nominated acting U.S. Attorney Alina Habba](https://substack.com/redirect/85941212-61a8-4bb3-8ae2-cb1e55f7f4e2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for Senate confirmation to permanently lead federal prosecution in New Jersey.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/85941212-61a8-4bb3-8ae2-cb1e55f7f4e2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Pending Senate confirmation** \- Habba, who previously represented Trump in civil cases and was appointed as interim prosecutor in March, would continue serving as the state's top federal prosecutor if confirmed by the Senate.

* **Habba gained national attention for arresting sanctuary city mayor Ras Baraka and charging Democratic Rep. LaMonica McIver** \- Her office arrested Newark Mayor Baraka for trespassing at a migrant detention center in May and charged McIver with two counts of assaulting officers during what prosecutors called an orchestrated attempt to disrupt ICE operations under the guise of congressional oversight.
* **The controversial prosecutions reflect the Trump administration's broader crackdown on sanctuary policies** \- Both Baraka and McIver claim political persecution, with Baraka filing a lawsuit against Habba, while the Justice Department has separately sued several New Jersey cities including Newark over sanctuary policies that obstruct federal immigration enforcement.

* * *
# Iran admits nuclear strikes are destroyed
Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi **[acknowledged to CBS News](https://substack.com/redirect/761de2ea-8216-4f16-aab6-c6102eaf279c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that the country's Fordow nuclear facility was "seriously and heavily damaged" by U.S. airstrikes, contradicting earlier media reports that suggested minimal destruction to the underground uranium enrichment site.
* **Iran maintains its nuclear program is peaceful despite enriching uranium to weapons-grade levels** \- Araghchi insisted Iran only has a "peaceful nuclear program" that has become a "matter of national pride," even though Iran has enriched uranium to 60% purity, which experts note represents 99% of the effort needed to make weapons-grade uranium.
* **The Foreign Minister claimed religious principles prevent Iran from developing nuclear weapons** \- Despite having enriched thousands of kilograms of uranium at three facilities while failing to fuel its only operating nuclear power plant, Araghchi cited a religious fatwa from Iran's Supreme Leader declaring that "nuclear weaponry has no place whatsoever in the security doctrine of the Islamic Republic of Iran."

| | Hey there, The Senate just voted to pass the latest reconciliation bill, otherwise known as the “big, beautiful bill.” **But here's the thing, we know this bill is anything but beautiful.** From cutting Medicaid spending and threatening the healthcare coverage of at least 12 million people, all the way to reducing SNAP food assistance spending by nearly $300 billion, this legislation would risk the livelihoods of millions of Americans across the entire country. You might be thinking — how is this relevant to our work at Fair Fight Action? The answer is simple: **Our power doesn’t stop at the ballot box — it’s where it starts. ** This bill is the latest move in a coordinated effort by far-right extremists to dismantle the checks and balances in place to prevent abuses of power and protect the democratic process. Fair Fight Action is explicitly calling out this bill **because the anti-democracy actors behind it are the same anti-voter extremists pushing legislation like the SAVE Act, the most dangerous voter suppression bill we’ve seen yet. This is no coincidence.** [**Far-right elected officials are trying to dodge accountability at the ballot box, intentionally suppressing the vote, and abandoning democratic values — but we won’t let that slide. Rather than fighting for constituents, far-right extremists are clinging to their power at the expense of the American people.
**Their tactics are straight from an authoritarian playbook:** They’re spreading misinformation about election integrity. They’re trying to limit access to the ballot and restrict the freedom to vote. With this reconciliation bill, they’re launching a direct assault on access to services that Americans need to survive, such as food and health care.
What is also concerning about both the SAVE Act and the budget reconciliation bill is _**how**_ MAGA extremists have moved to pass them quickly.
For the reconciliation bill, some leaders in the Senate discussed **overruling** the nonpartisan Senate Parliamentarian, _whose role is seen as vital to preserving the integrity of the Senate. _
Back in May, Senator Mike Lee requested unanimous consent on the Senate floor to fast-track the SAVE ACT — a blatant effort to advance legislation that has the potential to disenfranchise millions of Americans, _without hearing any arguments or concerns against it._
**And now — House GOP leaders plan to rush through a vote for the reconciliation bill by July 4th. **
This is exactly how authoritarianism will thrive — through unchecked tactics that are the polar opposite of democracy, silencing dissent and ignoring the will of the people.
[**Our work to defend democracy has never been more critical. Donate to Fair Fight Action to lift up the power of the people and fight back against authoritarianism.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110719405/555121806/950351755?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250702_T1_BBBSave_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWU4YWI0Ny00YzU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YiieMTk88CGPIwe2XIZNc0jbSHr2CaJgtQb2KI74Dj4=)

clean_body: Here’s why we’re watching these bills so closely: | | | Hey there, The Senate just voted to pass the latest reconciliation bill, otherwise known as the “big, beautiful bill.” But here's the thing, we know this bill is anything but beautiful. From cutting Medicaid spending and threatening the healthcare coverage of at least 12 million people, all the way to reducing SNAP food assistance spending by nearly $300 billion, this legislation would risk the livelihoods of millions of Americans across the entire country. You might be thinking — how is this relevant to our work at Fair Fight Action? The answer is simple: Our power doesn’t stop at the ballot box — it’s where it starts. This bill is the latest move in a coordinated effort by far-right extremists to dismantle the checks and balances in place to prevent abuses of power and protect the democratic process. Fair Fight Action is explicitly calling out this bill because the anti-democracy actors behind it are the same anti-voter extremists pushing legislation like the SAVE Act, the most dangerous voter suppression bill we’ve seen yet. This is no coincidence. = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Rather than fighting for constituents, far-right extremists are clinging to their power at the expense of the American people. Their tactics are straight from an authoritarian playbook: They’re spreading misinformation about election integrity. They’re trying to limit access to the ballot and restrict the freedom to vote. With this reconciliation bill, they’re launching a direct assault on access to services that Americans need to survive, such as food and health care. What is also concerning about both the SAVE Act and the budget reconciliation bill is how MAGA extremists have moved to pass them quickly. For the reconciliation bill, some leaders in the Senate discussed overruling the nonpartisan Senate Parliamentarian, whose role is seen as vital to preserving the integrity of the Senate. Back in May, Senator Mike Lee requested unanimous consent on the Senate floor to fast-track the SAVE ACT — a blatant effort to advance legislation that has the potential to disenfranchise millions of Americans, without hearing any arguments or concerns against it. And now — House GOP leaders plan to rush through a vote for the reconciliation bill by July 4th. This is exactly how authoritarianism will thrive — through unchecked tactics that are the polar opposite of democracy, silencing dissent and ignoring the will of the people. = In service, Max Flugrath Fair Fight Action = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. name: Jeff Merkley
subject: An update on Republicans’ Big, Beautiful Betrayal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
We’ve entered a new stage of the Big, Beautiful Betrayal.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110721196/555127555/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWUzODM4OC00ZDU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iV6IgwTNwJ33RYRZxFjb5-a03TzeBQ9WcURwbHfO69g=&emci=1e456f52-4757-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=09e38388-4d57-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7731215)
---

| | I wanted to give you a quick update on where things stand on the Republican Big Beautiful Betrayal of a bill. Yesterday, after hours of debate and a 27-hour vote-a-rama on amendments, Senate Republicans passed their version of Trump's disastrous billionaires-first budget plan that will gut Medicaid and other essential programs that help millions of Americans thrive. **The Republican vision is families lose, billionaires win. The Democratic vision is families get a fair shot, billionaires pay their fair share** , and the economy works for everyone. That's exactly what our amendments in the vote-a-rama would have delivered — but Republicans voted all of them down, one after the other. Now, this brutal bill goes back to the House, where they're going to try to pass this bill today. Republicans are scrambling because they know that the longer this plays out and the more Americans learn about this bill, the more opposition it sparks. That's why they rushed it out of the Senate and why they'll try to rush it out of the House. I have news for them: I know you are watching, you know what's at stake, and you DON'T like what you're seeing. Trump calls this bill "big" and "beautiful." **Let's call it what it really is:****_a betrayal_****.** We can still defeat this. Keep making noise. Let's stand together and fight back. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: The bad guys won this time
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Congrats to Senate Republicans on passing their disastrous budget. They just voted to rip Medicaid and food assistance from millions so billionaires can get another yacht.
#

Congrats to Senate Republicans on passing their disastrous budget. They just voted to rip Medicaid and food assistance from millions so billionaires can get another yacht.
Hell of a legacy. But that’s not all this bill does, so let me back this up a second.
Two years ago, Congress passed the Inflation Reduction Act and brought over $13 billion in investments and 13,000 good-paying jobs to Arizona. Tons more nationwide. High-paying, union jobs with full pensions and high-quality health insurance.
These jobs finally gave hardworking people a real shot at the American Dream. That’s what’s possible when you go to Congress and try to do good stuff for the people you represent. And yesterday, Republicans in the Senate voted to take that all away and give another tax break to billionaires.
Republicans are abandoning the people they claim to fight for. They campaigned on lowering costs, but under this bill, families are going to pay $110 more per year on utility bills. It rolls back tax cuts for families to make energy-efficient improvements to their homes, and it doesn’t end there.
You thought Republicans in Congress cared about the opioid crisis? I put up an amendment trying to stop them from gutting Medicaid funding for opioid addiction treatment. They voted it down. If you’re battling addiction and depending on Medicaid, you’re on your own.
You thought they cared about waste, fraud and abuse? To get Lisa Murkowski’s vote, they gave a carveout for her state and several others that is going to incentivize fraud in food assistance. States with higher error rates in SNAP payments are going to have cuts delayed for two years while states with lower error rates face down those cuts immediately.
It’s hard to put into words how angry I am. Nobody liked this bill — except Steve Miller and Trump and the MAGA diehards. Nobody wanted it to pass, but a ton of them held their noses and voted for it anyway.
American families are going to pay the price because these cowards didn’t have the backbone to stand up to Trump.
The bad guys won this time, and I’m sorry about that. But we will hold them accountable. You can be sure of that.
[**If you'd like to support me in the fights ahead, I’d be very grateful if you made a grassroots donation to my campaign.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july25.UmJNyp&refcode=em250702-1-160&t=1&akid=3910%2E734936%2EC_nddF)
[DONATE](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july25.UmJNyp&refcode=em250702-1-160&t=2&akid=3910%2E734936%2EC_nddF)
Thank you for your support.
And please, hang in there.
Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

It rolls back tax cuts for families to make energy-efficient improvements to their homes, and it doesn’t end there. You thought Republicans in Congress cared about the opioid crisis? I put up an amendment trying to stop them from gutting Medicaid funding for opioid addiction treatment. They voted it down. If you’re battling addiction and depending on Medicaid, you’re on your own. You thought they cared about waste, fraud and abuse? To get Lisa Murkowski’s vote, they gave a carveout for her state and several others that is going to incentivize fraud in food assistance. States with higher error rates in SNAP payments are going to have cuts delayed for two years while states with lower error rates face down those cuts immediately. It’s hard to put into words how angry I am. Nobody liked this bill — except Steve Miller and Trump and the MAGA diehards. Nobody wanted it to pass, but a ton of them held their noses and voted for it anyway. American families are going to pay the price because these cowards didn’t have the backbone to stand up to Trump. The bad guys won this time, and I’m sorry about that. But we will hold them accountable. You can be sure of that. Thank you for your support. And please, hang in there. Ruben Paid For By Gallego for Arizona Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: They couldn’t cancel this...
body:
I’ve written a lot of messages to patriots like you over the years... but never one quite like this.

[Unsubscribe](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj205ewrxz24skq4uk0tmhukr6ukqt73vi3pr43wd69hr6wcxw3h1hc7av9idbrcigixx1t0nurr6ae5xwpbr&__stmp=sys0al&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
\- This tour went somewhere no one thought we’d reach - The Left’s strongholds are crumbling - This generation is choosing freedom - The comeback is happening — and YOU made it possible - This wasn’t just noise... - Packed crowds. Roaring students. The Left? Speechless. - We’re beating the Left. On their turf.

| | | [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=clt64yr0wtt77sk4y3qgopa47ebx4emfq1nomh92nsiwh5keg8wilkcslnmr33py7xvlht9t5bujk3961v6ubhydugx6stb52c0zit5i5owe126bmh11o8h5dxvu3mxnta8u33bzno28wljcx3p96mflw9gou66kplj0egv2lhq4t3a9xj5f719qd1ieyi9jo1dwehwde3z40wmx5fwjwipar3hc0oifh8vawg8cjx92slosy4k2eooo4a86xm0ogmokq6myb90&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sys0al&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, I’ve written a lot of messages to patriots like you over the years... but never one quite like this. Because I’ve never had this much good news to share. And I’ve never felt this much urgency to say one thing: **THANK YOU.** I don’t know if you’ve ever felt something just... _shift..._ while it was happening... But this spring on the American Comeback Tour? **I did.** And if you were standing where I stood — listening to the crowd roar before I walked up to the “Prove Me Wrong” table at our Spring Finale at UC Riverside... You would’ve felt this generational shift in real time, too.
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=clt64yr0wtt77sk4y3qgopa47ebx4emfq1nomh92nsiwh5keg8wilkcslnmr33py7xvlht9t5bujk3961v6ubhydugx6stb52c0zit5i5owe126bmh11o8h5dxvu3mxnta8u33bzno28wljcx3p96mflw9gou66kplj0egv2lhq4t3a9xj5f719qd1ieyi9jo1dwehwde3z40wmx5fwjwipar3hc0oifh8vawg8cjx92slosy4k2eooo4a86xm0ogmokq6myb90&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sys0al&__onlt=h)
---
You may have seen the photos from the tour... caught some of the videos... read about the chants of _“USA!”_ from students... But let me tell you exactly what happened this spring: **Patriots like you helped launch the most powerful Conservative campus tour in American history.** It was BOLD. It was LOUD. And it was PACKED... From beginning to end. **And the American Comeback Tour’s Spring FINALE was in a place no one thought we’d ever touch: California.** The same state where Leftist professors shut down free speech... where mobs scream in the faces of our students... where conservative ideas aren’t just unpopular — _they’re punishable offenses._ And yet... We filled the campus quad at UC Riverside. Students came early. Packed shoulder-to-shoulder. Ringing around the “Prove Me Wrong” tent to hear the truth. And when I walked on stage and said: “It’s okay to love America...” They ERUPTED.
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=clt64yr0wtt77sk4y3qgopa47ebx4emfq1nomh92nsiwh5keg8wilkcslnmr33py7xvlht9t5bujk3961v6ubhydugx6stb52c0zit5i5owe126bmh11o8h5dxvu3mxnta8u33bzno28wljcx3p96mflw9gou66kplj0egv2lhq4t3a9xj5f719qd1ieyi9jo1dwehwde3z40wmx5fwjwipar3hc0oifh8vawg8cjx92slosy4k2eooo4a86xm0ogmokq6myb90&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sys0al&__onlt=h)
---
It wasn’t just another great tour stop... **It was a BREAKTHROUGH.** Because this wasn’t the first stop in California this spring — it was the fourth IN MAY and the SIXTH of the tour. And each one was just as powerful... This wasn’t just another campus tour. _It was a line in the sand._ And every single time, the story was the same: The Left tried to dismiss us, hurl their obscenities, or shut us down... The students showed up anyway. And the truth rang out louder than ever before. _But let’s back up for a moment..._ Because while the California finale may have been the last stop of the Spring, this all started months ago. **Back in January, when we were laying out the calendar... These were the goals: Go BIGGER. Go BOLDER. Go DEEPER into Leftist territory.** We wanted to hit not just the battleground states... Not just the safe “Red” states... _But the ones the Left claimed as their own._ And then? We wanted to plant our flag. And because of patriots like you — that’s exactly what we did. **Let me give you the big picture:** ✅ 21 American Comeback Tour stops ✅ Overflow crowds with thousands of students ✅ Deep “Blue” states seeing young people rising up ✅ The Left rattled by a movement of young people who are rejecting them... _wholesale._ Students who had never once heard a Conservative speak in person... _finally heard one._ Students who were afraid to wear a cross or sport an American flag... _were loud, proud, and unashamed to stand for God and their country._ Students who were told they were alone... _realized they were part of something BIGGER than they ever imagined._ There are too many great stories, moments and pictures to pack into this one message... **But just look at what we're accomplishing:**
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=clt64yr0wtt77sk4y3qgopa47ebx4emfq1nomh92nsiwh5keg8wilkcslnmr33py7xvlht9t5bujk3961v6ubhydugx6stb52c0zit5i5owe126bmh11o8h5dxvu3mxnta8u33bzno28wljcx3p96mflw9gou66kplj0egv2lhq4t3a9xj5f719qd1ieyi9jo1dwehwde3z40wmx5fwjwipar3hc0oifh8vawg8cjx92slosy4k2eooo4a86xm0ogmokq6myb90&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sys0al&__onlt=h)
---
_Friend, this is why we fight..._ Not just for campus speeches. Not just for questions from students. **But for a generation-wide cultural reset — playing out in real time, in real places, in the hearts of real students.** This is why the American Comeback Tour matters. And I hope you know:**It wouldn’t exist without patriots like****YOU****.** Your support — your prayers, your belief in our students, your generous gifts — made all of this possible. Patriots like you put us on the road. You brought us onto these campuses. You sent us to the students who needed to hear our America First message the most. **You weren’t just watching this tour... You were powering it.** Now, let me be totally honest: _We’re not done. Not even close._ The American Comeback Tour may have just ended for the spring... But this summer? We’re preparing for something even BIGGER. We’re already mapping out new stops in the fall. New states. New targets in Leftist territory to break through. We’re building a plan to take this movement to the next level — to complete the cultural shift that started on this tour. To reach more students. To change more hearts and minds. **And raise up the boldest, most unapologetic generation of freedom-loving Americans since the founding of this country.** _I’m going to need you fighting alongside me, Friend._ Because now that we’ve tasted victory... now that we’ve seen what’s possible... We can’t back down. Not now. _Not ever._ Let’s keep building. Let’s keep pushing. Let’s keep GOING. The American Comeback is well underway. Let’s make sure it keeps rolling strong. **I can’t say “thank you” enough to the patriots like you who’ve helped make Turning Point USA the force it is today.** **Together, we’re SAVING America... one student at a time.**
---
For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA

Roaring students. The Left? Speechless. - We’re beating the Left. On their turf. | | | Friend, I’ve written a lot of messages to patriots like you over the years... but never one quite like this. Because I’ve never had this much good news to share. And I’ve never felt this much urgency to say one thing: THANK YOU. I don’t know if you’ve ever felt something just... shift... while it was happening... But this spring on the American Comeback Tour? I did. And if you were standing where I stood — listening to the crowd roar before I walked up to the “Prove Me Wrong” table at our Spring Finale at UC Riverside... You would’ve felt this generational shift in real time, too. You may have seen the photos from the tour... caught some of the videos... read about the chants of “USA!” from students... But let me tell you exactly what happened this spring: Patriots like you helped launch the most powerful Conservative campus tour in American history. It was BOLD. It was LOUD. And it was PACKED... From beginning to end. And the American Comeback Tour’s Spring FINALE was in a place no one thought we’d ever touch: California. The same state where Leftist professors shut down free speech... where mobs scream in the faces of our students... where conservative ideas aren’t just unpopular — they’re punishable offenses. And yet... We filled the campus quad at UC Riverside. Students came early. Packed shoulder-to-shoulder. Ringing around the “Prove Me Wrong” tent to hear the truth. And when I walked on stage and said: “It’s okay to love America...” They ERUPTED. It wasn’t just another great tour stop... It was a BREAKTHROUGH. Because this wasn’t the first stop in California this spring — it was the fourth IN MAY and the SIXTH of the tour. And each one was just as powerful... This wasn’t just another campus tour. It was a line in the sand. And every single time, the story was the same: The Left tried to dismiss us, hurl their obscenities, or shut us down... The students showed up anyway. Let me give you the big picture: ✅ 21 American Comeback Tour stops ✅ Overflow crowds with thousands of students ✅ Deep “Blue” states seeing young people rising up ✅ The Left rattled by a movement of young people who are rejecting them... wholesale. State Democrats are competing in all-important special elections in the coming months, and we need to be ready to _win_ nationwide. body:
A brand new open seat... and an UPGRADED race rating from Cook Political Report.
#

There are TWO U.S. Senate seats that we MUST flip in order to restore our Democratic Senate majority next year. **North Carolina and Maine.** **[If you’re ready to help us flip these seats, please consider chipping in now. Otherwise, please keep reading to learn more about both of these important races.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91099?refcode=em20250702-9080&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9080%2E614464%2Ecfz6oO)** **[CHIP IN NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91099?refcode=em20250702-9080&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9080%2E614464%2Ecfz6oO)**
---

**— North Carolina —** _GOP U.S. Senator Thom Tillis just announced that he will NOT seek re-election in 2026._ **After this news, Cook Political Report upgraded North Carolina’s U.S. Senate race from Leans Republican to a _TOSS UP!_** The Center for Politics also rates this race as a _TOSS UP!_ **This Senate race will be one of the nation’s top battlegrounds next year.** **[Please consider making a donation today to help us flip North Carolina’s Senate seat blue and restore our Democratic majority:](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91099?refcode=em20250702-9080&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9080%2E614464%2Ecfz6oO)** If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91100?refcode=em20250702-9080&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=4&akid=9080%2E614464%2Ecfz6oO) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91100?refcode=em20250702-9080&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=5&akid=9080%2E614464%2Ecfz6oO) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91099?refcode=em20250702-9080&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=9080%2E614464%2Ecfz6oO)
---

**— Maine —** Republican U.S. Senator Susan Collins is running for re-election in 2026. **Maine will be one of the most _expensive_ and _competitive_ races in the country!** Cook Political Report AND the Center for Politics rate Maine’s U.S. Senate race as _Lean Republican._ But right now, with faith in the GOP at an all-time low, just about anything could tip the scales and make this race a TOSS UP! **[Please consider making a donation today to help us flip Maine blue and restore our Democratic majority in the Senate:](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91099?refcode=em20250702-9080&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=9080%2E614464%2Ecfz6oO)** If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91100?refcode=em20250702-9080&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=8&akid=9080%2E614464%2Ecfz6oO) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91100?refcode=em20250702-9080&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=9&akid=9080%2E614464%2Ecfz6oO) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91099?refcode=em20250702-9080&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9080%2E614464%2Ecfz6oO)

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Thank You!
body:
Thank you for all you do to help Judicial Watch!

|
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

**Thank you** you for your interest in Judicial Watch and our work!
And as we enter the second half of 2025, I hope you will decide to [join us and support](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75017&L=35348&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=6b7d730242d55e52186759e44e828acf66566736e1bae6f943796970e61717b5) all our investigations, litigation, and public education programs dedicated to upholding the rule of law!
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75017&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

_Because of our supporters,_ Judicial Watch is America's indispensable, independent watchdog in Washington.

_Because of our supporters_ , we have _successfully cleaned over**5 million** names off voter rolls around the country_...

_Because of our supporters_ , we are _suing_ **California, Illinois** and **Oregon** over their failure to clean their voter rolls, and we are _suing_ **California, Illinois** and **Mississippi** over their reckless laws "extending" Election Day beyond the date set by Congress (open invitations to voter fraud)...

_Because of our supporters_ , we are _exposing_ widespread waste, fraud, corruption and abuse in federal government spending programs, and providing **President Trump** and **DOGE** with proof and vital ammunition they need to radically transform the federal government...

_Because of our supporters_ , we are suing **Evanston, Illinois** over its $20 million radical woke reparations program that is nothing more than a ploy to redistribute tax dollars to individuals based on race and that violates the sacred American principle of _equal protection under the law_...

...while every day we are also doing battle against stonewalling from some Trump administration officials, and using the legal system and the courts to force the release of public documents that "we the people" have a right to see, just as we have for the past 31 years!

**_In short, thanks to you we are fighting doggedly and persistently for the rule of law and for accountability in government_****!**

Your support is what makes it all possible.

And at this midpoint of the year...and as we prepare for our nation's 249th birthday in two days!... I would be very grateful [if you vsn help us today with a special gift so we can keep fighting for you](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75017&L=35348&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=6b7d730242d55e52186759e44e828acf66566736e1bae6f943796970e61717b5).

clean_body: Thank you for all you do to help Judicial Watch! | | | | | | Dear Fellow American, Thank you you for your interest in Judicial Watch and our work! And as we enter the second half of 2025, I hope you will decide to all our investigations, litigation, and public education programs dedicated to upholding the rule of law! | Because of our supporters, Judicial Watch is America's indispensable, independent watchdog in Washington. Because of our supporters , we have successfully cleaned over5 million names off voter rolls around the country... Because of our supporters , we are suing California, Illinois and Oregon over their failure to clean their voter rolls, and we are suing California, Illinois and Mississippi over their reckless laws "extending" Election Day beyond the date set by Congress (open invitations to voter fraud)... Because of our supporters , we are exposing widespread waste, fraud, corruption and abuse in federal government spending programs, and providing President Trump and DOGE with proof and vital ammunition they need to radically transform the federal government... Because of our supporters , we are suing Evanston, Illinois over its $20 million radical woke reparations program that is nothing more than a ploy to redistribute tax dollars to individuals based on race and that violates the sacred American principle of equal protection under the law... ...while every day we are also doing battle against stonewalling from some Trump administration officials, and using the legal system and the courts to force the release of public documents that "we the people" have a right to see, just as we have for the past 31 years! In short, thanks to you we are fighting doggedly and persistently for the rule of law and for accountability in government! Your support is what makes it all possible. And at this midpoint of the year...and as we prepare for our nation's 249th birthday in two days!... I would be very grateful . On behalf of all of us at Judicial Watch, I hope you have a wonderful Fourth of July... AND THANK YOU IN ADVANCE FOR JOINING WITH US! Friend,
We missed our mid-year fundraising goal — and the Democrats didn’t.
They’re out-raising us, outspending us, and flooding Virginia with out-of-state money. Every dollar they rake in goes toward flipping our Commonwealth blue.
**Campaigns are expensive.** Every field staffer, every knocked door, every call to a swing voter costs money — and we’re fighting to keep every single member of our team in the field where they’re needed most.
In a perfect world, every yard sign would be free. But we’d rather spend every dollar **talking to voters** and winning elections — not dropping off signs.
So here’s what you can do to help:

clean_body: | | | | Yard signs >> $15 for SHORT time. Friend, We missed our mid-year fundraising goal — and the Democrats didn’t. They’re out-raising us, outspending us, and flooding Virginia with out-of-state money. Every dollar they rake in goes toward flipping our Commonwealth blue. Campaigns are expensive. Every field staffer, every knocked door, every call to a swing voter costs money — and we’re fighting to keep every single member of our team in the field where they’re needed most. In a perfect world, every yard sign would be free. But we’d rather spend every dollar talking to voters and winning elections — not dropping off signs. So here’s what you can do to help: No pickup needed. No volunteers off the doors. Every bit helps us stay laser-focused on what matters most: winning in November. This one step on your part could make the difference. | The Democrats have the money. We have you. Let’s make it count. — The Republican Party of Virginia P.S. This offer is limited — don’t wait. and help us keep our teams where they belong: on the front lines of victory. | == \- PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF VIRGINIA

| Hi Peter,

I just wanted to take a moment to thank you from the bottom of my heart. Thanks to your support, we’ve reached our end-of-quarter fundraising goal!

This means so much to me – not because of the money we raised, but because it’s a reflection of the incredible grassroots movement we’re building together. It shows that the people of PA-07 are ready for change and are willing to stand up for a future where working families come first.

It’s going to be a tough race, and the road ahead is long. But with supporters like you, I know we have what it takes to win.

I’m honored to have you by my side as we continue this fight for the American Dream. If you’re not doing so already, I hope you’ll follow me on social media to keep up with this campaign!

clean_body: I just wanted to take a moment to thank you from the bottom of my heart. Thanks to your support, we’ve reached our end-of-quarter fundraising goal! | = | Hi Peter, I just wanted to take a moment to thank you from the bottom of my heart. Thanks to your support, we’ve reached our end-of-quarter fundraising goal! This means so much to me – not because of the money we raised, but because it’s a reflection of the incredible grassroots movement we’re building together. It shows that the people of PA-07 are ready for change and are willing to stand up for a future where working families come first. It’s going to be a tough race, and the road ahead is long. But with supporters like you, I know we have what it takes to win. I’m honored to have you by my side as we continue this fight for the American Dream. If you’re not doing so already, I hope you’ll follow me on social media to keep up with this campaign! | | | | Thank you again for everything you’ve done. We’re just getting started. Onward, Carol Obando-Derstine | = * | | = Paid for by Carol for PA Carol for PA P.O Box 83 Allentown, PA 18105 United States | | | ---|---|--- = =

Watch my announcement video to hear why I’m running — and what’s at stake for Philly.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110726924/555140534/2138918767?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2ExMmQ2ZC01NTU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SXsrWSHb95yZADGDBPfZJPGUsfFpcRn6YjZzcTd-R00=&emci=b93b64d8-e956-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=57a12d6d-5557-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15053672)
---
Peter,

Republicans in Washington are too busy looking out for themselves and their billionaire donors—while regular folks are struggling to afford the basics.

That’s not leadership. And that’s not what Philly needs right now.

I’ve spent my whole life in North Philadelphia. It’s where I’m from, it’s where I live, and it’s the community that shaped me.

For the last nine years, I’ve had the honor of representing this city in the State Senate—passing laws, building coalitions, and delivering real investments in our schools, transit, hospitals, and neighborhoods.

**Now I’m ready to take that fight to Congress.**

Watch my announcement video to hear why I’m running — and what’s at stake for Philly:
---
| | [| | |
---|---|--- ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110726933/555140548/-803653937?v=AAazWdfzWeI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2ExMmQ2ZC01NTU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SXsrWSHb95yZADGDBPfZJPGUsfFpcRn6YjZzcTd-R00=&emci=b93b64d8-e956-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=57a12d6d-5557-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15053672 "“I’m In” - Sharif Street for Congress #PA03")
I’ve always believed politics should be about people. And I’m building this campaign from the ground up— _**with you.**_

If you believe in this fight, I’m asking you to be part of it from the start. **Become a founding donor today** and help power this campaign from day one.

clean_body: Watch my announcement video to hear why I’m running — and what’s at stake for Philly.| | | Peter, Republicans in Washington are too busy looking out for themselves and their billionaire donors—while regular folks are struggling to afford the basics. That’s not leadership. And that’s not what Philly needs right now. I’ve spent my whole life in North Philadelphia. It’s where I’m from, it’s where I live, and it’s the community that shaped me. For the last nine years, I’ve had the honor of representing this city in the State Senate—passing laws, building coalitions, and delivering real investments in our schools, transit, hospitals, and neighborhoods. Now I’m ready to take that fight to Congress. Watch my announcement video to hear why I’m running — and what’s at stake for Philly: | | "“I’m In” - Sharif Street for Congress #PA03" I’ve always believed politics should be about people. And I’m building this campaign from the ground up— with you. If you believe in this fight, I’m asking you to be part of it from the start. Become a founding donor today and help power this campaign from day one. = = = = = Let’s do this—together. —Sharif | | | | | | mailto:info@streetforus.com| | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Sharif Street for Us Sharif Street for Us P.O. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8741%2E5257348%2E6qoFIL)
Hi Derek —
I wanted to reach out to thank you. For the kind birthday wishes from earlier this month. For your continued generosity. For helping our team hit our fundraising goals and continue our fight to hold Trump and his allies accountable.
I really mean it when I say I’m lucky to have this team. You’ve had my back through thick and thin, through some tough attacks and some incredible bright spots. **Your words of support and encouragement mean more to me than you could ever imagine.**
Now, our work continues. There’s a lot of important work to do in Washington, D.C., and I’m ready to continue the struggle to preserve our democracy.
Derek, I appreciate you and feel very fortunate to have your support.
With gratitude,
Adam

I just left the Senate floor after a 27-hour vote-a-rama. Republicans have passed Trump’s Big, Ugly Bill by only one vote.

**Let me be clear: This tax scam will gut our social safety net, kick millions of Americans off their health insurance and raise prices for hardworking Virginians – and for what?** _**To give tax breaks to the very wealthiest in our country.**_

If you’re as pissed off as I am at Senate Republicans, please join me in the fight to flip the Senate with a donation right now:

[_**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mw-email-250701-big-bill**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110728508/555144710/-272311645?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_BillFWD_250702_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjcyMjliZS01NjU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q9krPB40Q68Roqgiy6my32UWmcFpv7E_TzavGaegDBU=)

_Even my Republican colleagues know this bill is a political albatross._

I’m sick and tired of my friends across the aisle saying one thing to me in private then voting another way – all because they don’t have the spine to stand up to Donald Trump.

Frankly, it’s never been _more_ important we take back the Senate for Democrats. It’s clearly the only way we can put an end to Trump’s destructive policies.

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Truly grateful
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-header-2.png]

Friend — I want to say thank you.

We recently closed the books on our second fundraising quarter of the year, and your support is making a real difference for our campaign.

With MAGA super PACs already pouring dark money into our race, we are making it clear that our district is not for sale.

I can't overstate how moved, humbled, and deeply grateful I am to have you with me, friend. This will be one of the tightest and most pivotal races in the nation, and meeting these deadlines is exactly what we need to do to win.

Together, I know we can continue delivering big victories for Northern Ohio — lower healthcare and prescription drug costs, stronger environmental protections, and an economy that finally works for workers.

Thank you so much, friend. We wouldn't be here without you.

— Marcy
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-headshot.jpg]

About Marcy Kaptur
Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. She’s a voice for us all in the People’s House.

name: Triste Ordex, VoteVets
subject: A quick introduction (and an important request)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
I’m Tristeza Ordex, but you can call me Triste. I’m a Marine Corps Veteran and a former Drill Instructor, and I just came on with VoteVets as National Veterans Organizer.
#
Hey Peter!
I’m Tristeza Ordex, but you can call me Triste. I’m a Marine Corps Veteran and a former Drill Instructor, and I just came on with VoteVets as National Veterans Organizer.
You’ll hear from me when we’re looking for help, and today is one of those days.
Yesterday, the Senate passed a budget that does a ton of damage to Veterans and their families. If it becomes law, millions will lose their health care, their food stamps, and more. It’s a nightmare — but we are not powerless here.
I’m trying to find Veterans and members of Military Families who are on Medicare, Medicaid, or SNAP. I’m looking for people who might lose their jobs if this bill passes. **VoteVets wants to tell your stories.**
So, if you’re going to be impacted by Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill,” if you’re worried you might, or if you have anything you want to say to Trump and the GOP, I need to hear from you.
[**VoteVets has set up this Veterans & Military Families Tipline, and if you use this link you can submit your story. We’ll collect all responses, review them, and get back in touch if we need more. Everything will be private, and we won’t release anything without your permission.**](https://votevets.org/doge-tipline)
| [ADD YOUR STORY](https://votevets.org/doge-tipline)
---
This is important. These stories are how we’re going to take the fight to the GOP going into next year’s midterm elections.
**If you want to help us hold them accountable, please: Share your story.**
Hope to hear from you soon,
Triste
Tristeza Ordex
Marine Corps Veteran
National Veteran Organizer, VoteVets

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE
Use of military rank, job titles or photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of Defense, Departments of the Army, Navy, Air Force, or the Marines or Space Force.

Folks, The United States Postal Service is a valuable service for so many Americans. Millions of people across the country rely on the USPS to deliver everything from prescription medications to their paychecks to their voter registration or mail-in ballots. But Donald Trump and his MAGA cronies want to privatize this critical service, which will lead to higher costs for deliveries and increase delays in dropping off our packages. He's already targeted the USPS by slashing more than **_10,000 employees_** in an already understaffed agency. **Let me be blunt:** Trump's plans to privatize the Postal Service so his millionaire buddies can make a profit would only **hurt seniors, small businesses, and vote-by-mail.** **Our government should be focused on supporting the American people, not on increasing profits.** That's why my fellow Senate Democrats are fighting back against all attempts to privatize the USPS and keep their services affordable for everyone. **_[If you’re with me, will you add your name to stand with the USPS and our postal workers against Trump's MAGA plans to privatize the postal service? | Peter, Winsome Earle-Sears and Jason Miyares took the stage last night with radio host John Reid, the GOP nominee for Lt. Governor.

They squabbled for months. Now, they're teaming up._Why?_

**To bring Trump's destructive agenda to our Commonwealth.**

From ripping away our most personal freedoms and defunding our public schools to tearing apart our communities, this is the most extreme Republican ticket in America.

_We need all hands on deck to defeat them._ The super PACs who elected Trump last year are funneling money into this election, and it's critical that our side has enough resources to compete.

clean_body: Winsome Earle-Sears, John Reid, and Jason Miyares are trying to bring Trump's destructive agenda to our Commonwealth. | = | Peter, Winsome Earle-Sears and Jason Miyares took the stage last night with radio host John Reid, the GOP nominee for Lt. Governor. They squabbled for months. Now, they're teaming up.Why? To bring Trump's destructive agenda to our Commonwealth. From ripping away our most personal freedoms and defunding our public schools to tearing apart our communities, this is the most extreme Republican ticket in America. We need all hands on deck to defeat them. The super PACs who elected Trump last year are funneling money into this election, and it's critical that our side has enough resources to compete. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Let's give what we can, Spanberger for Governor HQ * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

But Democrats have completely abandoned them at the worst possible moment. Trump has begun his reign of terror. His Republicans have taken over Congress. name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Sign: “Hated the Bill”? Then Why Did You Vote YES, Senator Murkowski?
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell Senator Murkowski: "If you hated the bill, you should have had the courage to vote against it."](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6df3e01a-d41d-42db-808a-895214be3cd8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T45201880-4341-4fd2-a73d-3f146822fd0e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Senator Lisa Murkowski of Alaska could have stopped Trump's horrific bill with one vote. [If she had voted "No", it would have been defeated 51-49.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2e689a9c-0d04-4405-b211-a8f56aef3e4e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) But she voted for it, and it passed. \- Even though she told everyone how much she hated it \- Even though it was clear her vote was the pivotal one \- Even though it will be terrible for the people of her state And now all America is going to suffer, because she didn't have the guts to do the right thing. What's the point of having a vote, when you're not going to use it? [_**Tell Senator Murkowski: "If you hated the bill, you should have had the courage to vote against it."**_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T56a12169-3eaa-4bcc-9463-92f2f774d417/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---

name: Wesley Bell
subject: Thanks to you:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
Peter,

Thanks to you, we met our ambitious FEC end-of-quarter fundraising goal!

Your support, your belief in me, and your willingness to invest in a campaign grounded in justice, opportunity, and community made this possible.

I'm proud to say that we’re posting strong fundraising numbers for quarter two that reflect the true strength of this grassroots team and the momentum we’re building every single day.

But this isn’t just about dollars raised. It’s about people standing up and saying they’re ready for leadership that puts working families first, fights for safer, stronger communities, and delivers real results for folks across St. Louis.

From the bottom of my heart — _**thank you.**_

The road ahead is long, but together, I know we have what it takes to keep things moving forward.

With gratitude,

Wesley | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110731775/555154690/554393595?refcode=em25_250702_eoqty_enask_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250702_eoqty_enask_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=9841f296-5d57-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTg0MWYyOTYtNWQ1Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WTWUsmUoRMAVLFql5gd13n3xHHwROrURNzVLXuHaPOw=)

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: My dad didn’t cry about victimhood
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
I love this photo of my dad and me at my Harvard graduation.
He didn't just chase the American Dream - he passed it down. [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=63009b6e188442b4b41cbe3ad6e8eff9&_e=jJuHYVYLo9GJyQtCrgyL53iPHEAj4-wXhsj6HJoOl1XhCkVi4fqqx0_UwCdLLPAcBi2EnybPc9RC96z3ZAvotpqNn8zC3XrCGRP3lWvco2MWgYObVVehTow8DpoHKUeOKDYsMSINzr-TBHCn6f6iJqZkzVcZcbtrupbZU3RkMS15zTIXJj8h_aQqL1SUNu4htUzsnqxxwqMBB6DKtlcCzjHLRZaTCEn3KNLrNJinA5AmdC-aXDzNEx62O4L7pIMMIMoSuww8_717wOQspj_MbZ71HvPNzSy_hyrROCfTTFdheCshn1DdWvP9Y7hs_89SBRBtErMd4N5Pp9Mt_muW8V_z1hp-0vem2-9-4ORZhuEpgVyiqcMQ5VxR3Qi_qVpw4otp7Vs7tUt4d022O3VI5-XZ1wBYkSWofQbXTr8Wpda2GW8taLX81emDNk7Jw5k5RvvlnYa-BVU4NWIfBm2Ao9R_trZpcvx2c4kK4NqpqsvjIUsZA1QI1hKzjnbXpNgPeprT7hV9NrI6TL5V5SZlhVoZxmkWFA4U-Lt4Xj_bxEj_X6b2Q_KS_h-isqTmRh6ist_DarCKE9QHmriRbmHFKs5ZNiv32dP_7wj04B2pypESurio8P7s9zsRH4MZeSkJWse8XDeSL0VL6phYIbTkUxLVQKCB0tjs7Mes-Jgv-WGjbzmTQTH9EukoUCvPRjwy2LCa1mYnWpwZko0IgzqjCEL1Fr7S_k1zs527inwserX9xMWDtKaDE0iSW37kUVnQEJGfo_RVPaCT0ubs2NcvGA%3D%3D)[Now, I’m running for Governor of Ohio to honor that sacrifice and keep the dream alive for the next generation.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=63009b6e188442b4b41cbe3ad6e8eff9&_e=jJuHYVYLo9GJyQtCrgyL53iPHEAj4-wXhsj6HJoOl1XhCkVi4fqqx0_UwCdLLPAcBi2EnybPc9RC96z3ZAvotpqNn8zC3XrCGRP3lWvco2MWgYObVVehTow8DpoHKUeOKDYsMSINzr-TBHCn6f6iJqZkzVcZcbtrupbZU3RkMS15zTIXJj8h_aQqL1SUNu4htUzsnqxxwqMBB6DKtlcCzjHLRZaTCEn3KNLrNJinA5AmdC-aXDzNEx62O4L7pIMMIMoSuww8_717wOQspj_MbV0wNUHnL1jTXO-BTrZeIqrIcnADiMcpINvKktzOs4mMqDQWu9CG7jnyJ69vW88W2AXEUTLeu_T8SQezLVwH115gVHyETyWLcmRSzff04NMEZGaRfnNpsOfUfygdGGifhuHTsM1SIfUKMwbWW3dZ88qBB56RPQB1SgzPVa9hnjon1Ic9pTQhKHQlSIxoO8L1xRm5loXOIMVR-8ZBYbCHzX1I7G2Sa-kiRhw3hdHIsh2DswTTiKXZuQ2lhY8gDz5DMf4yNPAgmel79-pmxPPVMTcQcc49d_q2giILYgLpb_6MWe74ZxGDjLbkJ9v_QquWVs7z8yvzzjZznZ18qCY0PnQUyCR0QHSVNLkhSqJIHD0Tr8LJiWMMBzbn9sT3PmrrHOvaBnqw27vKDr6e2m8cMK_8EdDWnax0BOrhwgts5eUxRCDPLqisZ58Z9YmdFrXHQy7r5YbL_lb2J8w13upNNVLfuFSQJwUL_rB9YU5ry9xJ4r_nvyCanMTSq2w6BngCJg%3D%3D)
Hey, this is Vivek Ramaswamy, and I'd like to share a personal story with you.
When I was in middle school, my father got laid off from his factory job at the General Electric plant in Evendale, Ohio. He was one of the hardest workers there, but like thousands of other good men and women, he was laid off without warning.
Most people would complain, whine, and stomp their feet, saying, "It's not fair!".
But not MY dad. He didn't cry about victimhood or racism.
Instead, he picked himself up, dusted himself off, got a new job, and enrolled in night school law classes for the next four years.
But because money was tight, he and my mother couldn't afford childcare. Every day after middle school, my dad would pick me up and we'd drive for 45 minutes to the University of Kentucky across the river.
I'd sit in the back of his law school classes every night.
Most kids my age would hate the idea of spending all day at school just to go to ANOTHER school at night. But not me.
I was FASCINATED, learning about the Constitution, the principles of law, and Supreme Court decisions.
So why do I even share this story with you in the first place?
Because that time in my life taught me a lesson I've never forgotten: Every hardship is an opportunity - if you're willing to work for it.
That mindset is the foundation of my campaign.
I don't believe in a culture of victimhood. I believe in the American Dream. I believe in merit over DEI. In hard work over handouts. In family, faith, and responsibility, not grievance and blame.
Right now, we have a real opportunity to reverse Radical Leftist policies. An opportunity to show how the nuclear family is the best form of governance. An opportunity to showcase how capitalism lifts people out of poverty. An opportunity to reinstate the American Dream.
And I know that you're one of the dedicated American Patriots who believe in that vision.
That's why I need you with me, Peter.
[If you can, please consider donating $10 to my campaign for governor today. I need all the help I can get to restore the American Dream for Ohioans and Americans alike.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=63009b6e188442b4b41cbe3ad6e8eff9&_e=jJuHYVYLo9GJyQtCrgyL53iPHEAj4-wXhsj6HJoOl1XhCkVi4fqqx0_UwCdLLPAcBi2EnybPc9RC96z3ZAvotpqNn8zC3XrCGRP3lWvco2MWgYObVVehTow8DpoHKUeOKDYsMSINzr-TBHCn6f6iJqZkzVcZcbtrupbZU3RkMS15zTIXJj8h_aQqL1SUNu4htUzsnqxxwqMBB6DKtlcCzjHLRZaTCEn3KNLrNJinA5AmdC-aXDzNEx62O4L7pIMMIMoSuww8_717wOQspj_MbT-ZB39pPAwRVDJqllIz_xtFPqVZFNIHUKmvuSHKyEc7gu4z-E4uz70TzP3U-OP_WHkjhXcLopAln3Pm7nkNLwyg0d1cctx1e8QvmPWbElfdrN-lwrKnpRbR8SPk5Z1kkWGEgaAwTTfh3RDPu9DBiA-jG-9Cpr8FtKrXxs6kLW40dK2WjXiplafMXGKqEcvo9X8Ln20Js1uVkEwzgIZSLzVSbFYZGdTmFSHZqsLWFYVo37IK8j0WSXZQkwKukxRf3ZfltTiYr0FZpjB1C27dLvaEI8qYcTstjp-B_vGcN2AOO7NEefnyDKiNcEx-yA4Beir6NXmcdKJNQDfJxRLmAsm-6o-TyNk3QmDZGCDpwYpApL-hZJgpJZliUCLiZysxlq34FhF_Y_VAiVTKrSzx2iQWK-Ed3ywDJtIIDMq0L7sjx2I2kykZv35NUJhLTgqOd8QdVptnX_X38E4aAL8N8n-WROuKpSCA90lQ1G8FxeowrJ8nF-Vs7u7L8NCINnCzTw%3D%3D)
Don't let our nation turn into one full of victims. Help me turn it into one of victors, just like my dad.
Thanks for your support.
God Bless,**Vivek Ramaswamy
**

clean_body: I love this photo of my dad and me at my Harvard graduation. He didn't just chase the American Dream - he passed it down. Hey, this is Vivek Ramaswamy, and I'd like to share a personal story with you. When I was in middle school, my father got laid off from his factory job at the General Electric plant in Evendale, Ohio. He was one of the hardest workers there, but like thousands of other good men and women, he was laid off without warning. Most people would complain, whine, and stomp their feet, saying, "It's not fair!". But not MY dad. He didn't cry about victimhood or racism. Instead, he picked himself up, dusted himself off, got a new job, and enrolled in night school law classes for the next four years. But because money was tight, he and my mother couldn't afford childcare. Every day after middle school, my dad would pick me up and we'd drive for 45 minutes to the University of Kentucky across the river. I'd sit in the back of his law school classes every night. Most kids my age would hate the idea of spending all day at school just to go to ANOTHER school at night. But not me. I was FASCINATED, learning about the Constitution, the principles of law, and Supreme Court decisions. So why do I even share this story with you in the first place? Because that time in my life taught me a lesson I've never forgotten: Every hardship is an opportunity - if you're willing to work for it. That mindset is the foundation of my campaign. I don't believe in a culture of victimhood. I believe in the American Dream. I believe in merit over DEI. In hard work over handouts. In family, faith, and responsibility, not grievance and blame. Right now, we have a real opportunity to reverse Radical Leftist policies. An opportunity to show how the nuclear family is the best form of governance. An opportunity to showcase how capitalism lifts people out of poverty. An opportunity to reinstate the American Dream. And I know that you're one of the dedicated American Patriots who believe in that vision. That's why I need you with me, Peter. Don't let our nation turn into one full of victims. Help me turn it into one of victors, just like my dad. Thanks for your support. God Bless,Vivek Ramaswamy This is Vivek. I'm building a movement to make Ohio the state of American excellence -- Reviving our schools. Reclaiming our values. Restoring pride in our country. But I can't do it alone. I need your voice behind me. | | | | | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO 350 E 1st Ave Ste 100 Columbus, OH 43201

Let’s be crystal clear about what’s at stake:
🔴 16 million people stripped of healthcare.

name: Jim Jordan
subject: We’re at the inflection point
body:
It’s gametime. What happens now decides it all.

It’s gametime. What happens now decides it all.
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zt8gcdtcig6b5q83hihnml1l6slpmintqqmcmstg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5geepj2clh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
I recently shared a major update with you: The battle for the House Majority has fallen within the **_margin of error_**.
---
_Right now, we’re at the inflection point that will decide which way the toss-up falls._
---
**_Democrats are convinced that their showdown with President Trump over illegal immigration raids in blue states across America will be the key to flipping the House..._**
---
**_...And they’re BETTING IT ALL on the belief that they’re right._**
---
But just like you, I know in my heart that they’re dead WRONG.
---
Every voter I talk to absolutely stands by the President’s actions on illegal immigration.
---
_But, at the end of the day, we can cite every focus group saying we’re right until we’re blue in the face – the _ONLY_ thing that matters is the final vote tally at the ballot box._
---
**And to win at the ballot box, we need a 100% verified, up-to-date voter file. No ands, ifs, or buts about it.**
---
Friend, we’ve crunched the numbers and with our razor-thin majority now within the margin of error, YOUR voter profile is the difference maker.
---
**That’s why I’m reaching out today to simply ask that you VERIFY your GOP voter profile to give me and President Trump the most accurate polling possible as we CLOSE THE GAP on the Democrats.**
---
[**Please complete the questionnaire before the deadline TONIGHT at 11:59 P.M. to verify your voter profile. >>**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4ev1sk7s0e4slif25hdpslv2bibl5ul93m8g15g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5geepj2clh2bs)
---

---
[VERIFY NOW](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsptoqfvpedv2t4kgf9obj318b7d5vatm8798cs8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5geepj2clh2bs)
---

Thank you,
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9dqqgp4amddbcef8b97257d645jlnbo2689c3io_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5geepj2clh2bs)

name: John Hart, Open the Books
subject: Your first gift can help expose billions in waste.
body:
In the early days, when nobody else was watching the books...

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8lm2cfo6pqarregiml503fste07d2mlv37hggu0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5geepj2cth2bs)
---
Friend, In the early days, when nobody else was watching the books... When politicians laughed and bureaucrats told us, _“You’ll never get those records” ..._ **We kept going.** When we launched OpenTheBooks.com, there was no roadmap. No safety net. Just one unshakable belief:

**The American people deserve to know where their money goes.** And thanks to people like you stepping up, they’re finally starting to find out. **We can’t stop now. Not when so much is still hidden. ** [**Will you help fuel the next wave of transparency with a gift of any amount today?** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlp85p88up9tnjrshgo48qrllscat7ikm0q1gflg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5geepj2cth2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zicf0d55ccq4rhclrg66gqgkrbutl0adcsq7nls0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5geepj2cth2bs)
---
[ **Support Open The Books**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlcppqo2ouou9eh0h3ej527k3tvj179igdtsgt38_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5geepj2cth2bs)
---
You’ve probably seen the headlines: Elon Musk calling out the administrative state. DOGE showing what citizen-led audits can do. **And we’re glad to see it.** But here’s the truth, Friend: **Open the Books has been fighting this battle long before DOGE started trending,****we’ve worked alongside them,****and when they wind down their work, we’ll still be here, putting every dollar of government spending online, in real time.** Because transparency isn’t a trend. _It’s a mission._ **Our goal is simple: to open the books on every dime taxed and spent by government at every level.** Federal. State. Local. Down to the last line item. We built the largest private database of public spending in American history. We’ve filed over 100,000 FOIA requests. We’ve sued federal agencies when they tried to hide the truth. And we’ve published millions of public employee salaries, government grants, and taxpayer-funded contracts — all free, all searchable, all public. **Why? Because in a democracy, We the People have a right to know.** You’re not just part of this movement. **_You are the reason it exists._**
---
* Every document exposed.
* Every investigation launched.
* Every corrupt dollar traced to its source.

---
[ **Support The Next Investigation**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn5flt8ut3i26sb5r47ri84mfb6dbkf43tvb2ul8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5geepj2cth2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm5fu9t6sep1mkosbo1lcf51qhdm7lacboo897h0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5geepj2cth2bs)
---
It didn’t happen because of politicians. It didn’t happen because of the media. **It happened because people like you stood up and said: “Enough.”** You didn’t wait for permission. You didn’t need a title. You became a citizen auditor and made history. And now? **We’ve only just begun.** Before NASA’s DEI spending took off. Before Dr. Fauci’s net worth quietly doubled behind closed doors. We filed the lawsuits. We cracked open the databases. **We told the American people the truth, and now we need to tell even more.** [**Will you be a hero for transparency and make a generous gift of any amount to Open the Books to help us launch even more investigations into government waste, fraud, and abuse?** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z23un9hnaohmp8fprmqr6lrn5ne23h478mcp1fq0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5geepj2cth2bs)
---

The machine is bigger. Louder. More emboldened. And the truth? They’re counting on you to sit this one out.
They think you’ll stop thinking about wasteful spending. That you’ll lose hope it could ever be reined in. That you’ll stop fighting for transparency and accountability. But we know something they don’t: **You’ll never stop.** Because this is YOUR country. These are YOUR tax dollars. And it’s YOUR future at stake. **And the truth is worth fighting for.** That’s why your gift of any amount is so critical. **It fuels the oversight that only Open the Books is doing — and only people like you can make possible.** [**Friend, will you chip in today to power the next chapter of this fight?** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjdo7p1eeshg9fvk4p9dh3a2u2jtecgui7j72esg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5geepj2cth2bs)

clean_body: In the early days, when nobody else was watching the books... | | | Friend, In the early days, when nobody else was watching the books... When politicians laughed and bureaucrats told us, “You’ll never get those records” ... We kept going. When we launched OpenTheBooks.com, there was no roadmap. No safety net. Just one unshakable belief: The American people deserve to know where their money goes. And thanks to people like you stepping up, they’re finally starting to find out. We can’t stop now. Not when so much is still hidden. You’ve probably seen the headlines: Elon Musk calling out the administrative state. DOGE showing what citizen-led audits can do. And we’re glad to see it. But here’s the truth, Friend: Open the Books has been fighting this battle long before DOGE started trending,we’ve worked alongside them,and when they wind down their work, we’ll still be here, putting every dollar of government spending online, in real time. Because transparency isn’t a trend. It’s a mission. Our goal is simple: to open the books on every dime taxed and spent by government at every level. Federal. State. Local. Down to the last line item. We built the largest private database of public spending in American history. We’ve filed over 100,000 FOIA requests. We’ve sued federal agencies when they tried to hide the truth. And we’ve published millions of public employee salaries, government grants, and taxpayer-funded contracts — all free, all searchable, all public. Why? Because in a democracy, We the People have a right to know. You’re not just part of this movement. You are the reason it exists. Every document exposed. Every investigation launched. It happened because people like you stood up and said: “Enough.” You didn’t wait for permission. You didn’t need a title. You became a citizen auditor and made history. And now? name: Giffords.org
subject: We can’t let them get away with this
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

**_Alert_ :** Senate Republicans just passed Donald Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” by a 51-50 vote, which still includes a section making it easier to buy gun silencers. We must speak out.
[**The House could vote to approve the bill as soon as TODAY. Add your name to GIFFORDS’s petition right now to denounce the GOP’s “Big Beautiful Bill” and their plan to flood our communities with gun silencers.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_BBB_july2025/?t=1&akid=10648%2E3935704%2EGLkkxm)
**[ADD MY NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_BBB_july2025/?t=2&akid=10648%2E3935704%2EGLkkxm)**
Team,
Less than 24 hours ago, Donald Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill” passed the Senate by a one-vote margin. This is a serious development, and we hope you’ll let us explain why.
Donald Trump is determined to hand tax breaks to his billionaire friends, and he’s hoping to make hardworking families like you foot the bill.
If this bill is signed into law, it will rip away health care for 17 million Americans, cut food assistance for families and veterans, and take away critical mental health resources for our youth.
**But that’s not all: Hidden in this bill is a section that will make it easier to purchase gun silencers and commit violence undetected.**
Now, as the House prepares to vote on the bill, we need to make sure Republicans hear us loud and clear.
[**Will you please add your name to denounce the GOP’s “Big Beautiful Bill” right now? This is a small action, but it will show that we have overwhelming grassroots support in this fight.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_BBB_july2025/?t=3&akid=10648%2E3935704%2EGLkkxm)
**[ADD MY NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_BBB_july2025/?t=4&akid=10648%2E3935704%2EGLkkxm)**
-- The team at GIFFORDS

**Please, take a second to read this...**
Gabby Giffords has led the fight against the gun lobby for more than a decade, but she can't do it alone.
If everyone reading this donated just $17, we'd have the resources to take on the gun lobby in Congress and states across the country. But not everyone gives -- making it even more important for people who care and understand the stakes of our struggle to pitch in what they can.
If $17 seems worth it to you to change our gun laws in order to make our communities safer from gun violence, we're asking you to contribute to GIFFORDS PAC today.
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $17](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-july25.lWZeCS&amount=3&refcode=em250702-1-b&t=5&akid=10648%2E3935704%2EGLkkxm)**
---
****
| **[OTHER AMOUNT](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-july25.lWZeCS&refcode=em250702-1-b&t=6&akid=10648%2E3935704%2EGLkkxm)**
---
****

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=10648%2E3935704%2EGLkkxm) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

subject: Our civil rights are in DANGER >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |

| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5abc89ae-df69-412b-acd6-393384f04c2b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| BREAKING: "Trump turns civil rights upside down in ‘biggest rollback’ since Reconstruction" [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te2c99e48-b796-4cf4-b9dd-f606549d88a1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Trump's administration is coming for DEI, marginalized communities, and now the LGBTQ+ community! We can't let him roll back on federal protections and need to stand firm in protecting our civil rights by supporting the Equality Act! [Add your name to our petition to STAND with the Equality Act now >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T761de036-c116-40fb-b2f5-fe45527a6579/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf4561ba7-9438-40e7-b1a2-d6f3e60c5163/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Here's the current situation, Peter: FIRST: Trump wasted no time enacting his extremist right-wing agenda that includes targeting civil rights as "woke ideology." THEN: He undid DEI policies, removed people of color and marginalized communities from historical records, and rolled back on LGBTQ+ communities like protections on same-sex marriage, workplace safety, and public anti-discrimination laws! SO NOW: We've launched an emergency petition to raise support for the Equality Act, which would be a lifeline of consistent and explicit protections for LGBTQ+ people, women, people of color, and people of all faiths in spaces such as housing, credit, federally funded programs, education, and more. We can't let Trump and his MAGA administration strip away our rights because everyone deserves the right to live without fear of harassment or discrimination. [We're calling for 10,000 Top Activists to sign on to voice your support for the Equality Act 11:59 PM tonight. With less than 12 hours left, your signature is still missing! Don't delay and add your name to defend our civil rights now! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T01c833cc-b502-436f-921e-72aca308312a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T792f3133-2858-4f6b-85ff-39260ec5c836/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Ami Bera
subject: Couldn’t have done it without you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
| Hi Peter — _guess what?_

The end of the quarter is here — and I’m proud to share that we hit our fundraising goal. We couldn’t have done it without you.

Thanks to your support, we’re in a strong position to push back against Donald Trump’s extreme agenda and stay focused on what really matters: delivering for everyday Californians.

The resources we raised this quarter will help us organize, mobilize, and reach the voters we need to flip the House and restore real checks and balances in Washington.

There’s still a long road ahead — but this moment proves that grassroots energy is strong and growing. I’m grateful to have you in this fight with me.

Thank you again for all you do.

Be well,

Ami Bera

_P.S. Wishing you a wonderful 4th of July! This Independence Day, let’s honor the vision of our founding fathers by continuing to defend the democratic ideals they fought so hard to establish._
---
