name: Solar Go Fridge
subject: New Solar-Powered King of Coolers.
body:
This revolutionary fridge on wheels keeps your food and drinks ice cold...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21596/6374453/6f6055eec68d115343cdff23c53459db66dfd09b/73a764c8c9676fe86786fd16c3f78ac88ca42db0)
---
| | |
---
_July 2nd, 2025 at 08:31 PM UTC_
---
| | |
---
| | **NEW Solar-Powered
"King of Coolers"
Never Needs Ice!**
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21596/6374453/6f6055eec68d115343cdff23c53459db66dfd09b/73a764c8c9676fe86786fd16c3f78ac88ca42db0)
---
**No More Soggy Food!** This revolutionary fridge on wheels keeps your food and drinks ice cold... **But it NEVER needs ice!** It may look like an ordinary cooler, but you've never seen anything like this... Instead of ice, it uses advanced technology to keep all your important food and drinks ice cold. So you'll never have to stop for ice every couple of hours... And you'll never have to dip your hands into soggy food or gross puddles of water. And since you'll never need ice, you'll have all that precious cooler space available for MORE of your favorite food and drinks. **And it's super flexible.** This revolutionary Solar Go-Fridge is **not JUST a cooler – it's a refrigerator, freezer, and deep freezer** all in one! It can work as a fridge for hot dogs and drinks, or as a freezer for ice cream, popsicles and frozen meats... And it can even go down to subzero temperatures! **The Solar Go-Fridge
Charges For FREE With
The Power of the Sun!** Unlike other run-of-the-mill coolers, your Solar Go-Fridge... **Charges for FREE in the Sun!** Yes, you can recharge your Solar Go-Fridge using the FREE power of the sun. After all, we couldn’t call it a "Solar" Go-Fridge if it wasn't solar powered... And that's why... **You get a FREE 40-Watt Solar Panel with your Solar Go-Fridge.**
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21596/6374453/6f6055eec68d115343cdff23c53459db66dfd09b/73a764c8c9676fe86786fd16c3f78ac88ca42db0)
---

name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: A quick note from a former Navy SEAL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
I’m in this race, not because I want to impress anyone in particular, but because I believe in a life of service, and mine is just getting started. | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=18cc120ee4254ecdad8f65645e148466&_e=do0fYvvpY2D33yZhtOAuhXD1tk4LmRZ_ZE6IfEnj4a9aeSIB0tgbHbVlcYwGDLQ5hm83PQ8Z6Jsn0ycz-9zqA5EvcZxv0y3R7qGcheSY2422l6zrAmYBEnNoY8HVIIYXOoPK_jl7tN8VK1i3H2ok5XGjaXQip7Oua3qyYCgl5GDWR2DhuUf45p55Z4DJF2s6gSehk2tiAqEpHzfi5O_CUue0SFrORzDrBYcjeNRRmvWWdQKpjxzLf1GscHp6PGpo0iNOwx6835Jo20MSSzKbfpoVfvFzO-u72eR58cQ25byLtwtKMY2dDhdulk2iILrO1PCX5Awx9tIfrrj7POcmADFx8oMlrruDF2y-E7B12lmD9L54nsW5Xaef-m9auPMyL-ypQ4gmLXEnV5dYz2VpNlPKmRYs19U6TxYk665n66hkOL-lXAE9OMc6atCPaun5QBAh-hPDW4G8r98LebMP7sjK0BRk3QsXmaKZSAaRXTGhy2UPGywnsXlHvrzAFG1jq7B3Nej3F9ZWu_iluG-KB3DJ_7cbCLdqS8T9kZUXAxuVjLkAqIH47jFZVhu3rydELJvqlU950JND6dbTEu7piQo7yg9iHb0RYp7-N-3fPKn8k2yGBPWGUGvXxzlzWQY4AeRjqSOwT8tEV4NwtohuPzrvqT2DElSYMgOXlnKRViw0DMhc75kmOcNdljpAPnT1TZdwQWG0C4bqp1ckx68wbtVQmKqKVnpEATx59BBPdGd7mmNLYO6lUqhjSjewt7AYyEtJiYezsmqTaip3-02HfRJHwX1C9vWIcNEYZVwp4rI%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

I’m Adam Schwarze—former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, lifelong Minnesotan, and proud son of two working-class parents. I’ve deployed nine times to 70 countries to serve the country I love. I never expected to run for the U.S. Senate—but looking at what’s happening in our state and nation, I know I have to.

Minnesota is being led by two extreme voices: _**Governor Tim Walz and his lieutenant governor—my opponent—who is somehow even more radical than her boss.**_ While our cities burned in 2020, she led the charge against law enforcement while Walz hesitated. That’s not leadership. That’s chaos.

Meanwhile, crime has increased, small businesses have struggled, and our schools fail to teach the basics. The Minnesota I grew up in—where I learned to skate, hunt, and respect my neighbors—feels like it’s slipping away.

I joined the Marine Corps on my 18th birthday—October 2001— _**just weeks after 9/11.**_

_**I didn’t wait. I went.**_

And for the next 20+ years, I continued to serve. Not behind a desk or on cable news, but in the field—on missions that mattered, often in places you’ll never see on a map.

I don’t come from wealth or political pedigree. I come from hard work, long winters, and a deep desire to serve something bigger than myself. I earned degrees from Harvard, Johns Hopkins, and my MBA—not because I wanted to impress anyone, but because I wanted to serve better and lead smarter.

Now, I’m taking that same spirit to this campaign.
_**

[**HELP ME PROTECT THE AMERICA WE LOVE
CHIP IN $10 TODAY**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=18cc120ee4254ecdad8f65645e148466&_e=do0fYvvpY2D33yZhtOAuhXD1tk4LmRZ_ZE6IfEnj4a9aeSIB0tgbHbVlcYwGDLQ5hm83PQ8Z6Jsn0ycz-9zqA5EvcZxv0y3R7qGcheSY2422l6zrAmYBEnNoY8HVIIYXOoPK_jl7tN8VK1i3H2ok5XGjaXQip7Oua3qyYCgl5GDWR2DhuUf45p55Z4DJF2s6gSehk2tiAqEpHzfi5O_CUue0SFrORzDrBYcjeNRRmvWWdQKpjxzLf1GscHp6PGpo0iNOwx6835Jo20MSSzKbfpoVfvFzO-u72eR58cQ25bzozau0h8RuNw-zP_rFEpDnSlaWAU9Dr0oTMIsAI4K8RHCcYr2kTdr-yTTHTSG3j12j62sTUbL-luEBGIFat0yoohw0SVCPZ_Znp-2JGLVXj2SxqrFFktDnbuw8ZrtD_hKYJh3uc_B2v_AshLkjEdqhE9NQHeXMTZQxp2Wm_EZj8SucRLft6PFYF_pg1p94d5dpvaVM5zIJ1v1OJvZWf7oENXRmPyBrpl-zwvxxE3PpFqsTTpJF8jBKWjeDmVEqL1Fpj-pS9GSdbTFpg_d-m9yg9SlmrtrorVidmDtg0tiP4A-8n29te05FIz-SuHQ-eV1tPwB5hiHNnHjcTslEU_ZMIXHMpCNx4n-UvUjUbQdZJfL_QRSBFF0nMIcXTVMpGZFoaRjMHTt-jUp9u_U_6EZ0aVHqstlxbYMvgjAD-WfKI1QomGw_jltmBU6wrPulAzWFfTJkIj5kAVEOlbZP8FRl6c12L_dCVlokQHdsecPiQNCTQ7O0vSa42g7jHsteONw%3D)
**_ **_Every dollar helps build a campaign ready to fight and win._**
_
_ _[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=18cc120ee4254ecdad8f65645e148466&_e=do0fYvvpY2D33yZhtOAuhXD1tk4LmRZ_ZE6IfEnj4a9aeSIB0tgbHbVlcYwGDLQ53CT8z68LG1lAkTeMC9QeWvJ_b_zPOe-A7gb_Hd0L94PhooEFZ0SzyAswPPQMwdq8Xg7zcD7tHrLNV03ScTGHGvSzWQNAzYMgykc98_ebtJ-3Gy7jScxUQDX135707WGawkP7rjkl-2TuuXxcaMBEPNnaGJSnW8ExYWyJdiQtCtgYgvC6CT_tDLSGScs9XNBYVtyHkZPPFffqmyizJyMqgJV9Km0u3YaqPlKd2VI3vzzttB8J02OFaXjomfxOTc3CzTU3hlAPpNk4UbwXUvWsELH6yLs5Tc8-7Y9UejbFp1kuKhTM8JmzNUal2lXoRqScR2IT_Ebk1rcgSK_iK62Z6eWVJ9AnwhA9HGuSrTYVSjM10EGxhrRcguSwY-NU0o65OhlTxiM56HYhDIzohJBy5SB4Y97nDv5cdcIol9H2VsdTQfzuahlIcGplzXsTqRN1xue2A-o-Bx__ZbtT1FFzw0PaiNLvlLq9s5QSe-eiY27ZoNrFnhWZfT4bpUQXQfsYOYHVKoteGkj2jwp8pm5IEKfxznvssgPBc67QXYo0Xx77mOo3x-oZRIMkeip3wj2eEMTMS1u_g448CglTu4yJ4UXRkeMd7q37Z9OqlqGLwbP9i2bLo6E3qDuFKYNOkt8AT5HrVAEIooK3coPO8bxZzZ_0u8NeBHXeSL-1_PKzuFPpRXR-cgYGZgOSF69wObXIAchGijHhwo0DHni89OX6SrV2i1lhZiK4GhCGBtnCSCE%3D)_

This won’t be easy. Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential race since 1976, and, unfortunately, hasn’t had Republican representation in the Senate since 2009. **But I’ve always thrived in harsh environments and never backed down from a challenge worth fighting for.**

And truthfully, I’m not running because I dreamed of holding office. I’m running because every time I came home from deployment, things seemed worse—more divided, less free, and further removed from the Minnesota and America I was willing to risk my life for.

We need a new kind of leadership rooted in service, not self-interest.

**If you believe in what I’m fighting for,[even $5 goes a long way.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=18cc120ee4254ecdad8f65645e148466&_e=do0fYvvpY2D33yZhtOAuhXD1tk4LmRZ_ZE6IfEnj4a9aeSIB0tgbHbVlcYwGDLQ5hm83PQ8Z6Jsn0ycz-9zqA5EvcZxv0y3R7qGcheSY2422l6zrAmYBEnNoY8HVIIYXOoPK_jl7tN8VK1i3H2ok5XGjaXQip7Oua3qyYCgl5GDWR2DhuUf45p55Z4DJF2s6gSehk2tiAqEpHzfi5O_CUue0SFrORzDrBYcjeNRRmvWWdQKpjxzLf1GscHp6PGpo0iNOwx6835Jo20MSSzKbfpoVfvFzO-u72eR58cQ25byKdGCQw_IEEyFwJphVSv3wXLxtZk-NG9bQ8T_Ir8tXfqFB5zYcxbeirfR5jlS4uUKAk2BxXxVPdUl2eGJvm3CaSqFnEqIQZ8zgxVh5Owq7MrBXnaa8mFpy2MeycU4tPWfaN9TlUxlZqeqSAxsYJYK34mE05He9kDiv6U_yrclRrBGnlkYtKCV_GDfL-Y3tu9yAdFyD5L03pPdgOuTpA7NxrA2JRJKDwJ5VWdJWtNS0qx4sbltAEkK7c_261GIjc100iyLf6uS8RP3sAgWJ01wU4fPKWnO8Ao23owG_czmA_hG6axkWzPqLdrlhMqxNwDVTmTbinM-8n37sG9hzzF8aDGcEDmx0AuAiXgSQ0Q4fpdB-2wcq3KCW6PWOdJwYTB8YkBJk3FpdWtvyAxUt50r6y3Foptu1_6SWMN4w4GSJMbsOSqQcw7yx56GULZ-XK6JuamGTZDDfFWQlHoYD8nr_9KWfJk5d16PBA1VtLFKGp2Y5avGqe9l8jow5GkqMQSU%3D)**

If you’re not ready to donate today, that’s okay. I just want to earn your trust in the weeks and months ahead. But if you believe—like I do—that Minnesota and America deserve better, please chip in now.

Let’s take this fight to the Senate. And let’s do it together.

clean_body: I’m in this race, not because I want to impress anyone in particular, but because I believe in a life of service, and mine is just getting started. | Fellow Conservative, I’m Adam Schwarze—former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, lifelong Minnesotan, and proud son of two working-class parents. I’ve deployed nine times to 70 countries to serve the country I love. I never expected to run for the U.S. Senate—but looking at what’s happening in our state and nation, I know I have to. Minnesota is being led by two extreme voices: Governor Tim Walz and his lieutenant governor—my opponent—who is somehow even more radical than her boss. While our cities burned in 2020, she led the charge against law enforcement while Walz hesitated. That’s not leadership. That’s chaos. Meanwhile, crime has increased, small businesses have struggled, and our schools fail to teach the basics. The Minnesota I grew up in—where I learned to skate, hunt, and respect my neighbors—feels like it’s slipping away. I joined the Marine Corps on my 18th birthday—October 2001— just weeks after 9/11. I didn’t wait. I went. And for the next 20+ years, I continued to serve. Not behind a desk or on cable news, but in the field—on missions that mattered, often in places you’ll never see on a map. I don’t come from wealth or political pedigree. I come from hard work, long winters, and a deep desire to serve something bigger than myself. I earned degrees from Harvard, Johns Hopkins, and my MBA—not because I wanted to impress anyone, but because I wanted to serve better and lead smarter. Now, I’m taking that same spirit to this campaign. Every dollar helps build a campaign ready to fight and win. This won’t be easy. Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential race since 1976, and, unfortunately, hasn’t had Republican representation in the Senate since 2009. But I’ve always thrived in harsh environments and never backed down from a challenge worth fighting for. And truthfully, I’m not running because I dreamed of holding office. I’m running because every time I came home from deployment, things seemed worse—more divided, less free, and further removed from the Minnesota and America I was willing to risk my life for. We need a new kind of leadership rooted in service, not self-interest. If you believe in what I’m fighting for, If you’re not ready to donate today, that’s okay. I just want to earn your trust in the weeks and months ahead. But if you believe—like I do—that Minnesota and America deserve better, please chip in now. Let’s take this fight to the Senate. And let’s do it together. You’ve done your part for this country. In liberty Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Jim Jordan
subject: We’re at the inflection point
body:
It’s gametime. What happens now decides it all.

It’s gametime. What happens now decides it all.
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z75k8ed4ojsl7vo7lbgblrpl20rivkik0nam2i4g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5ge1oj4cjh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
I recently shared a major update with you: The battle for the House Majority has fallen within the **_margin of error_**.
---
_Right now, we’re at the inflection point that will decide which way the toss-up falls._
---
**_Democrats are convinced that their showdown with President Trump over illegal immigration raids in blue states across America will be the key to flipping the House..._**
---
**_...And they’re BETTING IT ALL on the belief that they’re right._**
---
But just like you, I know in my heart that they’re dead WRONG.
---
Every voter I talk to absolutely stands by the President’s actions on illegal immigration.
---
_But, at the end of the day, we can cite every focus group saying we’re right until we’re blue in the face – the _ONLY_ thing that matters is the final vote tally at the ballot box._
---
**And to win at the ballot box, we need a 100% verified, up-to-date voter file. No ands, ifs, or buts about it.**
---
Friend, we’ve crunched the numbers and with our razor-thin majority now within the margin of error, YOUR voter profile is the difference maker.
---
**That’s why I’m reaching out today to simply ask that you VERIFY your GOP voter profile to give me and President Trump the most accurate polling possible as we CLOSE THE GAP on the Democrats.**
---
[**Please complete the questionnaire before the deadline TONIGHT at 11:59 P.M. to verify your voter profile. >>**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6s3jd1vi7uccqs39jaitt233mm8u47hvpkui68o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5ge1oj4cjh2bs)
---

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zi0h6dvdfj7m7orr3vqs57rdj5m3o4hjtbf0tan8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5ge1oj4cjh2bs)
---
[VERIFY NOW](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4nrf2jgnhl5p0t2eihd1r53nsv7g4hleocu31s8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5ge1oj4cjh2bs)
---

Thank you,
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zftpl687b3r98p3p6vvmok4in84s6uehvvm0il20_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5ge1oj4cjh2bs)
---

body:
Peter,
I don't send messages like this often, and I'm not sharing this publicly yet.
But after receiving alarming updates from trusted sources in the region, [I’ve issued a critical alert regarding the Chinese Communist Party’s intensifying campaign against Christians.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/NEfMxwTVtIsVEpz52UocPbDUtj6TNDK9j5nsUGDloXCwn84ajvqBXsF8p4i4nOnWLqJmruI0Mwb8tRHibTViwB8WQggAlKNNNdD2za9DwoziemVatfECGOxukkT7DG8m3Ft97c7sqLakx-KaoO_RssEgjfsB5ZHQ-SOocKqx6BbzVv3pZdhZEfhu2FH_MtVnTf3tq9B8zT0msQrZnCWmfh5Xj6cvAtTnzSPO2jU0cOXLcQnvHn9uuxIVwP3suXu-KnWGqNI5kjJT4qAgsPAznpUHBasCC7Rf0bHKRn4Tw1MEVIV4UpmZd44qornaw93eBpJm6ehZ9uONvoh-EZDRQjwhiWi_JpPw2N5TEbiM0Vi0o3GnvB-3rkIGUcgw9zkId5o5yQXXBfBLVE_z57agvehMpYXTQS2vnRsgp5RlVJJDCxd29rmhxUO2OWd465tVY01rifWebUMocoa4l1Qen4G2EvN3N1nAHwi_XjM8NLm8VfUPI1Niy_VtIswIKLqlLABmZ1VxAm2hnQwcGQUhkqvl2R3bjkUHwYXw1x3DAbTuQoziZg5ZZIhgWIHWzSqLmhrxzPd4YWoFR_7SR8FicMfO1IVG95k_zUaY_XekDtzNV93uIeJ0FyyIoS8tZMpyFj2oYXb9mj8RsuVTWmte_v4tq20BRBiJs4eBlnBIVy8xKfHKWptaJk0ahUz1cikKE9HoqdCJfsMgUH00cxONm-_oaH2DcThMrvGVIbb2O5tCe9CRLzHYWOYY_AUfmYXEyuD6tKyouBkZUHUJ1Y1Gu1y1IYNW92ieGy7LazFGZRiLwnPHu8qbvLX7cA/B2oy-GxTt53wCsyLo9ZuorqJs5d7Rifz/10)

📍 In the past year alone, surveillance tech has been weaponized to track Christians, monitor sermons, and flag anyone preaching outside state control.
📍 Children are being taught to report religious family members to the government.
The CCP is now escalating this persecution -- and the world is largely silent.
I'm trusting you with this because you've always stood for liberty, truth, and faith. clean_body: This data shows what we’ve said from day one: I can unite our party, win the primary, and defeat Jon Ossoff. | JOHN KING: 45.9% | JON OSSOFF: 45.9% UNDECIDED: 8.2% Fellow Conservative, New polling shows this race is TIED. When Georgia voters hear about my story of serving as a lawman and soldier, and my record of saving taxpayer money, opposing radical transgender ideology, and supporting President Trump, they break our way. These are great numbers, but there’s no time to celebrate. Jon Ossoff, Chuck Schumer, and the rest of the Left are all seeing the same numbers we are. They'll throw everything they have to break our momentum and regain the lead. If we post a weak number, all our hard earned progress will stall out. This data shows what we’ve said from day one: I can unite our party, win the primary, and defeat Jon Ossoff. But only if we have the resources to share our message. Thank you, Maj. Gen. John King (retd.) | General John King is a soldier, lawman, and the first Hispanic elected statewide in Georgia history. He’s running for the Senate now because Georgians need a leader who will fight for them, fight for President Trump’s agenda, and put America First. | | | Paid For By John King For Senate Inc. name: Rebecca Cooke
subject: Service, decency, and getting things done.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110736124/555166300/1706257898?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmYyNDAyNi02MzU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EdBMZ_sX4yR02OwQfOwzHaUP9D8hN61TpgLqo98ENPM=&emci=a6353320-6357-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=26f24026-6357-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=5944223)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110736125/555166301/-426318973?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmYyNDAyNi02MzU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EdBMZ_sX4yR02OwQfOwzHaUP9D8hN61TpgLqo98ENPM=&emci=a6353320-6357-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=26f24026-6357-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=5944223) Peter, I wanted to give a heartfelt thank you to everyone who contributed to our second quarter fundraising deadline. Thanks to our grassroots team of supporters we raised over $300,000 in digital donations in the second quarter! And what I'm most proud of is how we did it. Over 21,000 contributions with donors giving an average donation of just $29.18. Unfortunately, yesterday’s news has soured what should be a bigger day of hope: **In a party-line vote, the Senate just passed the spending bill back to the House that will harm almost everyone who calls WI-03 home.** If passed, $1 trillion will be cut from Medicaid, a service that 150,000 of Derrick Van Orden’s constituents rely on. And in case we had hope he’d reject this awful plan, he voted to threaten this vital program’s funding the first time it came through the House -- all so he could give billionaires an even bigger tax break. Tens of millions more are set to be cut from SNAP, costing thousands of Wisconsinites the support they need to stay fed. This is the fight of our lifetime, Peter – we have to win it. This is about service, decency, and getting things done. I refuse to believe that anyone should die early because our “leaders” in D.C. refuse to fund the programs they rely on to live. And as a working-class Wisconsinite, I’m tired of us being ignored in D.C. That’s why I’m in this fight. [**Please sign my petition today DEMANDING that the House reject this partisan spending bill, and protect Medicaid and basic care for WI-03 and every working family. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110736126/555166302/-426318973?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmYyNDAyNi02MzU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EdBMZ_sX4yR02OwQfOwzHaUP9D8hN61TpgLqo98ENPM=&emci=a6353320-6357-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=26f24026-6357-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=5944223) | | **[Sign your name: Say NO to the BBB](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110736127/555166303/-426318973?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmYyNDAyNi02MzU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EdBMZ_sX4yR02OwQfOwzHaUP9D8hN61TpgLqo98ENPM=&emci=a6353320-6357-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=26f24026-6357-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=5944223)**
---
Thank you again. Today and always, I’m proud to have you on my side, Peter.
Rebecca
|
---

And as a working-class Wisconsinite, I’m tired of us being ignored in D.C. That’s why I’m in this fight. | | Thank you again. Today and always, I’m proud to have you on my side, Peter. Rebecca | = = Rebecca Cooke is a small business and nonprofit leader who has focused her career on building community and serving others. She was born and raised on an Eau Claire dairy farm and was appointed by Governor Tony Evers to the Wisconsin Economic Development Corporation. We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Cooke for Congress PO Box 1846 Eau Claire, WI 54702 United States

body:
We’re collecting stories from this community, and your voice matters.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110737054/555167701/1328794144?refcode=ea.e4e484a8-6357-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.e4e484a8-6357-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU0ZTQ4NGE4LTYzNTctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FABjz5AC-lCPOyR8KqkOidhbLGp-FqHf---C9-ekKCI=&emci=2a19b0d0-ed55-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=e4e484a8-6357-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)
---
The climate crisis touches all of us in big ways, and in quieter, more personal ways that don’t always make the news. **[So today, we’re doing things a little differently: Jane wants to hear directly from _you_ about how the climate crisis has impacted your life. Click this link to share your story >>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110737055/555167702/-2018354918?refcode=ea.e4e484a8-6357-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.e4e484a8-6357-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU0ZTQ4NGE4LTYzNTctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FABjz5AC-lCPOyR8KqkOidhbLGp-FqHf---C9-ekKCI=&emci=2a19b0d0-ed55-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=e4e484a8-6357-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)** Maybe your city recorded its hottest summer on record. Maybe you’ve had to evacuate during wildfires or a hurricane. Or maybe you feel the climate crisis through your energy bills and your growing worry every time the weather shifts from one extreme to another. **There is no right or wrong answer. Your experience is real, and your voice belongs in this movement.** We’ve created a short, open-ended survey so we can learn more about your story. Your response will directly inform how we fight for climate action and the communities on the frontlines of the climate crisis. **[Will you take one or two minutes to share your experience with us before the end of today? Jane truly values your voice — we’ll be sharing your responses with her in the next few days!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110737056/555167703/-2018354918?refcode=ea.e4e484a8-6357-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.e4e484a8-6357-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU0ZTQ4NGE4LTYzNTctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FABjz5AC-lCPOyR8KqkOidhbLGp-FqHf---C9-ekKCI=&emci=2a19b0d0-ed55-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=e4e484a8-6357-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)** | [**SHARE YOUR STORY →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110737057/555167704/-2018354918?refcode=ea.e4e484a8-6357-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.e4e484a8-6357-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU0ZTQ4NGE4LTYzNTctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FABjz5AC-lCPOyR8KqkOidhbLGp-FqHf---C9-ekKCI=&emci=2a19b0d0-ed55-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=e4e484a8-6357-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)

**Friend, Glenn Beck is desperate to get your attention on this critical matter.** **_“If I get a little emotional here, it’s because I’ve been soul searching for a long time.

About a year ago, I started receiving in my prayers a feeling that something isn’t right and I tore myself apart.... I couldn’t make sense of what this meant... It was an overwhelming feeling.”_ _

_ He’s issued a gut-wrenching warning to every Christian, Conservative, and Patriot in America.

This can’t wait, Friend,. _
_** [**_We are begging you to heed his words._**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8Fu2zAMhp-GvtmQKFlKDz60CzxgQ3vpLj0VssQkyixbkeR4efvBQZAbQX7k_9GEOPrDrQP9Bogn7zIggngFxMvXGtJyDr9_1vTr-K--qI_QblP88UCv-IQna77Gy2d4ff_zlt2H_jyPL-9X_sTLLdITfoQ2FIwft67eV64TB8dkRR3XLZda7jirTp2WB4ZCar4TTgqyanjBwRpjW2yZY6LyHTJsmWbIlVRSNWzQjCmk1gyohxZBsntOYwIlbw3PZTUpzXNo7ByqsTuVEvNdrAfsM9klUbP6KZHbCMCea63qmOYz2VJHYwH740jTQPYvSl1v9XQyy1TIxWRulHJNob6vgujTdjH56QhiX9JCgGop4btQCiD2yHZ6970mDqhMKHHOvvh5ArHnVepcXP04-qw0SHa8v7FJXzv8HwAA__-6MIfl)

name: Shontel Brown
subject: I will fight this bill with everything I have in the House.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
This bill is cruel, reckless, and just plain wrong.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110737139/555167891/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250702fight_N_SB_90DO_7_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzRjNGVlMC02MzU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zBzB6LYJhgMLJth8f2Lya8GmeWkTLAhJ2CPmxFv0Zyc=) Peter,

It’s official. Senate Republicans have voted for Trump’s Big Ugly Bill, forcing through this horrendous bill before a completely made-up deadline set by Trump.

**Senate Republicans have approved the largest ever cuts to Medicaid and SNAP in American history._Let that sink in._**

If this bill becomes law, 16 million Americans will lose their health insurance, hundreds of rural hospitals will close, and working-class people will become sicker, poorer, and more in debt. **All of this is happening so that the wealthiest Americans can get more tax breaks they don’t need.**

**This bill is cruel, reckless, and just plain wrong.**

I am appalled by the process we witnessed. Instead of listening to the people they represent, Republicans in Congress have chosen to hide from accountability. **Every lawmaker who supports this bill owes the American people an explanation – and should have to look families in the eye and justify the harm they’ve unleashed.**

**Mark my words: I will fight this bill with everything I have in the House.**

[**It’s not too late to defeat this bill, and I am ready to tap in. I will be on the House floor, fighting for you and for the future of our nation. Will you support me in standing up for our communities and holding Republicans accountable by chipping in $5 today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110737140/555167892/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250702fight_N_SB_90DO_7_NG_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzRjNGVlMC02MzU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zBzB6LYJhgMLJth8f2Lya8GmeWkTLAhJ2CPmxFv0Zyc=)

Thank you,

Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?
---

name: Blue Amp Action
subject: [10,000 signatures needed] Protect Reproductive Rights today -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbc0c09de-3691-4685-95f2-79b39a06c021/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, Last week marked three years since _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned by the Supreme Court. It's a somber reminder that women today have less reproductive freedom than previous generations, and our fight to defeat right-wing extremists' attempts to completely block this right continues. Since then, anti-choice politicians have worked diligently to restrict abortion access in **11 states** and completely ban access in **12 states**. What’s more, they've endangered the lives of women by restricting contraceptives, defunding lifesaving services, and blocking health care providers from delivering essential care. Extremist politicians won't stop until their rightwing agenda is completely in place. But the good news is, Randall, **voters are fighting back.** In 2024, we saw Missouri, Ohio, and Arizona take a stand for reproductive rights and reinstate abortion access through citizen-led ballot initiatives. Now, more states are trying to do the same — and Democrats across the country are taking a stand to defend abortion against ongoing attacks. _But we can't do this alone._ [**If you're with us in this fight, will you add your name to our petition with 10,000 Concerned Activists to protect reproductive rights and tell anti-choice politicians that we will not accept their extremist agenda?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8a1e58d3-4e49-493b-b1a7-591df6d12468/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [PROTECT REPRODUCTIVE RIGHTS NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcd25d598-b48d-4019-b86c-ef31f3d2530e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thank you for taking action, Blue Amp Action

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3a565280-89f0-48af-811f-83f30ebdf042/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Exciting News! MCPP is Making a Real Difference in Mississippi
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/bobwilliamsawardfinalist?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend, I’m thrilled to share some uplifting news with you! **The Mississippi Center for Public Policy (MCPP) has been named a finalist for the prestigious Bob Williams Award in the “Biggest Home State Win” category by the State Policy Network.**

This recognition celebrates our pivotal role in successfully advocating for the elimination of Mississippi’s income tax—a game-changer for our state!

Together with Empower Mississippi, MCPP led the charge for innovative tax triggers that paved the way for the passage of HB1, making income tax elimination a reality. This reform is already fueling economic growth, attracting major investments, and boosting Mississippi’s competitiveness. Every taxpayer in our state is reaping the benefits of this historic victory!

But our impact doesn’t stop there**. MCPP’s proven track record includes driving school funding reform, cutting red tape, advancing labor market reforms, and tackling DEI ideology through impactful legislation.** We’re moving the dial on policy and transforming ideas into real solutions that make Mississippi stronger.
---
|
---
| The winner of the Bob Williams Award will be decided at the State Policy Network’s 33rd Annual Meeting in New Orleans this August, and we’re honored to be in the running.

Thank you for your unwavering support. Together, we’re building a brighter, more prosperous future for Mississippi!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=f7f01b24c5&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---

Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Trump and the GOP's dangerous budget bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110738021/555170200/623074613?refcode=jtk1405-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmQ5MjdlZmEtNjU1Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=y2U3ugsTinE2whiiUlGaDn4dbcrYp83MqNYXK8crSnA=&emci=886e4675-4957-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=bd927efa-6557-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9329426)
---
Friend,

Trump and his minions have done it. They threatened, cajoled, promised, and made special “sweetheart deals” to force the passage of the “One Big Beautiful Bill”. They believe that if they promote it incessantly with the most flattering and flowery language, _you_ won’t actually comprehend what it says and what it does. That you cannot follow the logic or the money to know what a “Big Ugly Betrayal” it truly is.
I have too much respect for you to believe that.

Let me summarize as clearly as I can what is at stake: Coupled with Trump's draconian policies, this budget will cause massive economic pain for Americans. It harms those with student loan debt, while reversing progress created for educational opportunities.
It cuts access to healthcare, food assistance, and green energy jobs that will strengthen our economy and protect our planet.

It hurts our veterans to whom we owe so much, and turns its back on our rural communities where hospitals will close and services will wither and disappear.
While Trump and his band of sycophants are touting this legislation as some great cost-savings for the nation, the truth is that it massively increases the U.S. debt. It shells out tax cuts for the ultrawealthy who don’t need them and won’t even really notice them, while cutting everything from healthcare to food assistance for the most vulnerable in our society.
It will increase the federal deficit by at least $3.3 trillion, and reduce the amount of revenue the country collects for decades. Making the 2017 tax cuts permanent, and adding additional tax cuts – both things the Administration and Republicans want to do – will balloon the national debt to twice the size of the American economy over the next 30 years with no relief in sight.
It is truly sickening.

There is a reason the American people oppose this legislation 2 to 1. We are not fools. Clever branding, magical math, and word-smithing cannot hide the fact that this bill does nothing but put lipstick on a pig.

The last chance to stop it is upon us now as it returns to the House for final consideration. Contact members of the House and register your disapproval before their final vote. Call it what it is: One Big Ugly Betrayal. Of the trust the voters place in their elected representatives and of the American Dream.
Thank you,

Dick
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110738022/555170201/921248324?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1405-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmQ5MjdlZmEtNjU1Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=y2U3ugsTinE2whiiUlGaDn4dbcrYp83MqNYXK8crSnA=)
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/p3FPDNcG3USxiOP5q9s2qQ2?unsubscribedata=RmHJupDCVE4XDieX3UMx9ZWwI1iNXT4qYxSrDySiUQ%2B4ZwAhNaIzOtqFkyGZYCPyRMh%2BFe9iPoJq4k9rA5eJ%2Fl%2FfJJCBkdYquDfmO2dfy5Cbh13j8Ijvlm1rwTXv3NYmBlkJxGU7zS65HqZrwvG9GGCXZPcMZ%2BHBuFoTHuv7vvgTHhHPd2v%2Br3aveVbrDq0hWV6PzsQdxrIUTPoQmvXGJ5iBBN%2FBVnGBF6hW1GxQL5yWqwpEUrGvGJ9jYgaAJggqBP8iek%2FmkKrTwqp0F6yJI81A40lZ9EiUcc9SKPbqenvF8nY6a6srWJIEMsidXHxH6hx8%2F%2BForjZWR4hESF28xL95y2gEYoGS579tZ5QUFFg3%2FhD3cWDgZLEZhFVFHrIvX%2FG3Qe4qsuzTqAzPVGBOCSPcTtCcQAx4%2B7KTYBbFToN6pAsB1PnfVjx54G4GSHLu) | | Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

The last chance to stop it is upon us now as it returns to the House for final consideration. Contact members of the House and register your disapproval before their final vote. Call it what it is: One Big Ugly Betrayal. Of the trust the voters place in their elected representatives and of the American Dream. Thank you, Dick | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut Blumenthal for Connecticut 777 Summer Street Suite 302 Stamford, CT 06901-1022 United States

And your role in identifying it

# [The Power of Pretending](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=167366426&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3MzY2NDI2LCJpYXQiOjE3NTE0NzYwNTAsImV4cCI6MTc1NDA2ODA1MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.cMod9pvcX-uK2yL9hQ2Z6Rpb6hdjE5-UwkiXChKy9LM)
### And your role in identifying it
| | [Lucas Kunce](https://substack.com/@lucastyree)
---
| Jul 2
---
| [](https://substack.com/@lucastyree)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=167366426&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3MzY2NDI2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1MTQ3NjA1MCwiZXhwIjoxNzU0MDY4MDUwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTg2Nzc0MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.pXiCuPL4G2LXVA1HlPnIf9DW-fohxEIuZDx04R-7m74&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=167366426&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3MzY2NDI2LCJpYXQiOjE3NTE0NzYwNTAsImV4cCI6MTc1NDA2ODA1MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.cMod9pvcX-uK2yL9hQ2Z6Rpb6hdjE5-UwkiXChKy9LM&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=167366426&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY3MzY2NDI2LCJpYXQiOjE3NTE0NzYwNTAsImV4cCI6MTc1NDA2ODA1MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.cMod9pvcX-uK2yL9hQ2Z6Rpb6hdjE5-UwkiXChKy9LM)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/lucaskunce/p/the-power-of-pretending?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

I don't really like to write about Josh Hawley much, because I don't want to come off as being petty. But I received a couple of questions from intelligent people in [last week's ask me anything](https://substack.com/redirect/e6f6b4a8-716b-48e9-8c09-7645d085e66e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about Hawley and whether or not he would be our "savior" and stop the worst bill for working people in my lifetime.
So I thought it was important to take a moment to get real about the way these politicians are playing both us and the media, and why they are doing it.
Lucas's Substack is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9sdWNhc2t1bmNlLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.EKubT5_rbRP16zKeaps2e2yV5kgVHFDP2e7Dc0YzIaY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=167366426)
Here are two of the questions I received:
"Do you think Josh Hawley will take a stand against Medicaid cuts in the "big, beautiful, bill"?"
"Will he vote against bbb to protect healthcare for working poor, disabled and seniors in "retirement" homes?"
For background, Hawley likes to repeatedly say that the Republican Party is the party of working people (I think I'll talk about that in my next post, because it's true in many ways) and he likes to also claim that he stands for working people (which isn't true at all). He's done it numerous times through the years, the liberal media always gives him a lot of press for the words he says, and doesn't ever cover the fact that he always then turns around and votes against working people.
In the latest episode, regarding Trump's bill to pass the greatest upward transfer of wealth in history, Hawley did the TV and media rounds lamenting how the Medicaid cuts would hurt the people of Missouri and how he would do "everything in his power" to stop it (his favorite phrase in moments like this).
Liberal media ate it up and put him on a pedestal. I even saw numerous social media posts and lists with Hawley as one of our "potential saviors."
And then, like he has always done, when it came time to vote he voted to hook up the billionaire class and screw working people.
Even more impressively bold than his pre-vote talking points, he had the balls in his post-vote statement on cutting Medicaid and screwing us all for the donor class, to say that he would "continue to do everything in (his) power to reverse future cuts to Medicaid."
And, because of that and his earlier statements, people give the man credit for being pro-Medicaid _despite just voting for a historic Medicaid cut_ in order to give billionaires more money.
Doing everything in his power would include exercising his vote. In fact, that is literally the extent of his power and he didn't use it at all. He didn't even get any modifications to the bill as far as I can tell. In fact, the Senate bill that he voted for cuts $130 billion more from Medicaid than the House bill did. The bill left his hands _worse_ for Medicaid than it came in.
So why do we smart people and the media continue to fall for the BS from folks like Hawley?
Hope. They prey on the fact that you hope they are actually better than they really are. Or that they have real motivations to help other people like you do. Or that they wouldn't lie directly to your face. It's like that crush back in high school that you _just knew_ would like you if only they knew you. Except they just weren't interested. No matter how much you hoped otherwise.
Your job, and everyone else's job going forward, is twofold:
(1) Don't fall for it.
and
(2) Call it out.
Don't let them manipulate your hope or your internal disposition that there is good in everyone or that they will see the light. This isn't about good. They don't act based on goodness. It's also not about evil with them, though, which is something you should also remember.
The guys like Hawley, the Vance's and the Cruz's and the DeSantis's, all the liars and pretenders, they do what they do because they all want to be President so so so so so badly they don't and can't think or care about anything else.
The way to see through them is to look at their actions from that lens.
If you do that, you can predict their behavior 99% of the time and you won't be fooled. For example, this was my response to those questions about if Hawley would "save" us:
"Ultimately, I do not think he will vote against Trump's signature bill, no. The thing about Hawley is that the number one thing he clearly cares about is being President and all of his actions should be looked at through that lens. Which means that he will definitely spout off about this a lot and that he may even try to do some things to get the bill changed so that he can claim it in his Presidential run. But, for the same reason, if he is unsuccessful there it is very unlikely he votes against the bill because that would be bad for his Presidential ambitions in a Republican primary."
He is trying to have his cake and eat it to: carving out a lane in a future Republican presidential where he can claim to be the pro-worker candidate and scoop up all the people who like Trump and think he cares about them but otherwise wouldn't be Republicans, while at the same time not alienating other Republican primary voters or Trump himself by actually doing something real and meaningful for working people.
His goal is to combine that angle with the Christian nationalist/fundamentalist crowd and hope that that is a plurality of the primary electorate.
And every time you and the media fall for his BS on this, you help him advance that goal.
Whether that's good or bad, who knows. Maybe him being a future Republican presidential nominee (which I find unlikely given his personability problems) would be a good thing for Democrats.
But if you're going to help him advance his agenda, at least recognize that that's what's happening and that he's not real about this or any of the other things that I could list out but went over so many times in the campaign that I'd rather just move on.
And again, this isn't just about Hawley. It's about all the wanna-be presidents out there. If you want to understand them, don't look at their actions as good or evil, or them making decisions based on what's best for people or decency or anything other than what they think their route to the Presidency is.
Once you've identified that, you can understand everything they do-- and also what they won't do. If you are connected enough, maybe you can even benefit from their ambition by using it to advance your own aligned goals, I know some people who have taken that route with what I would consider mixed results.
Just remember, every time you start to believe that there is something decent there, if they have presidential ambitions, what you are seeing is ambition, not decency.
And not to piss a lot of people off, but you can apply this to politicians from both parties. Yes, with Democrats their ambition will often align with your desires, so it can work out. But then again, sometimes it still doesn't. Which you have seen with so many selling out to Wall Street, Big Tech, or the donor class over the years and failing to deliver for working people.
Lucas

clean_body: You heard right, folks:the Senate budget bill is worse than the original House version. Instead of supporting and expanding affordable, clean energy solutions, they’re punishing progress and driving up costs for hardworking Americans. They’ve added a retroactive tax on energy projects already in the pipeline — a move that could cause electricity bills to go up for families across New Mexico and the country. Martin Heinrich has been fighting for commonsense energy policies that protect your wallet and the planet, but that fight is far from over. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Heinrich HQ | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. name: Tina Kotek
subject: Investing in a better future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Peter, Every Oregonian deserves to have a safe place to call home. That’s why I’m working day and night to expand affordable housing across the state. Since my first day in office, I have championed real solutions to tackle the housing crisis head-on. By investing in affordable housing options at the state and local levels, we can make home ownership a reality and put an end to homelessness. **[I’m doing everything to move our progress forward and execute on our agenda to build a better future for Oregon. Can I count on your support today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110738946/555172896/-773863328?refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250702_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWNkZjkxYi02NjU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dQOqVrA1Qf7XR9UqCrjcd8PbOPJ0KaAR2FfvhgFWTOE=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110738948/555172898/-773863328?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250702_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWNkZjkxYi02NjU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dQOqVrA1Qf7XR9UqCrjcd8PbOPJ0KaAR2FfvhgFWTOE=)

Picture this, Peter: every working-class Oregonian having the chance to own a home, regardless of what zip code they’re in. Having a roof over your head is a stability that sets you up for success — allowing families to build the lives they dream of, reversing generational poverty, and living with dignity.
Let's roll up our sleeves and create a better future. I know we can do it with your support.
Thank you for your dedication and belief in our shared future.
Tina

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: IT NO LONGER LOOKS LIKE A PRISON!!! | Big Facelift
body:
It No Longer Looks Like A Prison! As you know, Sheridan.Church purchased a former nightclub in Tulsa, OK and we have completely remodeled the inside.
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22561708.11869.1.b71307e9306fa65c6dbee23fd8e896cc) |
---
**It No Longer Looks Like A Prison!** As you know, [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22561708.11870.1.ee8ab95c8b578368d3e3de0f6641b13d) purchased a former nightclub in Tulsa, OK and we have completely remodeled the inside. However, the outside needs a major FACELIFT! Today, windows are being installed at [Sheridan](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22561708.11871.1.861748623bf8a01bb1a525f7d3d4a474) and the Basketball/Pickleball court is being installed as well. This progress is great but...there is a lot more work to do to the outside of the building.
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22561708.11872.1.207ade0e0a08b6af5a7c6f22286ec935)
---
This picture is the end game goal of Phase 1 of our outside remodel.
Our church does the work **on a cash basis** and we are wanting to start the new facelift of the building soon and could use your help to get it done!
Please consider giving towards the new facelift by visiting: [https://sheridan.church/give/](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22561708.11873.1.18361cf7a6bdec55c75f7e567bab6805) or mailing a check to 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK 74145
**Your support will help accomplish this BIG goal!**
Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
| | [ Give Towards The Sheridan.Church Facelift ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22561708.11874.1.60a031968df97f363b707c2438c14875)
---
---
|
---
I woke up today with a really cool notification... My **FIRST** book, ["_Chasing After The Wind_ "](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22561708.11875.1.580cd3fd306f2ed301d5d04087b5f437) is out and has reached **#13 in Religion/ Christian Living / Personal Growth**! **I have been blown away by the response!** THANK YOU SO MUCH! If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22561708.11876.1.d3aa57a4d1f587c177361217f341960a)_ It is also available on [Amazon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22561708.11877.1.1cd8dd3d0119c51d5ad684f43d2b8b29)\+ [Barnes & Noble](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22561708.11878.1.d59713ea78807ca8ad7f070e082ae651). **Amazon** : [https://www.amazon.com/Chasing-After-Wind-Catching-Everybody/dp/B0F7M4GK26](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22561708.11879.1.0e49fdb91f1f14c674d87d6b4bba72c3) **Barnes & Noble**: [https://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/chasing-after-the-wind-jackson-lahmeyer/1147391019](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22561708.11880.1.d9ae6fe1ccd0e7cdfe8fe0c4c8b7fdf4) I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22561708.11881.1.566e781684c4a5d8773974fc15bf2db3) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22561708.11882.1.27549f299e51824cdb090fa58b7fb061)
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22561708.11883.1.0ef10317158668d95e7ddcd187754809)
---
Get your [LIMITED EDITION SIGNED COPY](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22561708.11884.1.f89f1541f288ddb1470af70e8d9ecab1) here: [https://books.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22561708.11885.1.2fc8c06945e17be0c6af908cdb69e2f3) Thank you,
---

---

This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced. | | Get your here: Thank you, | | ©2025 Jackson Lahmeyer | 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK | == "Web Version" == "Preferences" == "Forward" "Unsubscribe" |

name: Team McBride
subject: Complete betrayal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Time is running out to stop Trump’s Big Ugly Bill.
#
Yesterday, JD Vance cast the Senate’s tie-breaking vote to pass Trump’s Big Ugly Bill that rips away healthcare from more than 17 million Americans.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250702-1?refcode=em20250702-2150&refcode2=2150_21716_-864Xd&akid=2150%2E21716%2E-864Xd)
Now Speaker Mike Johnson is pushing to pass it in the House by July 4. That means the vote could happen at any moment.
**Sarah is voting NO, and she’s doing everything she can to kill this bill before it reaches Trump’s desk. But we need a groundswell of grassroots support TODAY to power her fight.** [**Can you rush a donation?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250702-1?refcode=em20250702-2150&refcode2=2150_21716_-864Xd&akid=2150%2E21716%2E-864Xd)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250702-1?refcode=em20250702-2150&refcode2=2150_21716_-864Xd&akid=2150%2E21716%2E-864Xd)**
This is a complete betrayal of working families. It’s among the most heartless bills that have been considered in Congress in _decades_.
It would slash food assistance, eviscerate Medicaid, and spike energy costs — all to partially fund tax breaks for billionaires. If it passes, people will die.
That’s why Sarah’s not sitting quietly while Trump and his allies play politics with people’s lives. She’s fighting tooth and nail to protect access to health care and defend working families from these draconian attacks. But she can’t do it alone.
**Time is running out, but we still have an opportunity to stop this.** [**Please chip in to help Sarah continue sounding the alarm and keep up the pressure to block Trump’s Big Ugly Bill.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250702-1?refcode=em20250702-2150&refcode2=2150_21716_-864Xd&akid=2150%2E21716%2E-864Xd)
More soon,
Team McBride
**P.S. This is an all-hands-on-deck moment. Call your member of Congress at (202) 224-3121 and urge them to vote NO.**
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250702-1&t=1&refcode2=2150_21716_-864Xd&akid=2150%2E21716%2E-864Xd)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=2150%2E21716%2E-864Xd)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=2150%2E21716%2E-864Xd)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2150%2E21716%2E-864Xd)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)

name: Christina Bohannan
subject: Good things are coming
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110739833/555175645/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjhmYzJlNy02ODU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=55beenw90N3_XtvOwkiZMbefG4n-3frG0fgK9oyrFWc=)

Hi Peter,

I woke up early this morning and before I could even look at my to-do list, I knew I had to write to you.

Because — wow! What a start we've had in this race!

When we launched this campaign just a couple weeks ago, I knew we had a big challenge ahead. We had only half the month to reach our goal of raising $50,000 from our grassroots email supporters. That’s not easy, but you really showed up and helped us crush that goal.

From the very first day, this campaign has felt different. There’s a real sense of energy here. A sense that Iowans are ready to stand up and fight for a government that actually works for them. That we are ready to replace performative politics with real problem solving and leadership that listens.

If this is what we can accomplish in just a couple of weeks, I can’t wait to see what the next few months will bring.

As excited as I am, I do know that the road ahead won’t be easy. We’re up against an entrenched incumbent and powerful Republican special interests. But I’m not in this alone — and that makes all the difference. I’m so proud to be in this fight with you.

Good things are coming.

— Christina

**[P.S. If you're able to chip in today, it would go a long way in helping us keep this momentum going into July. Together, we can build the kind of campaign that can win this seat back for Iowa:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110739834/555175646/-1612730695?refcode=em25_250702_EOQTY_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250702_EOQTY_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=228fc2e7-6857-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjhmYzJlNy02ODU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=55beenw90N3_XtvOwkiZMbefG4n-3frG0fgK9oyrFWc=)**

name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: This is really disturbing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
Again, Laura, I’m an agnostic woman who was born in Seattle and raised in Arizona. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110739925/555176041/1408057180?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250702_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2YwNDJhNC02OTU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H1Fwk3FK2KyiJdi_lIokSKsuowkbRYdAdr03bB7DnXo=) It’s disturbing how comfortable Laura is throwing racist attacks my way in an age where political violence has become normalized by right-wing extremists. It’s disturbing how comfortable right-wing members of Congress are kicking 17 million people off their health insurance. It’s disturbing how eager GOP leaders are to dismantle food assistance and Head Start programs. It’s disturbing that members across the aisle are willing to sell out our environment to Big Oil and destroy our public lands. It’s disturbing that it’s clear that Republicans don’t give a damn about everyday people and are working overtime to hand the ultra-rich another tax cut at the expense of working families. **[There are a lot of disturbing things about this political moment, Peter, but my fight for the people of Arizona isn’t one of them. clean_body: | Again, Laura, I’m an agnostic woman who was born in Seattle and raised in Arizona. = It’s disturbing how comfortable Laura is throwing racist attacks my way in an age where political violence has become normalized by right-wing extremists. It’s disturbing how comfortable right-wing members of Congress are kicking 17 million people off their health insurance. It’s disturbing how eager GOP leaders are to dismantle food assistance and Head Start programs. It’s disturbing that members across the aisle are willing to sell out our environment to Big Oil and destroy our public lands. It’s disturbing that it’s clear that Republicans don’t give a damn about everyday people and are working overtime to hand the ultra-rich another tax cut at the expense of working families. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for standing with us. — Yassamin Ansari Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I’m now forced to say it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
........................

........................
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbhiklrn0np8mf9d92p0n9f8gs13vt4hb3epquo8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5ie8o74cjh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
All of my life, those closest to me – and even those who only knew me from politics – have known me to be a _helper_.
---
I helped take down the mob in New York...
---
I helped unify our city and our country as America’s mayor after tragedy struck on September 11th...
---
I helped keep our streets and our citizens safe... **
---
And I helped successfully defend President Trump from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable.
---
Those were the headlines that defined me to so many Americans like _YOU_.
---
But over the last year, I’ve instead woken up in the mornings to headlines like these:
---

**_“Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...”_**
_[MSNBC]_

**_“Giuliani bankruptcy case dismissed, opening door to creditors pursuing collection”_**
_[CNBC]_

**_“Giuliani Disbarred from the Practice of Law in New York” _**
_[New York Times]_

---
**And sadly, as I stare down the Democrats’ _FINAL_ sham indictment against me, I am now the one forced to ask _you_ to help _me_. **
---
That’s truly something I NEVER wanted to have to say, Friend...
---
_Asking for help as opposed to offering it unsettles me to my core._
---
But I hope you understand that you truly are my FINAL HOPE.
---
_**Right now in Arizona, the Democrat Attorney General is seeking to use a _state-level_ charge that President Trump cannot pardon in order to throw me in prison until I’m 100 years old!** _
---
My crime? Refusing to forsake the TRUTH and standing by the side of my dear friend and our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump.
---
_And the punishment the Left wants in return? My personal, professional, and financial ruin along with me taking my last breath in a prison cell!_
---
Make no mistake, if we can’t beat this sham case here and now, if we fail to secure true justice and my ultimate vindication, then this scheme of the Left’s can be used against every last red-blooded patriot as the Deep State’s bulletproof measure to TAKE DOWN their political enemies.
---
And the _ONLY_ way to defeat a regime like the Deep State is to **NEVER,_EVER_ SURRENDER** to it.
---
_...Just ask President Trump!_
---
The Democrats unjustly filed my MUGSHOT under **booking # 2313757.**
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9sqeqrl8gbn4ccg72d1l1nm7241d3mri3oprakg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5ie8o74cjh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj79rkmep7ac9jkorrbdt2eloj9td76iqn3d5k6eqbb8piekqj2dtlmmhjasth6mjm9p1mcgoj6d1nkth60ohgctge4cb4sti66d1kchjqfpbhemrtcd1lm1q39dpjmnh60oj5c1im4oj040g2cop5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr8d5hmcin2tdnqprrasjm6kqu4lqnq89iasblmvb3fcthekpr2tf0ag92bs)
__
---
_So, to show these left-wing crooks that good and honest Americans like _YOU_ will also never surrender as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise **$231,375.70** for my Legal Defense Trust to win this last fight for my freedom and justice. _
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me WIN the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice against the Deep State as they attempt to JAIL me for the rest of my life in Arizona.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zd6q399v2257n0567nf612raplika4icb5r2unro_rp22sh2s8i6epb4c5ie8o74cjh2bs)
---

__
---

name: Stand with Gov. Newsom! (via VPP)
subject: Newsom fights back >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
... But MAGA Republicans are FURIOUS!
| Folks, Gavin Newsom continues to fight back against MAGA extremism: [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91651?t=6&akid=20480%2E878179%2ETtxYVM) We’re THRILLED he’s so bravely standing up to Trump — but MAGA Republicans are FURIOUS, _and attacking him relentlessly._

[**We’re rounding up urgent signatures to stand with Gavin Newsom in the face of MAGA attacks — Please: Add your name to stand with Governor Gavin Newsom! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91651?t=7&akid=20480%2E878179%2ETtxYVM) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91651?t=8&akid=20480%2E878179%2ETtxYVM)
---
TO: Governor Gavin Newsom
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. Dear Governor Newsom,

_Thank you so much for standing up for what’s right — even when it’s unpopular and makes you a target for MAGA extremists!_

**MAGA Republicans are already furious with you, but you are showing them you won’t back down. We need more heroes like you!**

Republicans are plotting to END Social Security and Medicaid, DESTROY the federal government, and make Trump an untouchable KING — but you’re working tirelessly to stop them, and we’re so grateful.

**I know that Trump has put a MASSIVE target on your back — so it means the world that you refuse to step down and let them get away with this.**

I’m doing everything in my power to protect Democrats like you who are brave enough to face Trump head-on and risk MAGA revenge.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91651?t=9&akid=20480%2E878179%2ETtxYVM) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91651?t=10&akid=20480%2E878179%2ETtxYVM)
---
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91651?t=11&akid=20480%2E878179%2ETtxYVM)
**_X A proud Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20480%2E878179%2ETtxYVM). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20480%2E878179%2ETtxYVM).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20480%2E878179%2ETtxYVM) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=20480%2E878179%2ETtxYVM). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20480%2E878179%2ETtxYVM)

body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

It’s official – the results are in and Zohran Mamdani just won the
Democratic nomination for NYC Mayor with overwhelming grassroots
backing!!!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32357?source=email-20250702&t=1011&akid=8958%2E5885482%2EGsGEwz ]Headline: Zohran Mamdani Wins N.Y.C. Mayoral Primary in Decisive
12-Point Victory

It should be a time to celebrate – but instead of honoring democracy,
powerful forces – both Republicans and members of the Democratic
establishment – are teaming up to sabotage his candidacy.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32357?source=email-20250702&t=1012&akid=8958%2E5885482%2EGsGEwz ]Right now, it’s the Oligarchs vs. Mamdani. And together we’re going to
come together to stand with Mamdani, defend our democracy, and tell the
Democratic establishment to back Zohran Mamdani as the official Democratic
nominee NOW!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32357?source=email-20250702&t=1013&akid=8958%2E5885482%2EGsGEwz ]ADD YOUR NAME

Trump knows that Mamdani’s victory is a threat to his Oligarchy, and so
he’s coming out swinging. Alarmingly, his administration just escalated
his political warfare by publicly raising the threat of stripping Mamdani
of his US citizenship – an outrageous authoritarian tactic that should
send chills down ALL our spines.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32357?source=email-20250702&t=1014&akid=8958%2E5885482%2EGsGEwz ]Headline: Trump administration raises possibility of stripping Mamdani
of US citizenship

The fact is MAGA extremists, billionaires, and powerful Democratic
insiders alike see Mamdani’s bold progressive vision as a threat to their
entrenched power and corporate-backed agenda. So they're spreading
misinformation, stoking fear, and quietly enabling dangerous attacks.

We CANNOT let our democracy be undermined by elites frightened of true
progressive change.

That’s why it’s critical, right now, for Our Revolution supporters
nationwide to speak out loud and clear and FORCE the Democratic
establishment to remember that democracy means respecting voters’ choices,
even when party bosses don’t like them.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32357?source=email-20250702&t=1015&akid=8958%2E5885482%2EGsGEwz ]Click here now to call on the Democratic establishment to stand by
democracy and fully stand up to Trump’s attacks and support Zohran Mamdani
for Mayor of New York City.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32357?source=email-20250702&t=1016&akid=8958%2E5885482%2EGsGEwz ]ADD YOUR NAME

When we organize, we win.

The Our Revolution Team

| We’ve wrapped up yet another quarter, so I wanted to reach out to say how grateful I am to have supporters like you in my corner.

This campaign has never been about me. It’s about protecting the values we share, from reproductive freedom to affordable health care, and making sure Congress works for all of us, not just the wealthy and well-connected.

The stakes of this race are becoming clear. With powerful national Republicans targeting Michigan, we need to be prepared for anything that comes our way.

I’m so proud of what we’ve built so far, and with your continued support, I know we’ll hold this seat again in 2026 – and help deliver a House majority that works for everyone.

With gratitude,

body:
Correct me if I'm wrong... But it feels like every time you turn on the TV, hop online, or scroll through the headlines, there are SCORES of news stories of Liberal activists burning our flag, attacking cops, or rioting in support of lunatics who hate this country. I don't know about you but it makes me sick to my stomach and worried for America. The country we know and love is under threat right now by a Liberal Mob that knows no bounds. Let us explain the gravity of this situation:

**Medicaid insures 72 million people – 1 in 5 Americans –** typically low-income and often disabled.

Experts estimate that these cuts could lead to more than _51,000_ preventable deaths every year.

**Republicans in Congress are trying to take health care away from the most vulnerable people** _so they can give more in tax cuts to the ultra-rich._

It’s cruel, unacceptable, and we refuse to let it stand. New Dems are fighting back these cuts in Congress aggressively but we need a huge surge of people-power to overpower the MAGA caucus.

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: My situation is in your hands, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
clean_body: I’m counting on you right now My situation is in your hands, Peter. I’m writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. Look – this is from the bottom of my heart, so please read this message to the end. My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia’s highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I’ve been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I’m running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we’ve been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. But right now I have a few SERIOUS challenges: I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has been fundraising BIG TIME while I’ve been working hard in our capital. Seriously, a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger’s campaign coffers and there wasn’t a thing I could do in response! Now Spanberger has an ENORMOUS fundraising advantage, Peter. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. If we don’t make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism! I wouldn’t ask you to stay in this fight if I didn’t think it was worth it. And Peter, I know we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. you can’t afford to keep fighting for the future of our Commonwealth, our children, and our nation, am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving! Ever Forward,Lt. Governor Winsome Sears Immigrant Marine First black female Lt. Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _
