She has a storied history of outwardly hating America as a U.S. Congresswoman, and her recent comments are the straw that broke the camel's back. Here's just a couple of examples of what I'm talking about: "[America is] now turned into one of the worst countries." \- Ilhan Omar, June 2025 "While I am in Congress, no one will take Somalia's sea." - Ilhan Omar, January 2024 Congresswoman Omar, if you hate America so much, you are more than welcome to leave. If you think America is one of the worst countries in the world, and if your priority as a Representative for Americans is to protect Somalia's seas, then it's time for you to head back to Somalia, where you apparently belong. I did the legwork myself. It 'll cost $1,783 for a one-way trip to Somalia. | Flights are getting booked quickly. Thank you, Coach Tuberville Meet Coach Tuberville: Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces. In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud. In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others. In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime. Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC PO Box 43124 Birmingham, AL 35243 Copyright (C) 2025 Tuberville for Governor, Inc, All rights reserved.

name: Sean Feucht
subject: The Mainstream Media's Attacking Me — AGAIN!
body:
The Atlantic Headline: "We Want God Writing the Laws of the Land"| | |
---
| | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=03c6a4e8ad7b4e68971c8fa820e179ce&_e=VLhZIP4YKDmFfWmQzu_m4GwaMEu0ebXgm7v-4FrvTBRE1gwa0yko8jhAx2fYHXzvsLWo5PjA61-4bcbF0JOlSTMU3T4zKu6G4uCGDqpqk8n6UGOLlPOFGcZSYC7NI-AwQap_5K2L4NmjpbwJ0svc0-02ACw3B5Gp1T_FWEK49g3Kdm1_eyyhMktMNP7GrviiwVdr6KSmMn8MGJ-4CxKgqbd5HRjCzKfRnu_iygahEWsZhU7-WKh02iGuOsFosCM20YpTECKbFnSae55rwgI4TKpkZy5MMCNps5qmFTJeu9Gmi80NCQusLG644zT1mJW1CI24NoZffG_teFbe1nbVUm_74jsbSeuWu9o-eFPctlgNEpbKm71F-AtQtIOt0AApOYRjuPOh7bAGHXumVcnftHyX7qCdtYy70RPseMUrCFqWF6KM6_MHBc1IFODodO2pewKEiAg6I_Kz59ue_mnxmA%3D%3D)
---
Dear Peter,
---
The world hates me. This week, they launched another broadside attack—and they’ve been doing this for _years_**.** The media has tried to silence me, cancel me, and shame me, while governments have fined me, threatened to jail me, and slandered me. I’m used to it, and I’m not fazed. Why? Because to be a follower of Christ is to be persecuted. Jesus lays it out in John 15:19: _“_ If you belonged to the world, it would love you as its own. As it is, you do not belong to the world, but I have chosen you out of the world. _That is why the world hates you.”_
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=03c6a4e8ad7b4e68971c8fa820e179ce&_e=VLhZIP4YKDmFfWmQzu_m4GwaMEu0ebXgm7v-4FrvTBRE1gwa0yko8jhAx2fYHXzvsLWo5PjA61-4bcbF0JOlSTMU3T4zKu6G4uCGDqpqk8n6UGOLlPOFGcZSYC7NI-AwQap_5K2L4NmjpbwJ0svc0-02ACw3B5Gp1T_FWEK49g02WBjjTa_Rcf9Q-U5EXanaPbsAqVjlngzHAVx-SDWTX677oe9eqOLOWmJ3GodV4jz4vV4HYVMVZlgV2RtworZe7fk1l8yuovKfLmWrP-hB8UpqJ-Jqhqey0D1hibobHTGQuIlFx1Gauqz0PiZrqTi6pFjKb5lZo5U4ejBeXOTN9Nxo2zhgeJqJkKFgM6U_rpzmilHkIMmjTEVJAlzfxkQJCnnLOstgKnnTOAzU3eCVzS_K6RR2-L-NrF-j_w4aG2WnqQI2bwLycLUhTjORC9pD_czT5U8ou8WxVKLD5fxnEw%3D%3D)
---
| | _Anyone_ who pushes the Gospel is a threat—because the Gospel has the power to bring life. It undermines the power structures of this world. Those of us who bend the knee to Christ will not worship the idols the world promotes. Any attempt to expand the Kingdom of God on earth is met with swift and total retribution. But we’re not scared, and we’re not backing down. To be attacked for the sake of the Gospel is to walk in the footsteps of Christ—and we will continue to follow!
---
| | [ **SUPPORT LET US WORSHIP >>>** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=03c6a4e8ad7b4e68971c8fa820e179ce&_e=VLhZIP4YKDmFfWmQzu_m4GwaMEu0ebXgm7v-4FrvTBRE1gwa0yko8jhAx2fYHXzvsLWo5PjA61-4bcbF0JOlSTMU3T4zKu6G4uCGDqpqk8n6UGOLlPOFGcZSYC7NI-AwQap_5K2L4NmjpbwJ0svc0-02ACw3B5Gp1T_FWEK49g0lLtq6Cr-Cfgs3WqCmVcwrVYUA1LuYmc2w-eOXZBwr9fiTeU4phJcH0nHHUnTrnUg-HG8EctD0o9yndBVfM_4yW81ihit2AwKxe9B29S9Zbv20qi8ewwqSCfO90RZHIhZQWeHb-Raj5NtXk7kQ96wTkl1OuwBQIq0vDBxF_xk_2ZzkzxSaHcYO3ksowPi34XK66qOf3oNobSHjJIL1UTDFEfG9dvaC6wgPsRb_MJOy3DQ11c4GalEcMKpw_PS2xsMNHuZ_wFiL6Lrl0unx5NlfGyyHt6cvJSW8oX3DPuWOFw%3D%3D)
---
Till all hear,
---
---
Sean

name: Team Jones
subject: Urgent: Republicans are dropping six figures to attack Jay’s record!
body:

name: Kelly Morrison
subject: My take on the Republicans’ so-called “One Big Beautiful Bill”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morrison for Congress
body:
https://kellyforcongress.org [https://kellyforcongress.org]
Hi Peter,
Kelly Morrison here and I am outraged. I flew back to Washington D.C. at 4:30 a.m. yesterday to introduce amendments to try to improve Trump’s ridiculously named “One Big, Beautiful Bill Act.” Peter, this bill will take away health care from 17 million Americans, gut food assistance, force hospitals to close, raise energy prices for families across the country, explode the national debt, and will hurt all of us, but especially our most vulnerable. And why? To pay for tax cuts for the wealthiest among us. Meanwhile, the consequences for everyday Americans will be catastrophic.
Peter, as a doctor, I’ve seen first hand how critical it is for people to have access to health care. The slogan of our first campaign was ‘For a Healthy, Thriving Minnesota,” and that ethic continues to drive me. I’m more determined than ever to protect Minnesotans and all Americans from these devastating cuts.
Right now, we need everyone to speak out. Talk to your neighbors, friends, and family. Urge them to contact their representatives. I’m committed to doing everything I can to stop this bill and I know you are too. We are in this together.
Thank you so much for your continued support, Peter.
With gratitude and resolve,
Kelly Morrison
https://www.facebook.com/KellyMorrisonForCongress [https://www.facebook.com/KellyMorrisonForCongress] https://twitter.com/Morrison4MN [https://twitter.com/Morrison4MN] https://instagram.com/kellymorrisonforcongress [https://instagram.com/kellymorrisonforcongress] kellyforcongress.org [kellyforcongress.org]
I've spent most of my career as a doctor, not a politician, and I believe we need leaders who are focused on delivering results for Minnesota families. I'm not taking a cent of corporate PAC or federal lobbyist money , so I'm counting on folks like your giving what they can, when they can. Will you chip in whatever you can today?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?refcode2=emailfooter]
Email is the best way to keep our supporters up to date.
If you only want to receive our most important emails, click here to receive fewer emails. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/hHyPtKcXyUeK_xcY7BEsAQ2]
We’d hate to see you go, but if you want you can unsubscribe here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/4Dh5T9ni_kaWmPt-auzpZw2?unsubscribedata=Tvw%2B%2FywvxKGIun7bU9vlamKu5SN8Rk9xH7uB1BXrIF4HruXwcY%2Fga%2BDDHa436bA62DDZZU%2BZz5oI5l5Eu%2FcysV6uxj6i%2BJJc9ftuYVLZLZluH5tBRIM5m31%2FFS4pR%2BQpqUab7rv5ImAn371vowyWpCe%2FE%2FPcrdryAOHGgQ4MV5I2%2Bk%2BUyuZHL5lAyBiCxVh5xYXah29TL7mTlnKraYgTeegjRV7ARW5SIJqa7QvcJuABl1VwN0prs16Nec9zZpdt3uG%2BNOTeur3j7%2FkD%2BD6L421tBECSCwvhbIVTorIYz2g4Fa8QcqfBfreCrialC3MOIqzfWRAtL%2BP75hFalMJoW03rEFPHDdf5DUTdnvc3XSqm1muFukDhqapALI8SU4emjJPgXf%2Bm9%2FZmy5WJQjQa7p1u2%2FVc2D2UmuQAePfDHRpGW229M43L28ZuHK2KCRzZ] .

name: Forward Party
subject: Fast Forward - Curriculum Follow Up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It was a big week at Forward - here's what you missed.

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_71&n=1)
---
Wednesday, July 02, 2025 | Peter -- Continuing our Education theme in our renamed series _**Forward Thinking**_ , we focused this past week on the curriculum we teach in our schools. What are the most important subjects that our children should be learning, given the rapidly expanding nature of our technological world? Here's what you had to say. On X: On Facebook: On Threads: On LinkedIn: What may be surprising to some given the laser focus the media places on the role of AI in our economy and, thus, our education system, across the board, you supported a focus on core competencies (the three Rs), as well as life skills. For the latter, things like sticking to a budget and paying taxes; changing your oil; cooking for yourself and meal planning; and home repair were mentioned as valuable, tangible life skills. If anything, we've seen these cut out of our curriculum over the past decades. Tech skills were a distant third on all platforms, and professional certifications earned almost no votes across all of our channels. On top of the high-level poll answer, many of you sounded off in the comments with some interesting ideas: **Individualized Learning and Support**
* Just like last week, the most common thread by far was a call for individualized attention to be paid to each student. Parents want a less standardized, more personalized education for their students. These comments suggest that you would view AI and technology (as well as teacher support) as a means to achieving academic goals through a traditional curriculum, rather than something on which the curriculum itself should focus.

**A Re-Emphasis on Core Competencies**
* Many of you called for a re-focusing of our education system on reading, writing, and arithmetic, claiming that digital tools and their usage were overshadowing fundamental skills needed to succeed in everyday life. According to responses, digital tools should be used to enhance skills people have learned rather than replacing the development of those skills.

**Inclusion of Critical Thinking, the Arts, and Civic Literacy**
* Outside of core competencies, there was a call for an increase of emphasis on critical thinking skills, artistic pursuits, and a foundational understanding of our government and how it functions.

**[Building a New Political Path: Bob Perls and the Forward Party’s Mission in New Mexico](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=1l4Ft3q0DvtDjfhjK0JR6ueVwHnav9rkZdzfebTEMiycTqT1C8g5Dh2UhgXJfUlebzADmbM75BCLAJnw5fB1r5CSa0gzNQt7xC9p8QupHi45sYZa8byItOp4twrLY8vmbI6RHkGHR6Oxa6P4GKOGMsUG_U4AezauAQEFaSYvB_rcZ7Di-bo8SZpD3vr1bde-&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_71&n=2)** | **New Mexico Sun** New Mexico State Chair Bob Perls breaks down why the time is right for a new political party in New Mexico and outlines his perspective, as a former state legislator, as to what Forward can fix about our politics. **[Forward Thinking: Third Parties& The Future of North Carolina Politics](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEouH4SjeZmYtvTWulgNFAfbl3duKKHVA2VbGw72dhMK2&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_71&n=3)** | **The Hometown Holler** Patrick Newton, State Chair of the North Carolina Forward Party, joins the Hometown Holler Podcast to discuss all things Forward in NC. They talk about what makes a native North Carolinian, how the Forward Party is growing, and what North Carolina will look like when the Party is successful.
**July 3 | Civic Engagement with the Young Forwardists
** Join the Young Forwardists team at 7:00 PM EST/4:00 PM PST for an exclusive Civic Engagement opportunity! As our political divisions continue to grow, it's up to every student at every high school and college to lead the charge toward change, starting with local ordinance and political engagement! **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/civic_engagement_20250703?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_71&n=4)** **July 4 | Utah FWD Marches In The 4th Of July Parade!
** The Utah Forward Party is marching in the 4th of July Parade in Murray UT! Want to be part of the fun? Register at the link here, come out in your red, white, and bluest outfit, and share your patriotic spirit! **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=4h2u19b4cTAhgCD-RT-MfucisWAapKTztiYbrCzE4E0H8vAL74biL4qnpOiRSSoaDV9AM8rK4IURD5b_RXSQTQ&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_71&n=5)** **July 4 | New Mexico FWD Marches In The 4th Of July Parade!
** The New Mexico Forward Party is marching in the Corrales Fourth of July Parade! Join the crew or meet them afterwards at La Entrada Park. They'll be gathering for the march at Wagner Farm at 9 am. **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=tDEwGNGHOBcCTmA-YTRRrlkmPxUSZMSteKYtAPIdGw8bhr7AzWbVYMmKYJSPV56BRT4vocSpSfQEG0uc9ujQxA&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_71&n=6)** **July 8 | Forward Introduction Training with the Young Forwardists
** Training #1 of the Young Forwardists’ _Politics: LIVE_ Training Series. Please check our Events Calendar to attend our other Trainings! Join the Young Forwardists team on Tuesday, July 8th, at 2:00 PM EST/11:00 AM PST to learn more about the Forward Party and the Young Forwardists. **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/fwdintroductiontraining?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_71&n=7)** **July 8 | National Volunteer Call
** Please join our director of volunteer engagement Carrie Anne on the second Tuesday of every month at 7:30pm ET for all things Forward Party! Meet other volunteers, hear what's happening in the committees and other states, and stay abreast of party news. **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/national_volunteer_call_20250708?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_71&n=8)** **July 13 | Shaping New Jersey’s Future: Governor Whitman Meets Young Policy Leaders
** Former NJ Governor and Forward Party Co-Founder, Christine Todd Whitman, will deliver **a 30-minute address and Q &A session** with student fellows. She will share her insights regarding the statewide policy process, tips and tricks for writing policy, her experience governing New Jersey, and how she would approach New Jersey’s issues today through policy. **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/governor_whitman_civic_engagement_initiative?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_71&n=9)**
**[Utah’s new Democratic strategy isn’t new enough. Let’s try something different.](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=bFgHPJC2qbzXh_VTsyZga2WI1VZlGBZrRfBy82tDXBoi4UKy62JUhK1XUnfcN-JPhRmOOs9WJMsSPm7HN1q07BVG97OgpgTd1FkgJa-9-w3QPZhDGo6Jkan9ucdzndC-&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_71&n=10)** | **The Salt Lake Tribune** **[Andrew Yang on Starting a New Political Party& the Rise of AI](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEouH4SjeZmYtvTWulgNFAfbgBcMs20WvbkMHgO0T7xap&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_71&n=11)** | **Lemon Drop**

clean_body: It was a big week at Forward - here's what you missed. | | Wednesday, July 02, 2025 | Peter -- Continuing our Education theme in our renamed series Forward Thinking , we focused this past week on the curriculum we teach in our schools. What are the most important subjects that our children should be learning, given the rapidly expanding nature of our technological world? Here's what you had to say. On X: On Facebook: On Threads: On LinkedIn: What may be surprising to some given the laser focus the media places on the role of AI in our economy and, thus, our education system, across the board, you supported a focus on core competencies (the three Rs), as well as life skills. For the latter, things like sticking to a budget and paying taxes; changing your oil; cooking for yourself and meal planning; and home repair were mentioned as valuable, tangible life skills. If anything, we've seen these cut out of our curriculum over the past decades. Tech skills were a distant third on all platforms, and professional certifications earned almost no votes across all of our channels. On top of the high-level poll answer, many of you sounded off in the comments with some interesting ideas: Individualized Learning and Support Just like last week, the most common thread by far was a call for individualized attention to be paid to each student. Parents want a less standardized, more personalized education for their students. These comments suggest that you would view AI and technology (as well as teacher support) as a means to achieving academic goals through a traditional curriculum, rather than something on which the curriculum itself should focus. A Re-Emphasis on Core Competencies Many of you called for a re-focusing of our education system on reading, writing, and arithmetic, claiming that digital tools and their usage were overshadowing fundamental skills needed to succeed in everyday life. According to responses, digital tools should be used to enhance skills people have learned rather than replacing the development of those skills. Inclusion of Critical Thinking, the Arts, and Civic Literacy Outside of core competencies, there was a call for an increase of emphasis on critical thinking skills, artistic pursuits, and a foundational understanding of our government and how it functions. | New Mexico Sun New Mexico State Chair Bob Perls breaks down why the time is right for a new political party in New Mexico and outlines his perspective, as a former state legislator, as to what Forward can fix about our politics. | The Hometown Holler Patrick Newton, State Chair of the North Carolina Forward Party, joins the Hometown Holler Podcast to discuss all things Forward in NC. subject: Do you think we need a national vote-by-mail system?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=lTpLGfIdNlqOtYufEnUWieHnPAhz6oPDz3DhE6xYVTELsDj9+4aM7s17i1+aZnuE86hWxgLQPMBA8AI2P4J0Li+GRDujqb6LrxRQ6sJLMII=]
You are invited to join our one-click response poll.
For data integrity purposes, please do not complete this survey if your email address is not dpwillis67@gmail.com .
Mail-in balloting has been proven safe and secure after broad utilization in the last three elections. Opponents of voting rights are still working to restrict it to protect their own power in states across the country, but a solution has been proposed: A national vote-by-mail law passed by Congress.
We want to know your feelings on the topic. Will you take our one-question poll below?
Team: Are you in favor of a federal vote-by-mail law that allows for mail-in voting nationwide?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.everyaction.com/WI7XQsH6D0Kn6HzC8Tsadw2?am=20.00&contactdata=lTpLGfIdNlqOtYufEnUWieHnPAhz6oPDz3DhE6xYVTELsDj9+4aM7s17i1+aZnuE86hWxgLQPMBA8AI2P4J0Li+GRDujqb6LrxRQ6sJLMII=] NO [https://secure.everyaction.com/WI7XQsH6D0Kn6HzC8Tsadw2?am=20.00&contactdata=lTpLGfIdNlqOtYufEnUWieHnPAhz6oPDz3DhE6xYVTELsDj9+4aM7s17i1+aZnuE86hWxgLQPMBA8AI2P4J0Li+GRDujqb6LrxRQ6sJLMII=]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.

clean_body: Voter Action Project [=] You are invited to join our one-click response poll. For data integrity purposes, please do not complete this survey if your email address is not dpwillis67@gmail.com . Mail-in balloting has been proven safe and secure after broad utilization in the last three elections. Opponents of voting rights are still working to restrict it to protect their own power in states across the country, but a solution has been proposed: A national vote-by-mail law passed by Congress. We want to know your feelings on the topic. Will you take our one-question poll below? Team: Are you in favor of a federal vote-by-mail law that allows for mail-in voting nationwide? By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded: YES [=] NO [=] = [=] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. name: Rob Bonta
subject: NEW: Dismantling a violent criminal street gang
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642]
body:
[ https://act.robbonta.com/go/4?refcode=em250702&t=1001&akid=1858%2E1088799%2Er8Xyp9 ]Rob Bonta

Last week I announced the dismantling of a
violent criminal street gang in the Central Valley — a major step forward
in our statewide effort to shut down organized crime and keep our
communities safe.

This takedown was the result of a months-long, multi-agency investigation.
We removed dangerous individuals from our streets, seized illegal firearms
and drugs, and stopped violent crimes before they could happen.

I’m incredibly proud of what we accomplished — this is how we make a real
impact on public safety. And it sends a clear message: If you engage in
violent criminal activity in California, you will be held accountable.

As Attorney General, I will never stop fighting for every Californian’s
right to live free from violence, fear, and intimidation.

Families in the Central Valley can rest a little easier today. But there’s
more work to do, and I need your help to keep it going.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250702?refcode=em20250702-1858&refcode2=1858_1088799_r8Xyp9&akid=1858%2E1088799%2Er8Xyp9 ]I don’t have much time to fundraise, so my re-election campaign relies
on grassroots donations. If you’re able, I hope you’ll pitch in to help
power this work:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250702?refcode=em20250702-1858&amount=5&refcode2=1858_1088799_r8Xyp9&akid=1858%2E1088799%2Er8Xyp9 ]Donate $5 »

I’m grateful to our partners in law enforcement who made this possible,
and to you, for standing with me.

Thank you,

Rob

clean_body: [ ]Rob Bonta Last week I announced the dismantling of a violent criminal street gang in the Central Valley — a major step forward in our statewide effort to shut down organized crime and keep our communities safe. This takedown was the result of a months-long, multi-agency investigation. We removed dangerous individuals from our streets, seized illegal firearms and drugs, and stopped violent crimes before they could happen. I’m incredibly proud of what we accomplished — this is how we make a real impact on public safety. And it sends a clear message: If you engage in violent criminal activity in California, you will be held accountable. As Attorney General, I will never stop fighting for every Californian’s right to live free from violence, fear, and intimidation. Families in the Central Valley can rest a little easier today. But there’s more work to do, and I need your help to keep it going. [ ]I don’t have much time to fundraise, so my re-election campaign relies on grassroots donations. If you’re able, I hope you’ll pitch in to help power this work: [ ]Donate $5 » I’m grateful to our partners in law enforcement who made this possible, and to you, for standing with me. Thank you, Rob

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110744195/555189704/1527952032?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzMzNDYxMzEtNzE1Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bxo3Fj_bKaN_FlpY5l-fspcu_tpliVAnJ5sVISfz4eo=)
Friend, I want to sincerely thank you for your support in these critical last few weeks. With your help, we hit our end-of-quarter deadline and are starting the summer strong. **But I’m afraid our celebration was short-lived – because Senate Republicans just passed Trump’s so-called “Big Beautiful Bill.”** It’s a disastrous mega-budget package directly tied to Trump’s agenda. I proudly voted NO in the House, along with every Democrat, but the MAGA majority rammed it through – and it’s facing a final House vote in a matter of days. Here’s why you should be worried. This bill: _\- Strips healthcare from millions.
\- Puts rural hospitals at risk.
\- Guts critical programs and priorities.
\- Showers tax breaks on the wealthy – and balloons the national debt._ Bottom line: Trump’s bill is a disaster. It’s an attack on our community and our values. It rewards the wealthy and well-connected, while punishing everyday people who just want to live with dignity. **[That’s why I’m asking you to sign my petition to demand Congress reject this harmful bill and protect our healthcare. When we work together, we WILL send a message that voters are watching and we will hold the MAGA GOP accountable.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110744197/555189707/251691891?refcode=em-7.2.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzMzNDYxMzEtNzE1Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bxo3Fj_bKaN_FlpY5l-fspcu_tpliVAnJ5sVISfz4eo=&emci=d1b7102b-7157-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=33346131-7157-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=27336212)**

clean_body: | = Friend, I want to sincerely thank you for your support in these critical last few weeks. With your help, we hit our end-of-quarter deadline and are starting the summer strong. But I’m afraid our celebration was short-lived – because Senate Republicans just passed Trump’s so-called “Big Beautiful Bill.” It’s a disastrous mega-budget package directly tied to Trump’s agenda. I proudly voted NO in the House, along with every Democrat, but the MAGA majority rammed it through – and it’s facing a final House vote in a matter of days. Here’s why you should be worried. This bill: \- Strips healthcare from millions. \- Puts rural hospitals at risk. \- Guts critical programs and priorities. \- Showers tax breaks on the wealthy – and balloons the national debt. Bottom line: Trump’s bill is a disaster. It’s an attack on our community and our values. It rewards the wealthy and well-connected, while punishing everyday people who just want to live with dignity. | I’m grateful to have you on this team. Thank you, -Derek | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. Derek Tran is a veteran, consumer rights attorney, and Member of Congress representing California's 45th District. To support Derek's campaign = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Derek Tran for Congress 10441 Stanford Avenue #395 Garden Grove, CA 92842 United States

name: Colin Allred
subject: I'm officially running for Senate in Texas to finish what we started.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Now, let me explain why.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91107?refcode=em20250702-9081&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9081%2E614464%2EO8Xydf)
Peter, allow me to reintroduce myself: My name is Colin Allred.
I'm a fourth-generation Texan, former NFL player, civil rights lawyer, Dad, and former Dallas Congressman. As of today, I am officially running to be Texas' next U.S. Senator.
**[If that's all you need to hear, please split a donation right now between my campaign and Heartland Patriots to help me raise $1 million in the first few days of my campaign.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91107?refcode=em20250702-9081&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9081%2E614464%2EO8Xydf)**
**[DONATE →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91107?refcode=em20250702-9081&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9081%2E614464%2EO8Xydf)**
Peter, **I am running** to finish what we started two years ago – a historic grassroots movement that came within striking distance of flipping Texas.
**I am running** because Donald Trump and Senate Republicans have failed Texans and the American people with their extreme partisanship, broken promises, and policies that prioritize massive tax cuts for the wealthy at the expense of working people.
**I am running** because the GOP frontrunner – Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton – has spent years trying to throw women’s doctors in jail for providing abortion care and is so corrupt the Texas House even voted to impeach him.
And finally, **I am running because I know we can win.** In fact, the Republicans’ own polling shows me in the lead!
**But I also know that winning will take an unprecedented groundswell of grassroots support – starting now with our $1 million launch goal.**
With those resources, we can build the campaign infrastructure we need to reach voters in every corner of our state, hire staff and train volunteers, and fight back against the millions of dollars Republicans will spend to defeat me.
**[That's why I'm personally asking you to chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can spare today to me and Heartland Patriots to help me kick off this Senate campaign. Please, will you rush your support now to help us get off to the strong start we need to bring real leadership back to Texas?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91107?refcode=em20250702-9081&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9081%2E614464%2EO8Xydf)**
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Colin Allred and Heartland Patriots will go through immediately:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91108?refcode=em20250702-9081&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=9081%2E614464%2EO8Xydf) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91108?refcode=em20250702-9081&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=9081%2E614464%2EO8Xydf) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91108?refcode=em20250702-9081&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=9081%2E614464%2EO8Xydf) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91108?refcode=em20250702-9081&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=9081%2E614464%2EO8Xydf) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91108?refcode=em20250702-9081&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=9081%2E614464%2EO8Xydf) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91108?refcode=em20250702-9081&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=9081%2E614464%2EO8Xydf) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/91107?refcode=em20250702-9081&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=9081%2E614464%2EO8Xydf)

Thank you so much for any help you can send during this critical moment for our campaign. We have a long, tough road ahead, but together, I truly believe we can win and create a better Texas for everyone.
Let's go!
Colin Allred

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: Republicans are making a choice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
The moment is here, Peter: We’re just days away from Donald Trump’s July 4th deadline for Republicans to send their “Big, Beautiful Bill” to his desk. As Republicans try to ram this bill through before Trump’s deadline, they’re doing more than just taking a vote on a piece of legislation. They’re making a choice to prioritize billionaires and the wealthiest Americans over hardworking families. **The truth is that there’s nothing beautiful about this bill — _unless_ you’re a billionaire. ** While they will receive a massive tax break, the rest of us will be left to deal with the consequences of the largest cut to Medicaid in U.S. history, significant cuts to food assistance, and the addition of trillions of dollars to the national deficit. I’m fighting as hard as I can to protect all Americans from the harms this bill will cause, and I’m also laser-focused on helping elect Democrats to the Senate in 2026 who will deliver for everyday Americans instead of billionaires. **[Republicans have made their choice clear, Peter, which means we need to fight back. name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Judicial Watch Sues for FBI Records on Biden Lawfare Scheme to Prosecute and Jail Trump
body:
Judicial Watch announced it filed a Freedom of Information Act
(FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice for records
about the Federal Bureau of Investigation’s (FBI) investigation of
Donald Trump codenamed “Arctic Frost,” which was part of an
unprecedented effort by the Biden administration to prosecute and jail
President Trump for disputing Biden’s controversial election
victory.

[alt_text]

[*****]
July 02, 2025

[image]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75029&L=32849&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoYm9vay5jb20/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=37f62b24c7452afd31dcbb4564b05665a0ab1404fb3b89b270ceb52cc53353ce]

RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL

_"When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to
know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial
Watch"_ - SEAN HANNITY

Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the

name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: Have you answered your call to duty?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
This isn’t about politics. It’s about the survival of common sense. | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3567217610a843fe9d633776fe2082f5&_e=AUHXKusHL13NP1Ylul92NC5D4QwvpX4TKcqGSnPcZC0ma-4hHMVDvDFdVAyLGp21UgkV0TPtFJzi2bw8Ns17svk94XMGOebmNLSExv9xKJJYmfx7-Wn5BkSVj-6-0VHUzcobmvKBqJ21hxKkMKqXW3qixyqJ4nFFGpLgrCnYRI3UfI47l2C6x0w8omu1-_d-SOdk-HuPfQIpGaAWTi-Y5xmRU6giGQWxTSAUwrAwJ-80K4_pJKbQx6gKJZIQzUk5m1lk5mcQPciXrKxa2vNar_KKLmU4yhE8Usc_6_iCfczpQJAfAPaZpjecoBJMDNUevHw3bwyO4ZJ7oKTan_bHCOdg-JfGmzNNGXdly-dOGVVY20sIFn1NM36Jz3vURUz3gFyJVZI49xDolo08Auhn5M9loyhIuWZitbp54z7DP-SC9BwkNBjFvjdudbpT-VgUS8PjAoA6OjyLbMw9mkO_nHagyV6TjyWcSOR2kaRacUBWFc1g7ZRb-IMSpUrBkX21CAGEqGM7j9RRwEDTXsBqGD9B-kU18lZKw-BgsXW0xVW7p8rQ9J_FZqx3G8Zn4tSYpzaG8MOL6GNipaQ9as6jqVQ2_ds4d15LCoFVGSDFCcbokrF__gsFqFBzTynnlpQvcdjVTQe1uGXjwmJycCLuU_D0-kQpUL3YuiYJZrHCMnu9XTGdo4TN3VLqoDJb9_-pHbT6qUM2_LaPpGu4q_3Huj0rlsu7pbHZiekv5zT4DmHsg67Vs45zlWorSvNHFwYZzcxkOssZ-RPOCx3rS7pBMkROUh8zYMwF_ILz4thK-ZSn3BGOZ5IDSi5x5vbG5SXh)

---
Peter,

I’m Adam Schwarze—former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, lifelong Minnesotan, and proud son of two working-class parents. I’ve deployed nine times to 70 countries to serve the country I love. I never expected to run for the U.S. Senate—but looking at what’s happening in our state and nation, I know I have to.

Minnesota is being led by two extreme voices: _**Governor Tim Walz and his lieutenant governor—my opponent—who is somehow even more radical than her boss.**_ While our cities burned in 2020, she led the charge against law enforcement while Walz hesitated. That’s not leadership. That’s chaos.

Meanwhile, crime has increased, small businesses have struggled, and our schools fail to teach the basics. The Minnesota I grew up in—where I learned to skate, hunt, and respect my neighbors—feels like it’s slipping away.

I joined the Marine Corps on my 18th birthday—October 2001— _**just weeks after 9/11.**_

_**I didn’t wait. I went.**_

And for the next 20+ years, I continued to serve. Not behind a desk or on cable news, but in the field—on missions that mattered, often in places you’ll never see on a map.

I don’t come from wealth or political pedigree. I come from hard work, long winters, and a deep desire to serve something bigger than myself. I earned degrees from Harvard, Johns Hopkins, and my MBA—not because I wanted to impress anyone, but because I wanted to serve better and lead smarter.

Now, I’m taking that same spirit to this campaign.
_**

[**HELP ME PROTECT THE AMERICA WE LOVE
CHIP IN $10 TODAY**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3567217610a843fe9d633776fe2082f5&_e=AUHXKusHL13NP1Ylul92NC5D4QwvpX4TKcqGSnPcZC0ma-4hHMVDvDFdVAyLGp21UgkV0TPtFJzi2bw8Ns17svk94XMGOebmNLSExv9xKJJYmfx7-Wn5BkSVj-6-0VHUzcobmvKBqJ21hxKkMKqXW3qixyqJ4nFFGpLgrCnYRI3UfI47l2C6x0w8omu1-_d-SOdk-HuPfQIpGaAWTi-Y5xmRU6giGQWxTSAUwrAwJ-80K4_pJKbQx6gKJZIQzUk5m1lk5mcQPciXrKxa2vNar_KKLmU4yhE8Usc_6_iCfcw0MwXY5O3AqMQHO1WQkRH9kjr8l_pgQNSwdsM6aIqsemzeiC7icb3JmcmbDhcx_VZPanWWuUX70_gJBRLjku9LnLiVwz-9VUa_poMJiw3dqd_7QDF2-ns-s_-3SXqzyjjCOFLJtFg1sV9SU8tes-Thuwnqq1xSOcZnoaA570mIQebzDhmL7gmBPx2h3dGwe3XrdmYOQ8ir-j9iA0X0E-BmFZTOC3fN9c0OupQlNdunUARRNifX0CadI0CtM1lpCyLCk8x2duDvIFirpY3I274fNzNi_wXOKTCShzwyn-oHjZAUdRlGY2o5qEva3JYRU2eQ9qsy36hpkjI6rlbaR71h_-P1Rfh9dyQXh1k_kUVPdf1devAnqno1ThTwB9VwT6C7It8pTX_umk-iM7yLi10ibQ4qwrjLB1LZUQb-Fqke7USUUw18BFBQw6zg1rA_bUqE_mlzUCHaVw6dPP8_2rh0hFMt4KOYLtZBZfIiztkndDlgZQfpev3BW5eDPGXFdIPe7hGK-BWFkt5zkqvRpybb)
**_ **_Every dollar helps build a campaign ready to fight and win._**

This won’t be easy. Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential race since 1976, and, unfortunately, hasn’t had Republican representation in the Senate since 2009. **But I’ve always thrived in harsh environments and never backed down from a challenge worth fighting for.**

And truthfully, I’m not running because I dreamed of holding office. I’m running because every time I came home from deployment, things seemed worse—more divided, less free, and further removed from the Minnesota and America I was willing to risk my life for.

We need a new kind of leadership rooted in service, not self-interest.

**If you believe in what I’m fighting for,[even $5 goes a long way.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3567217610a843fe9d633776fe2082f5&_e=AUHXKusHL13NP1Ylul92NC5D4QwvpX4TKcqGSnPcZC0ma-4hHMVDvDFdVAyLGp21UgkV0TPtFJzi2bw8Ns17svk94XMGOebmNLSExv9xKJJYmfx7-Wn5BkSVj-6-0VHUzcobmvKBqJ21hxKkMKqXW3qixyqJ4nFFGpLgrCnYRI3UfI47l2C6x0w8omu1-_d-SOdk-HuPfQIpGaAWTi-Y5xmRU6giGQWxTSAUwrAwJ-80K4_pJKbQx6gKJZIQzUk5m1lk5mcQPciXrKxa2vNar_KKLmU4yhE8Usc_6_iCfcy9RHaCBro1XrLOMRDA5RA4XewBrK1fmbH2yVioXtDagxwU_jgc6DRa6Bxv9OsEeqRYOIxmn-RsMDe5uo8khJ7VLM7ZipFBibi8RdAEZU-nyTuMH9e4zXPe-oEn-rGREwRjMrvNNAAOR8SgL4tty4vEVvjh7MeGss-Q7ytUrCAdpP9Hh-jK8uhPUPw-gvwc7F-3TvJRsEeslfbPbBWIgyTjGRp9HH-jTSVJvdVzJHSRGF8GTZIw4U_XYIVbG7JTEPHZN2hwyLKLGQRuKIpedPNJME56dUwqrAOEMUFSZMIWtliUIqkFGE5vh95B69FQcVwW-s93B1kK5Hw2PaBObVWg1cAKfVVH_yPyT5Yhr4oU9UOiYftkyxsOpNEG5QjnWa3J40_j1YfFzHXAADR6iZhApZSy30V8RcbSLOgwbBbyAAa992o5o4xmHAyI78mq1l7ymWMYHBBCoFsTeyf9yFvX4Ikd-Z8ePr9QnPW4bf_DS5Kb0HkyxOGQVXWGhV0mk81WnTpA1S6hwsHn8wCov8qY)**

If you’re not ready to donate today, that’s okay. I just want to earn your trust in the weeks and months ahead. But if you believe—like I do—that Minnesota and America deserve better, please chip in now.

Let’s take this fight to the Senate. And let’s do it together.

**You’ve done your part for this country.[Let me do mine—will you donate $15 to help?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3567217610a843fe9d633776fe2082f5&_e=AUHXKusHL13NP1Ylul92NC5D4QwvpX4TKcqGSnPcZC0ma-4hHMVDvDFdVAyLGp21UgkV0TPtFJzi2bw8Ns17svk94XMGOebmNLSExv9xKJJYmfx7-Wn5BkSVj-6-0VHUzcobmvKBqJ21hxKkMKqXW3qixyqJ4nFFGpLgrCnYRI3UfI47l2C6x0w8omu1-_d-SOdk-HuPfQIpGaAWTi-Y5xmRU6giGQWxTSAUwrAwJ-80K4_pJKbQx6gKJZIQzUk5m1lk5mcQPciXrKxa2vNar_KKLmU4yhE8Usc_6_iCfcw4nZAF_ioqPSFJWeZZBMgWE1XUZnmKXIUKc0LHLCbYxFWglEVl7MTz27m3IfDnhkD0MeyPD9aDsIURjV78yiB6JQl-Wf50EHBwx3VyZLHFXPOA-dZRN-SxzDrsx0tHzWL0jWX0opLhheHMyq0ZuVxb_JDbZtQcVajpI5ZyQDzFJJHHWwx7tjGDg3uS2bWxipJLTFHqRZYh6-Rxz7fJOyAn6-11zbFSktR1W3fHY7tQ3piEsnvpgabHVb2HIGuo5hOpTg34aq0y9pIpVWt9dCT316-sV1ImW2Hc4dw2TCoSBNnGrJpZVmRjbIDIoymtOxq4CsAwK4SUBJ8TeCdEioM_bmox7p44D4-4qdmCOU-pJsj1t_EcTGH0xduuC2liY45Rs0M4_a9VFyrk_V47H-ORZGdm3yjAs8-7KEua7VIM8f6O_siA9dBtLFE4SY4oS1rMA70ZSU1XRJDI4ulOAZuE5GWAfJJnZbTMXFXdYP8kA_MO14zf982bfjiKY-wKUCipB2gQEoDm79BFQrLeKfBl)**

clean_body: This isn’t about politics. It’s about the survival of common sense. | Peter, I’m Adam Schwarze—former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, lifelong Minnesotan, and proud son of two working-class parents. I’ve deployed nine times to 70 countries to serve the country I love. I never expected to run for the U.S. Senate—but looking at what’s happening in our state and nation, I know I have to. Minnesota is being led by two extreme voices: Governor Tim Walz and his lieutenant governor—my opponent—who is somehow even more radical than her boss. While our cities burned in 2020, she led the charge against law enforcement while Walz hesitated. That’s not leadership. That’s chaos. Meanwhile, crime has increased, small businesses have struggled, and our schools fail to teach the basics. The Minnesota I grew up in—where I learned to skate, hunt, and respect my neighbors—feels like it’s slipping away. I joined the Marine Corps on my 18th birthday—October 2001— just weeks after 9/11. I didn’t wait. I went. And for the next 20+ years, I continued to serve. Not behind a desk or on cable news, but in the field—on missions that mattered, often in places you’ll never see on a map. I don’t come from wealth or political pedigree. I come from hard work, long winters, and a deep desire to serve something bigger than myself. I earned degrees from Harvard, Johns Hopkins, and my MBA—not because I wanted to impress anyone, but because I wanted to serve better and lead smarter. Now, I’m taking that same spirit to this campaign. Every dollar helps build a campaign ready to fight and win. This won’t be easy. Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican in a presidential race since 1976, and, unfortunately, hasn’t had Republican representation in the Senate since 2009. But I’ve always thrived in harsh environments and never backed down from a challenge worth fighting for. And truthfully, I’m not running because I dreamed of holding office. I’m running because every time I came home from deployment, things seemed worse—more divided, less free, and further removed from the Minnesota and America I was willing to risk my life for. We need a new kind of leadership rooted in service, not self-interest. If you believe in what I’m fighting for, If you’re not ready to donate today, that’s okay. I just want to earn your trust in the weeks and months ahead. But if you believe—like I do—that Minnesota and America deserve better, please chip in now. Let’s take this fight to the Senate. And let’s do it together. You’ve done your part for this country. In liberty Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

body:
We want to invite you to our next Resistance Lab training on Sunday, July 13.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250702-5204-footer&t=1&akid=5204%2E420207%2EYEnQu7)
Peter,
With Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans in Congress doubling down on their authoritarian, billionaire-first agenda in the Big Bad Betrayal Bill — _which the House could be voting on in the next twenty four hours_ — we need to step up our efforts to push back.
**👉 As part of that effort, we want to invite you to our next Resistance Lab training on Sunday, July 13.**
[](https://www.mobilize.us/pramilaforcongress/event/805374?utm_source=em20250702-5204)
**[RSVP Now](https://www.mobilize.us/pramilaforcongress/event/805374?utm_source=em20250702-5204)**
These trainings were developed specifically for this moment, incorporating interactive conversation with others to help create community and build our resistance movement all over the country.
Together, we’ll learn how to take on authoritarianism, protect our democracy, and build the kind of organized, people-powered movement we need to win — no matter what Trump and his allies throw at us.
**You’ll come away with practical tools for nonviolent resistance, deep organizing, and rapid response tactics that have worked in other countries facing similar threats.**
[**Click here to join us virtually on July 13th, and let’s show Trump and MAGA Republicans that we’re ready, united, and unafraid.**](https://www.mobilize.us/pramilaforcongress/event/805374?utm_source=em20250702-5204)
**[RSVP Now](https://www.mobilize.us/pramilaforcongress/event/805374?utm_source=em20250702-5204)**
In solidarity,
Team Pramila

name: Sen. Patty Murray
subject: One big, ugly betrayal of working Americans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
It's unconscionable. / This would be the the single largest transfer of wealth from the poor to the rich in the history of our country.
| | |
---
Peter – this is just sick.

Republicans in the Senate have passed the single largest transfer of wealth from the poor to the rich in the history of our country.
The sad truth is that they've opted to sell out the people who elected them, all to find room in the budget for Trump's top priority: **handing out TRILLIONS in tax cuts to billionaires like himself.**

All the while, basic math shows this bill will _still_ send the deficit skyrocketing by trillions**** more – _s_ _o much for "rooting out waste, fraud, and abuse."_

But Republicans just don’t care. Whatever Donald Trump wants comes first.
So before I tell you just how bad it is, I want you to know that I _do_ care – **[and if you do too, Peter, the best way to help me fight back against the full extent of harm they have in store for us is by building a surge of grassroots momentum to show that folks are fired up to _fire them_.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110745271/555192920/-1711732667?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk522-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWRmYTkzZC03MzU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FEcWoCL06Ee4CKtw774s1jNR3SHS3s3xYkj2IeP_im4=)**
**Bottom line: The budget bill will deliver the largest-ever cuts to Medicaid and food assistance to fund Trump's pro-billionaire Project 2025 agenda.**

By sabotaging the ACA, barring Medicaid defunding Planned Parenthood clinics, and blocking access in webs of red tape, 17 million people are projected to LOSE health insurance: Meaning everyone's health premiums will rise, rural hospitals and clinics will close, nursing homes will kick seniors out, and preventable deaths will go up.
And as already-sky-high prices and the threat of Trump's tariffs force families to make sacrifices at the grocery store, **my GOP colleagues are content to let millions of people in America, including children and veterans, go hungry.**
Look – when my dad got sick with MS and lost his job, we didn't have an income for the few months it took my mom to focus on skills training before she could find work. Food stamps helped put food on the table for me and my six siblings until she did.

That's why I cannot – _I will not_ – stand by as they cut off lifelines for families struggling to make ends meet, to then cut a check to the richest people on Earth.
**Peter, a surge of grassroots support to hit our $30,000 rapid-response goal would be cold, hard proof that we're FED UP with the GOP selling us out to stroke Trump's ego and line his pockets. **
[Will you chip in now to help me make sure MAGA Republicans get the message LOUD and CLEAR – that they can kiss their jobs goodbye for passing this big, ugly betrayal of a bill?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110745272/555192921/-1711732667?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk522-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWRmYTkzZC03MzU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FEcWoCL06Ee4CKtw774s1jNR3SHS3s3xYkj2IeP_im4=)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your_ __ _donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110745273/555192922/-1711732667?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk522-fr-nd&recurring=0&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWRmYTkzZC03MzU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FEcWoCL06Ee4CKtw774s1jNR3SHS3s3xYkj2IeP_im4=)

name: Lee Johnson
subject: Social Security is Under Threat—I'll Protect It
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio House Democratic Campaign Committee, 545 E Town St
body:
|
---
Friend, Congressional Republicans have openly discussed slashing Social Security—calling it an “entitlement” our country can no longer afford. **Let me be clear: That is wrong.** Social Security isn’t a handout. It’s a promise. It’s something every working American pays into with every paycheck, with the understanding that when the time comes, that support will be there. For millions of seniors across South Carolina and this country, Social Security is the difference between stability and poverty. Americans have spent their lives working hard—building our economy, raising families, serving our communities. _**They deserve to retire with dignity, not fear.**_ Meanwhile, Lindsey Graham and his allies are more focused on protecting tax breaks for the wealthy than protecting your benefits. That’s the difference in this race. I’m not here to tear down the safety nets our families rely on. I’m here to strengthen them. If you believe—as I do—that Social Security must be protected, then **I need your help.** [**By donating $20 today, split with Ohio House Dems, you help build a campaign that will fight back against cuts, stand up for our seniors, and ensure that every American gets the benefits they've earned through a lifetime of hard work.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110745559/555193858/-1003770560?refcode=250702_Johnson_SS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjAzZTBlYy03MzU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K_qTKOvNHTNQiCmKTZqfhLHc0mGmIoDgKuWSS_z05Zo=) | | [**$10 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110745565/555193877/-2097233708?amount=10&refcode=250702_Johnson_SS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjAzZTBlYy03MzU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K_qTKOvNHTNQiCmKTZqfhLHc0mGmIoDgKuWSS_z05Zo= "https://secure.actblue.com/")

clean_body: | Friend, Congressional Republicans have openly discussed slashing Social Security—calling it an “entitlement” our country can no longer afford. Let me be clear: That is wrong. Social Security isn’t a handout. It’s a promise. It’s something every working American pays into with every paycheck, with the understanding that when the time comes, that support will be there. For millions of seniors across South Carolina and this country, Social Security is the difference between stability and poverty. Americans have spent their lives working hard—building our economy, raising families, serving our communities. They deserve to retire with dignity, not fear. Meanwhile, Lindsey Graham and his allies are more focused on protecting tax breaks for the wealthy than protecting your benefits. That’s the difference in this race. I’m not here to tear down the safety nets our families rely on. I’m here to strengthen them. If you believe—as I do—that Social Security must be protected, then I need your help. = | | = "" | = "" | = "" | = "" Let’s stand together and defend the dignity every American deserves in retirement. Gratefully, Lee Johnson Candidate for U.S. Senate = = = OHDC 340 E. name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: What I’m doing to stop Trump’s so-called “Big Beautiful Bill”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki for Congress
body:
Friend,

I’m sounding the alarm about Trump’s so-called “Big Beautiful Bill.” While it passed the Senate by a razor-thin margin yesterday, it now returns to the House for a final vote.

I am fighting this with everything I have. As it stands, this bill, if signed into law, would be the largest wealth redistribution from the working class to the rich in history – giving billionaires huge tax breaks while stripping vital programs including Medicaid and SNAP from those who need it most.

Here’s what I’m doing from my position in the House to stop it:

- I’ve introduced an amendment to the bill to stop in its tracks if its passage results in workforce reductions, lost job opportunities, or impacts collective bargaining rights.

- I’ve signed onto amendments that would undo the worst elements of this bill – including protections for Medicaid and SNAP, community health centers, quality programs for students, a robust Child Tax Credit, and Clean Energy Tax Credits.

I won’t stop until this bill works for struggling families, not against them. You can bet that it makes me a Republican target.

If you’re with me, your support would go a long way toward standing against this extreme bill.

Thank you,

Nikki

Donate >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nb-q3-2025?refcode=em-7.2.25-all-a

https://www.facebook.com/NikkiforCongress/?
https://www.instagram.com/nikkibudzinski/?
https://twitter.com/NikkiBudzinski?

Nikki is a champion for working families – from leading the fight to pass a $15 minimum wage in Illinois, to bringing manufacturing back to America. Now, she’s delivering in Congress for the people of Illinois' 13th Congressional District. Chip in to Nikki's campaign today.

name: Morgan Stahr, United for Democracy
subject: This is an all hands on deck moment for our movement!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
| |
---
Peter, Yesterday, the Senate passed its version of Trump’s so-called “Big Beautiful Bill.” It’s the single largest attack on health care in our country’s history. If enacted, this bill would result in **17 million Americans losing health care coverage, a rural hospital apocalypse, and elevated energy costs.** It would defund Planned Parenthood, putting reproductive health care services out of reach for millions. It would slash SNAP benefits that help working families afford groceries. And for what? Even with all these cuts, the bill still explodes the deficit so much that it would trigger an additional **$500 billion cut to Medicare.** **All of these cuts are offset by tax cuts for millionaires and billionaires and a ballooning ICE budget.** In fact, it would turn ICE into the largest law enforcement agency in America, making it far easier for the Trump administration to disappear our neighbors. **Because the Senate made this bill worse than the one that passed the House last month, the House has to vote on it again―and it only passed by a single vote last time. Our voices can still stop it.** Our allies at SEIU have set up a number that will connect you directly to your member of Congress. **Call 866-426-2631 right now to make your voice heard!**
> **When they answer, politely tell them:**
> _As your constituent, I believe that Congress should be making healthcare more affordable and accessible, not less. Vote NO on the Reconciliation Package!_
This is an all hands on deck moment for our movement. **Call** **866-426-2631 today!** Thank you, Morgan Stahr

clean_body: | | Peter, Yesterday, the Senate passed its version of Trump’s so-called “Big Beautiful Bill.” It’s the single largest attack on health care in our country’s history. If enacted, this bill would result in 17 million Americans losing health care coverage, a rural hospital apocalypse, and elevated energy costs. It would defund Planned Parenthood, putting reproductive health care services out of reach for millions. It would slash SNAP benefits that help working families afford groceries. And for what? Even with all these cuts, the bill still explodes the deficit so much that it would trigger an additional $500 billion cut to Medicare. All of these cuts are offset by tax cuts for millionaires and billionaires and a ballooning ICE budget. In fact, it would turn ICE into the largest law enforcement agency in America, making it far easier for the Trump administration to disappear our neighbors. Because the Senate made this bill worse than the one that passed the House last month, the House has to vote on it again―and it only passed by a single vote last time. Our voices can still stop it. Our allies at SEIU have set up a number that will connect you directly to your member of Congress. Call 866-426-2631 right now to make your voice heard! When they answer, politely tell them: As your constituent, I believe that Congress should be making healthcare more affordable and accessible, not less. Vote NO on the Reconciliation Package! This is an all hands on deck moment for our movement. Call 866-426-2631 today! Thank you, Morgan Stahr United for Democracy Paid for by United for Democracy. | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from United for Democracy, please .

name: John Fetterman
subject: re: today’s House vote on the budget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
| | |
---
Hey, Derek, it's John.
I had to reach out because the House could vote on Trump’s Big, Ugly Bill at any moment.
Now, if Republicans were all on the same page, they’d have already passed this bill this morning.
And though we don’t always agree on that much, many of them know this bill would force rural hospitals to shut down and evict seniors from nursing homes.
Many of them know it would send the national debt skyrocketing to numbers we’ve never seen before.
And many of them know they’d be selling out the folks who sent them to Congress just to line the pockets of the top 1%.
Look, Derek, I'm always gonna be 💯 with you: We had a big setback yesterday when Senate Republicans decided to pass this dumpster fire of a bill.
**But we still have time to make a hell of a lot of noise and tell the House to KILL THIS BILL.**
**So my team and I are working to hit our emergency rapid-response goal of $20,000 to show Republicans that they must vote NO and come back to the table with something else – _or they will PAY for this at the ballot box._**
**[We have to hit this before the House votes to send this bill to Trump’s desk. Please, Derek, will you pitch in whatever you can – $10, $25, whatever – to help us hit this goal and fight back against the GOP's reckless, greedy agenda?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50482?refcode=jtk165-fr-fl&t=1&akid=10180%2E434096%2EBWGTSR)**
| | [Donate](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51346?refcode=jtk165-fr-fl&t=2&akid=10180%2E434096%2EBWGTSR)
---
Thanks for being in this fight with me, Derek. It’s more important than ever that we’ve got each other’s backs.
John ❤️

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: This bill will break working families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:
Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=Cgz1zmQEhe8MeORxutsRJLDDmQoY1oZjpXh4EaRwTgLU%2ByXgBC7Mma76wUzyI17AUPILpIc0QjTciyzEhhlrQBfLknbMdmXpePFzArqTIWSper818bd75Ec6a0NYdrzPUgHGXFRkr%2B%2BHhfNfb9OkEotE3GEsAky4bUq1Bd7XHtlO9tzHKJaCe8VIFSzHN9E9lxcvkPh37SMINlCUitixWuuTZ9%2Bogpe%2B0Ji5bQmAjbfFaznEQp4Nz5R5uKlFIrOKr%2FHs3HUkEQA%2F1x4v1LNwT%2Fa%2B8XDaP%2F5vDKFXJ8J1d0oWAxO%2FFUlOnzcP%2BZht6ymAGNfheHldhjSa2KDX07Zd8ldz1%2BYEhF6nZvSkGCU4mTWtb3NdBKBDKUTjszREXqhlnI55Z4CvdqrXJOC%2F2Qu%2BUopPje9Wu7BpJWmYlaMe5WQ%3D)
---
| |
---
It's Gabe. This week, Senate Republicans rammed through what might be the most disastrous piece of legislation this country has ever seen. Senate Republicans passed a budget bill that will devastate working families. It cuts health care, slashes food assistance, and piles debt onto our kids — all to give the ultra-wealthy another massive tax break. Now it heads to the House. **If it passes, here’s what could happen:**
* Millions of families could lose access to basic care.
* Grocery prices could keep rising while the safety net gets ripped out from under people.
* And billionaires like Donald Trump? They’d walk away even richer — while the rest of us pay the price.

Let me be clear: this is a direct attack on people who work hard and play by the rules, all so the wealthy can get even wealthier. **We cannot let this bill become law.** Holding NM-02 is crucial to flipping the House next year. If we win here, we can help take back the majority — and finally put an end to this kind of reckless, backward governing. clean_body: Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | It's Gabe. This week, Senate Republicans rammed through what might be the most disastrous piece of legislation this country has ever seen. Senate Republicans passed a budget bill that will devastate working families. It cuts health care, slashes food assistance, and piles debt onto our kids — all to give the ultra-wealthy another massive tax break. Now it heads to the House. If it passes, here’s what could happen: Millions of families could lose access to basic care. Grocery prices could keep rising while the safety net gets ripped out from under people. And billionaires like Donald Trump? They’d walk away even richer — while the rest of us pay the price. Let me be clear: this is a direct attack on people who work hard and play by the rules, all so the wealthy can get even wealthier. We cannot let this bill become law. Holding NM-02 is crucial to flipping the House next year. If we win here, we can help take back the majority — and finally put an end to this kind of reckless, backward governing. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = In this fight together, Gabe | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110747828/555200399/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE703_20250702_MidYearFunds_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056494&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjU5YmY3NS03NzU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fsbb9QIOLRaGxhnlIaHp7f3bSTbS3I8DVe9Fieipkk4=) Peter, mid-year fundraising reports are starting to come in, and it's not good news: The Republican National Committee (RNC) is rolling in special interest money.

So far this year, the RNC has raised $80 million. That money is already being funneled into the most competitive races in the country, including those where EMILYs List women are running to flip or hold critical seats. ****[**Can you contribute today to ensure we have the strength and resources to stop MAGA extremists?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110747829/555200401/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE703_20250702_MidYearFunds_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056494&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjU5YmY3NS03NzU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fsbb9QIOLRaGxhnlIaHp7f3bSTbS3I8DVe9Fieipkk4=)**** | [TAKE BACK POWER](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110747830/555200403/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE703_20250702_MidYearFunds_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056494&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjU5YmY3NS03NzU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fsbb9QIOLRaGxhnlIaHp7f3bSTbS3I8DVe9Fieipkk4=)

Every dollar the RNC raises gives anti-choice Republicans more — more ad buys, paid canvassers, voter suppression efforts, and attacks on the women we've endorsed. If we want to compete, we need to start matching the GOP's urgency with our own. Because every time we fall behind on fundraising, we fall behind on the most meaningful ways to reach voters, including:
* The ads they see on their screens
* The conversations they have at their doors
* The mailers in their mailboxes
* The infrastructure that protects elections

We cannot let the GOP buy its way to power. Not when so much is at stake, and not when we have candidates ready to fight for abortion access, democracy, and real representation.
****[**Can you chip in right now to help us keep pace with the GOP's cash advantage and give our candidates the resources they need to fight back and win?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110747831/555200405/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE703_20250702_MidYearFunds_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056494&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjU5YmY3NS03NzU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fsbb9QIOLRaGxhnlIaHp7f3bSTbS3I8DVe9Fieipkk4=)****

clean_body: We're building a response, and we need you | = Peter, mid-year fundraising reports are starting to come in, and it's not good news: The Republican National Committee (RNC) is rolling in special interest money. So far this year, the RNC has raised $80 million. That money is already being funneled into the most competitive races in the country, including those where EMILYs List women are running to flip or hold critical seats. **= | = Every dollar the RNC raises gives anti-choice Republicans more — more ad buys, paid canvassers, voter suppression efforts, and attacks on the women we've endorsed. If we want to compete, we need to start matching the GOP's urgency with our own. Because every time we fall behind on fundraising, we fall behind on the most meaningful ways to reach voters, including: The ads they see on their screens The conversations they have at their doors The mailers in their mailboxes The infrastructure that protects elections We cannot let the GOP buy its way to power. Not when so much is at stake, and not when we have candidates ready to fight for abortion access, democracy, and real representation. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for standing with us, the EMILYs List team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Friend,
In June alone, Karrin Taylor Robson did **44 campaign stops** across Arizona. From LD meetings to law enforcement roundtables, she’s crisscrossing the state and meeting voters where they are.
President Trump endorsed Karrin because she’s a conservative businesswoman who gets things done. She built a career, raised four kids, and lived the American dream. Now, she’s running to protect it.
Check out some highlights from the past month, and let us know where we should go next by emailing info@karrinforarizona.com!
_— Parker Carey, Campaign Manager_
_P.S. Please sign Karrin’s petition below to get her on the ballot!_

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: We only need FOUR Republicans to tank this bill. Call the House of Representatives now →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Hi friends, I’ll make this quick:
If you already know how devastating the GOP budget will be if it’s signed into law, you can skip the rest of this email and hit the phones: Dial (202) 224-3121 – the Capitol switchboard – right now and register your strong opposition to this bill.
This bill could come up for a vote in a matter of hours. The procedural votes for it have already started — so if you can make calls, the time is now.
If you have a Republican representative, it’s extra important to call them! If not, you can ask to speak to one of the members who is reportedly on the fence about which way to vote:
- Rep. Rob Bresnahan (PA)
- Rep. Tim Burchett (TN)
- Rep. Eli Crane (AZ)
- Rep. Chuck Edwards (NC)
- Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick (PA)
- Rep. Jen Kiggans (VA)
- Rep. Ralph Norman (SC)
- Rep. Chip Roy (TX)
- Rep. Keith Self (TX)
- Rep. David Valadao (CA)
If you don’t yet know about the disaster that is this GOP budget legislation, let me give you a few highlights:
This bill steals from poor and working-class people to enrich the wealthiest people in the country even further.
Americans who are in the lowest earning bracket would see their incomes and federal benefits (like Medicaid and SNAP) cut by nearly 4% a year, while the wealthiest 10% would get a 2.3% increase in after-tax income.
For people in our community who are experiencing poverty – who are barely keeping things afloat – these cuts will be devastating.
This is all while adding trillions of dollars to the federal deficit – something Republicans have historically cared about *so much* that it was the cornerstone of their platform for decades. (Give me a break.)
So why is the GOP so set on pushing this through? To give trillions of dollars in tax breaks to billionaires and massive corporations – because Donald Trump wants to.
This bill will push millions of people off of their health insurance, raise everyone else’s premiums, and close clinics, nursing homes, and hospitals. People will go hungry, and people will die unnecessary deaths.
And another thing! This isn’t being talked about much, but this bill also increases funding for Trump’s efforts to militarize our communities and terrorize our neighbors.
Now that the budget bill is back in the House, I’m going to do everything I can to minimize its harm (and hopefully stop it altogether). But Republicans need to hear from all of us. Will you call the U.S. House switchboard at (202) 224-3121 and register your opposition to this cruel and unjust budget?
Then forward this email to friends and family who will speak out, too. Public pressure is one of our key levers of power, and we’ve seen over and over that it works – so we can’t let up now.
Thanks for reading – more to come.
–Sara

Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

clean_body: [] Hi friends, I’ll make this quick: If you already know how devastating the GOP budget will be if it’s signed into law, you can skip the rest of this email and hit the phones: Dial (202) 224-3121 – the Capitol switchboard – right now and register your strong opposition to this bill. This bill could come up for a vote in a matter of hours. The procedural votes for it have already started — so if you can make calls, the time is now. If you have a Republican representative, it’s extra important to call them! If not, you can ask to speak to one of the members who is reportedly on the fence about which way to vote: - Rep. Rob Bresnahan (PA) - Rep. Tim Burchett (TN) - Rep. Eli Crane (AZ) - Rep. Chuck Edwards (NC) - Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick (PA) - Rep. Jen Kiggans (VA) - Rep. Ralph Norman (SC) - Rep. Chip Roy (TX) - Rep. Keith Self (TX) - Rep. David Valadao (CA) If you don’t yet know about the disaster that is this GOP budget legislation, let me give you a few highlights: This bill steals from poor and working-class people to enrich the wealthiest people in the country even further. Americans who are in the lowest earning bracket would see their incomes and federal benefits (like Medicaid and SNAP) cut by nearly 4% a year, while the wealthiest 10% would get a 2.3% increase in after-tax income. For people in our community who are experiencing poverty – who are barely keeping things afloat – these cuts will be devastating. This is all while adding trillions of dollars to the federal deficit – something Republicans have historically cared about so much that it was the cornerstone of their platform for decades. (Give me a break.) So why is the GOP so set on pushing this through? To give trillions of dollars in tax breaks to billionaires and massive corporations – because Donald Trump wants to. This bill will push millions of people off of their health insurance, raise everyone else’s premiums, and close clinics, nursing homes, and hospitals. People will go hungry, and people will die unnecessary deaths. And another thing! This isn’t being talked about much, but this bill also increases funding for Trump’s efforts to militarize our communities and terrorize our neighbors. Now that the budget bill is back in the House, I’m going to do everything I can to minimize its harm (and hopefully stop it altogether). But Republicans need to hear from all of us. Will you call the U.S. House switchboard at (202) 224-3121 and register your opposition to this cruel and unjust budget? Then forward this email to friends and family who will speak out, too. Public pressure is one of our key levers of power, and we’ve seen over and over that it works – so we can’t let up now. Thanks for reading – more to come. –Sara [] Congresswoman Sara Jacobs California’s 51st District CONTRIBUTE [] [] Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress PO Box 120085 San Diego, CA 92112 United States www.facebook.com/SaraJacobsCA/ [www.facebook.com/SaraJacobsCA/] twitter.com/sarajacobsca [twitter.com/sarajacobsca] www.instagram.com/sarajacobsca/ [www.instagram.com/sarajacobsca/] CONTRIBUTE TODAY [] We believe these emails are a critical way for Sara to stay in touch with supporters and constituents.
