It’s a strike, Peter! Nearly 10,000 city workers who keep the city running are fighting for their rights on the job. _**[Send Mayor Cherelle Parker an email to demand a fair contract for Philly municipal workers that guarantees a living wage.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110748609/555202965/-1378415535?refcode=EM_FL_OPA_20250702_call_dc33_team_oc_geo_xx_l1&ms=EM_FL_OPA_20250702_call_dc33_team_oc_geo_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vQ1BELzEvMTEzNTk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ0NmY0MjgyLTdhNTctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w05ueGaxOaJuMCQceKkTr70j5P_Kr0FpC9ur-ztCJxI=&emci=d3ef613c-b856-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=446f4282-7a57-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1206669)**_ | [Write the Mayor](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110748610/555202966/-1378415535?refcode=EM_FL_OPA_20250702_call_dc33_team_oc_geo_xx_sbt1&ms=EM_FL_OPA_20250702_call_dc33_team_oc_geo_xx_sbt1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vQ1BELzEvMTEzNTk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ0NmY0MjgyLTdhNTctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w05ueGaxOaJuMCQceKkTr70j5P_Kr0FpC9ur-ztCJxI=&emci=d3ef613c-b856-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=446f4282-7a57-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1206669)
---
One PA stands in solidarity with the workers, represented by AFSCME District Council 33, who are overwhelmingly Black and are the lowest paid employees in the city’s workforce — well below Philly’s median household income.
_This strike is about more than the needs of city workers versus underspending for the benefit of the corporations who want city tax cuts. It’s about more than Black workers fighting for the dignity to be paid fairly. This is about the right of our neighbors to hold onto basic human needs that everyone deserves–a reasonable, living wage; healthcare; housing; and the ability to live a life in which they won’t be plunged into poverty if one thing goes wrong.”_ — Steve Paul, Executive Director of One PA
---
Join us in support of the workers who made Philly work by making sure trash gets picked up, rec centers run, and children get care in public buildings. _**[Write to Mayor Parker to demand a fair contract to treat essential service providers with respect and dignity.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110748611/555202967/-1378415535?refcode=EM_FL_OPA_20250702_call_dc33_team_oc_geo_xx_l2&ms=EM_FL_OPA_20250702_call_dc33_team_oc_geo_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vQ1BELzEvMTEzNTk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ0NmY0MjgyLTdhNTctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w05ueGaxOaJuMCQceKkTr70j5P_Kr0FpC9ur-ztCJxI=&emci=d3ef613c-b856-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=446f4282-7a57-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1206669)**_

name: LCV Membership Team
subject: MEMBERSHIP DEADLINE EXTENDED after devastating vote to gut clean energy
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTI2NjIwMTUS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjI2MDAzMTMxMwS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Peter — we’re crunching the numbers after Monday’s Summer Membership
Drive deadline, and we fell just short of our $40,000 goal. That goal is an important one. The Senate just voted 51-50, in a tie broken by
J.D. Vance, to gut clean energy and end healthcare for millions of Americans —
we need to mobilize people before the House votes on it as soon as this week and
Trump can sign this disaster into law. Given the severity of these threats to our environment and health, we’ve just
secured a critical extension of our Summer Membership Drive’s triple match offer. How many members stand behind us right nowdetermines how far we can go to mobilize the public and how quickly we can
respond to this dangerous legislation, with the House expected to vote on it
within just days. Through the end of this month, every dollar will go 3X as far to power our fight to protect climate progress, advance clean energy, and defend the future of our democracy. Don’t miss out — renew your LCV membership today to claim your TRIPLE MATCH, while $5=$15 >> https://links.messages.lcv. RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP FOR JUST $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv. The threats to our environment and our health are growing by the day, and LCV
members are the reason we’re able to keep organizing and advocating to protect
people and the planet. Here’s what we’re up against, and why your membership matters more than ever: https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/ebDKc8G0e~ Families’ energy costs will rise and hundreds of thousands of jobs will be wiped out after the Senate voted to pass the most worst anti-environmental bill we’ve ever seen, all while Big Polluters win big. Support from LCV members allows us to work with our state partners to mobilize grassroots activists nationwide to fight this horrible bill. Renew while your impact will TRIPLE >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_ywTK0_
The Trump administration just moved to rescind protections for national forests, opening up as much as 59 million acres of our forests (even old-growth forests like Tongass in Alaska) to destructive logging. This move will limit public access to the outdoors, harm wildlife, and worsen climate change — all in the name of polluter profits. Renew today to keep public lands in public hands >> https://links.messages.lcv.
MAGA extremists in Congress are working to roll back bedrock environmental laws like the Clean Air Act by changing long-established rules for tailpipe emissions and making our cars and trucks more expensive. We’re fighting to protect the air we breathe and defend the laws that protect our planet and health — but we need your support. Renew while your gift will be tripled >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/bxyvTVDE_ Our members are our greatest source of strength in moments like this, when so
much is on the line. Please, Peter, respond today to support our environmental campaigns
through 2025, while your gift will TRIPLE in impact. For our air and water and cherished landscapes. For our health and our future.
We cannot, and will not, give up. Are you with us, Peter? https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/X6bzs~ — LCV Membership Team This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=12662015&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjI2MDAzMTMxMwS2&spReportId=MjI2MDAzMTMxMwS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=12662015&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjI2MDAzMTMxMwS2&spReportId=MjI2MDAzMTMxMwS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Pwb7C7Rj-

Here’s what we’re up against, and why your membership matters more than ever: Families’ energy costs will rise and hundreds of thousands of jobs will be wiped out after the Senate voted to pass the most worst anti-environmental bill we’ve ever seen, all while Big Polluters win big. Support from LCV members allows us to work with our state partners to mobilize grassroots activists nationwide to fight this horrible bill. Renew while your impact will TRIPLE >> The Trump administration just moved to rescind protections for national forests, opening up as much as 59 million acres of our forests (even old-growth forests like Tongass in Alaska) to destructive logging. This move will limit public access to the outdoors, harm wildlife, and worsen climate change — all in the name of polluter profits. Renew today to keep public lands in public hands >> MAGA extremists in Congress are working to roll back bedrock environmental laws like the Clean Air Act by changing long-established rules for tailpipe emissions and making our cars and trucks more expensive. We’re fighting to protect the air we breathe and defend the laws that protect our planet and health — but we need your support. Renew while your gift will be tripled >> Our members are our greatest source of strength in moments like this, when so much is on the line. Please, Peter, respond today to support our environmental campaigns through 2025, while your gift will TRIPLE in impact. For our air and water and cherished landscapes. For our health and our future. We cannot, and will not, give up. Are you with us, Peter? — LCV Membership Team This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. subject: Our plan for 2026

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110748732/555203781/-664592562?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzU5M2VkNy03YTU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dbd42h9TOz4ku4k6WOt1vK-tiNgYXj2Z4DE5ad696SE=)
Friend, Ariel Hayes here. I just joined DASS as Executive Director because the stakes have never been higher – and what happens in the next year and a half could shape the next decade. Over the past few years, we’ve seen just how fragile our democratic institutions can be when they’re in the wrong hands. We’ve seen politicians refuse to certify election results, stoke conspiracies, and try to overturn the will of the voters. It’s become clear: the far right has a long game. They’re not just focused on who wins the next presidential election – they’re focused on controlling how that election is conducted. They want to hand the keys to our democracy to extremists who will rewrite the rules, restrict access to the ballot box, and suppress the voices they can’t win over. **That’s why I joined this fight.** Because when you strip everything else away, Secretaries of State are the last line of defense for free and fair elections. They oversee how we vote, when we vote, and whose votes count. They ensure that every eligible voter – no matter their zip code, background, or party – has an equal voice in our democracy. And in 2026, 26 of these offices are on the ballot. These races will shape the future of election administration, redistricting in 2030, and the outcome of the 2028 presidential race. They will decide whether our democracy is guarded by public servants who believe in the rule of law – or hijacked by those who don’t. That’s why we’re not waiting. At DASS, we’re launching the most ambitious early campaign we’ve ever run – defending swing states like Arizona and Nevada, and taking the fight to Republicans in places like Georgia, Ohio, and Iowa. [**But to build early, organize deep, and win big – we need your help right now. Can you chip in $3 or whatever you can to power this work?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110748738/555203789/1071238056?refcode=em-7.02.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzU5M2VkNy03YTU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dbd42h9TOz4ku4k6WOt1vK-tiNgYXj2Z4DE5ad696SE=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $5 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110748742/555203794/1071238056?refcode=em-7.02.25-all-b&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzU5M2VkNy03YTU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dbd42h9TOz4ku4k6WOt1vK-tiNgYXj2Z4DE5ad696SE=)**

I just joined DASS as Executive Director because the stakes have never been higher – and what happens in the next year and a half could shape the next decade. Over the past few years, we’ve seen just how fragile our democratic institutions can be when they’re in the wrong hands. We’ve seen politicians refuse to certify election results, stoke conspiracies, and try to overturn the will of the voters. It’s become clear: the far right has a long game. They’re not just focused on who wins the next presidential election – they’re focused on controlling how that election is conducted. They want to hand the keys to our democracy to extremists who will rewrite the rules, restrict access to the ballot box, and suppress the voices they can’t win over. That’s why I joined this fight. Because when you strip everything else away, Secretaries of State are the last line of defense for free and fair elections. They oversee how we vote, when we vote, and whose votes count. They ensure that every eligible voter – no matter their zip code, background, or party – has an equal voice in our democracy. And in 2026, 26 of these offices are on the ballot. These races will shape the future of election administration, redistricting in 2030, and the outcome of the 2028 presidential race. They will decide whether our democracy is guarded by public servants who believe in the rule of law – or hijacked by those who don’t. That’s why we’re not waiting. At DASS, we’re launching the most ambitious early campaign we’ve ever run – defending swing states like Arizona and Nevada, and taking the fight to Republicans in places like Georgia, Ohio, and Iowa. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thank you, Ariel Hayes Executive Director | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. Right now, Republicans are changing the rules and changing the players to try and change the outcomes of future elections. Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters._ Please consider a donation to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda. | = = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill Democratic Association of Secretaries of State 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: Here’s what I want you to know:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
Yesterday was exhausting, but I’m truly full of gratitude to those of you who tuned into my reading of Republicans’ budget bill at the United States Capitol. This bill would be devastating to so many communities across the country, and Arizonans will feel the impact of Republicans’ greediness and spinelessness heavily. If you missed our reading, here’s what I want you to know: → This bill hands $200 BILLION dollars worth of tax breaks to the wealthiest families and individuals in the country, many of whom made their wealth destroying our communities through Big Oil or Big Pharma.

→ This bill would kick thousands of Arizonans off their healthcare, rip away millions of dollars from hospitals serving underserved communities like rural hospitals, and leave critical gaps in care.

→ With this bill, Arizonans’ electricity bills could increase nearly 14% at a time when we’re already dealing with deadly high heat and even higher costs to stay cool. People are already struggling to make ends meet, and higher bills mean that they will be forced to choose between paying for prescriptions or paying for air conditioning — which could be deadly. **[Republicans are moving at the speed of light to hand out tax breaks to their buddies that you and I will be paying for with increased everyday costs. Pitch in right now to help our team connect with more communities to let them know exactly who is working for them and who is working against them in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110748870/555203969/1408057180?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250702_PM2_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTU0OWNlZS03YTU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uuiKPy6p2bqMZyTdIlrKTPl8Ucl2pWQQjnCu_3hAOf0=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110748874/555203974/1408057180?express=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250702_PM2_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTU0OWNlZS03YTU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uuiKPy6p2bqMZyTdIlrKTPl8Ucl2pWQQjnCu_3hAOf0=)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110749151/555204770/789508428?refcode=250702_RG_StaggeringCorruption&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjg2ZWJlYy03YjU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1lO3A4XprIDk2AfaC7NFWYFrkqnXti8SNte4EMbCnmI=)
I’ll be blunt: The corruption coming from the Trump administration is STAGGERING.
**FIRST:** Trump’s national security team was revealed to have discussed sensitive, confidential topics on a Signal group chat.
**THEN:** Trump accepted a $400 million mega-jet from a foreign government.
**NOW:** He and his family are making billions off wealthy donors with no transparency.
You might think that all of this calls for... oversight. That’s what the Oversight Committee is supposed to do, after all.
But Republicans refuse to do their jobs and are all too happy to let Donald Trump get away with his outrageous corruption.
**That’s why I’m fighting hard on the Oversight Committee to hold Trump accountable. This moment calls for fearless leadership that will bring the fight to Donald Trump each and every day.**

Thanks you,

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: We cleaned tutors’ homes in exchange for SAT prep.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
I’m proud of how I grew up.
#
I’m proud of how I grew up and talk about it all the time!
My mom cleaned houses and I helped. We cleaned tutors’ homes in exchange for SAT prep.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250702-1.ZfWcCe&refcode=em20250702-9229-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9229%2E2526796%2EL3vK83)
Growing up between The Bronx and Yorktown deeply shaped my views of inequality and it’s a big reason I believe the things I do today!
I tell this story on the Fighting Oligarchy tour 😂
When my dad died during the financial crisis, my mom almost got foreclosed on.
The GOP always thinks this is some gotcha but I ran my whole campaign for Congress on this, with the motto “**Your ZIP code shouldn’t determine your destiny.** ”
Our movement is powered by people who believe a better world is possible for each and every one of us — and we’re just getting this fight started.
[Will you chip in $5 to keep our momentum going strong? ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250702-1.ZfWcCe&refcode=em20250702-9229-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9229%2E2526796%2EL3vK83)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250702-1.ZfWcCe&refcode=em20250702-9229-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=9229%2E2526796%2EL3vK83)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250702-1?refcode=em20250702-9229-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&refcode2=9229_2526796_L3vK83&akid=9229%2E2526796%2EL3vK83)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250702-9229-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=23&akid=9229%2E2526796%2EL3vK83)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=9229%2E2526796%2EL3vK83) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=9229%2E2526796%2EL3vK83) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=9229%2E2526796%2EL3vK83)

Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

subject: I'm running to be the next U.S. Senator from Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
Now, let me explain why.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110749200/555204905/-156383797?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-07-02_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGExMmFkMGEtN2M1Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=j0_euu73L9MYC2iXmcSQwVHzlOz3W5HD8adnFPTIqSs=)

Peter, allow me to reintroduce myself: My name is Colin Allred.

I'm a fourth-generation Texan, former NFL player, civil rights lawyer, Dad, and former Dallas Congressman. As of yesterday, I am officially running to be Texas' next U.S. Senator.

[_**If that's all you need to hear, please split a donation right now between my campaign and Abigail Spanberger to help me raise $1 million in the first few days of my campaign.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110749202/555204907/-156383797?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-07-02_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGExMmFkMGEtN2M1Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=j0_euu73L9MYC2iXmcSQwVHzlOz3W5HD8adnFPTIqSs=)
| [DONATE → ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110749204/555204909/-156383797?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-07-02_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGExMmFkMGEtN2M1Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=j0_euu73L9MYC2iXmcSQwVHzlOz3W5HD8adnFPTIqSs=)
---
Peter, **I am running** to finish what we started two years ago – a historic grassroots movement that came within striking distance of flipping Texas.

**I am running** because Donald Trump and Senate Republicans have failed Texans and the American people with their extreme partisanship, broken promises, and policies that prioritize massive tax cuts for the wealthy at the expense of working people.

**I am running** because the GOP frontrunner - Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton - has spent years trying to throw women’s doctors in jail for providing abortion care and is so corrupt the Texas House even voted to impeach him.

And finally, **I am running because I know we can win.** In fact, the Republicans’ own polling shows me in the lead!

**But I also know that winning will take an unprecedented groundswell of grassroots support – starting now with our $1 million launch day goal.**

With those resources, we can build the campaign infrastructure we need to reach voters in every corner of our state, hire staff and train volunteers, and fight back against the millions of dollars Republicans will spend to defeat me.

[_**That's why I'm personally asking you to chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can spare today to me and Abigail Spanberger to help me kick off this Senate campaign. Please, will you rush your support now to help us get off to the strong start we need to bring real leadership back to Texas?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110749206/555204911/-156383797?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-07-02_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGExMmFkMGEtN2M1Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=j0_euu73L9MYC2iXmcSQwVHzlOz3W5HD8adnFPTIqSs=)

clean_body: Now, let me explain why. | = Peter, allow me to reintroduce myself: My name is Colin Allred. I'm a fourth-generation Texan, former NFL player, civil rights lawyer, Dad, and former Dallas Congressman. As of yesterday, I am officially running to be Texas' next U.S. Senator. = | = Peter, I am running to finish what we started two years ago – a historic grassroots movement that came within striking distance of flipping Texas. I am running because Donald Trump and Senate Republicans have failed Texans and the American people with their extreme partisanship, broken promises, and policies that prioritize massive tax cuts for the wealthy at the expense of working people. I am running because the GOP frontrunner - Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton - has spent years trying to throw women’s doctors in jail for providing abortion care and is so corrupt the Texas House even voted to impeach him. And finally, I am running because I know we can win. In fact, the Republicans’ own polling shows me in the lead! But I also know that winning will take an unprecedented groundswell of grassroots support – starting now with our $1 million launch day goal. With those resources, we can build the campaign infrastructure we need to reach voters in every corner of our state, hire staff and train volunteers, and fight back against the millions of dollars Republicans will spend to defeat me. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you so much for any help you can send during this critical moment for our campaign. We have a long, tough road ahead, but together, I truly believe we can win and create a better Texas for everyone. Let's go! Colin Allred * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

name: Hillary Scholten
subject: headed back to DC to vote NO on the Big Ugly Bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
The country is facing an affordability crisis. It’s our middle class and working families that will bear the brunt of this awful legislation, all to reward billionaires with even more tax cuts.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110749244/555205066/463868053?&refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-07-02_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODA1OWQ1Ny03YzU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TCTUQKnbH8l7b9aALp67CmIC5LS8gwDDpPkuCIl59Is=)
---
| After narrowly passing in the Senate, Trump’s _**Big Ugly Bill**_ heads back to the House for a vote today. So, after several cancelled flights, I got up at 4 AM this morning to catch a pre-dawn flight to vote NO.

We know why this bill is bad – _**it’s a massive redistribution of wealth from the middle class to the ultra-wealthy.**_ It takes healthcare away from millions of Americans. It slashes SNAP benefits and increases your grocery bills. It raises utility bills. It eliminates income-based repayment options for student loans. It rips away the historic Child Tax Credit from some parents. It raises gas prices and commuting costs.

And despite these massive cuts, it still manages to **add $3 trillion to the federal debt.** If Republicans want to insist on calling themselves the party of family values and fiscal responsibility, they will vote NO like the rest of their Democratic colleagues.

The country is facing an affordability crisis. It’s our middle class and working families that will bear the brunt of this awful legislation, all to reward billionaires with even more tax cuts.

[_**I’m fighting back – but I need you with me. Defending this seat is critical if we want to flip Michigan blue and remain a check to the Trump administration and the GOP’s billionaire-first agenda. Can I count on your support to power this campaign?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110749245/555205067/32658279?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-07-02_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODA1OWQ1Ny03YzU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TCTUQKnbH8l7b9aALp67CmIC5LS8gwDDpPkuCIl59Is=)

clean_body: The country is facing an affordability crisis. It’s our middle class and working families that will bear the brunt of this awful legislation, all to reward billionaires with even more tax cuts. | = | After narrowly passing in the Senate, Trump’s Big Ugly Bill heads back to the House for a vote today. So, after several cancelled flights, I got up at 4 AM this morning to catch a pre-dawn flight to vote NO. We know why this bill is bad – it’s a massive redistribution of wealth from the middle class to the ultra-wealthy. It takes healthcare away from millions of Americans. It slashes SNAP benefits and increases your grocery bills. It raises utility bills. It eliminates income-based repayment options for student loans. It rips away the historic Child Tax Credit from some parents. It raises gas prices and commuting costs. And despite these massive cuts, it still manages to add $3 trillion to the federal debt. If Republicans want to insist on calling themselves the party of family values and fiscal responsibility, they will vote NO like the rest of their Democratic colleagues. The country is facing an affordability crisis. It’s our middle class and working families that will bear the brunt of this awful legislation, all to reward billionaires with even more tax cuts. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for your support, Hillary * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49516 United States | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . name: Al Franken
subject: The “Powwow” Story --
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Gizhiiwewidamookwe, means ‘speaks in a loud and clear voice woman.’
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td86ef17f-dfe4-4542-9518-07cfc2b30688/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Dear Peter, I want to tell you about someone who’s unbelievably great. Someone who understands what’s at stake in this moment, who listens, who leads, and who embodies the values that make Minnesota, well, Minnesotan. That person is Peggy Flanagan. And she’s running to represent our great state in the U.S. Senate. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td049507d-7801-4268-821d-ca1ba6640bc0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I’ve known Peggy for a long time. We both grew up in St. Louis Park (not at the same time — she’s young, and I’m old). Raised by a single mom, Peggy knows the impact of federal programs that help working families. They had a home because of a Section 8 housing voucher. Other public programs helped her mom afford health insurance and child care. She gets it because she’s lived it. And that’s exactly the kind of leader we need in Washington. (And frankly, what we have way too little of.)
---
| | [HELP ELECT PEGGY TO THE SENATE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8f6336d6-2b4c-47f2-9635-5b9e9702842f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Peggy’s got the experience, too. She’s currently serving as Minnesota’s Lieutenant Governor — the highest-ranking Native American woman ever elected to executive office in the U.S. Before that, she was a state legislator, a school board member, an executive director for the Children’s Defense Fund–Minnesota, she even worked for ME! But most importantly — she worked for my friend and hero, the late Senator Paul Wellstone. She and I both believe in his guiding principle: We all do better when we all do better. (Yes, it’s that simple. No, Republicans still don’t get it.) While Republicans are hiding from their constituents, Peggy is doing the opposite. She’s traveling the state hosting ‘Kitchen Table Conversations’ — actually listening to real Minnesotans, having real conversations, and working to bring people together. She doesn't just want to fight against bad stuff. She wants to build something, too. Oh, and in case you’re wondering — yes, Peggy will be the first Native American woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate. It’s about time. She is Ojibwe and a member of White Earth, and her Anishinaabe name, Gizhiiwewidamookwe, means ‘speaks in a loud and clear voice woman.’ If there’s one thing I know about Peggy, it’s that she’ll use that voice to fight for all Minnesotans — whether they agree with her or not. [So let’s make it happen. Split a donation with Blue Amp Action today, and help send Peggy Flanagan to the Senate, where she’ll keep speaking up, fighting hard, and making sure we all have a good hotdish recipe.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td2db4f2d-8504-4299-8fa4-9fdd46fab18e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/T25370926-f1ec-403c-bc23-95675e749ce5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE $20](https://default.salsalabs.org/T726ae3e0-187d-4fb8-83a8-dbfcf25270ef/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE MORE](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb1f304f4-97fb-4369-905a-2224db105b5b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | Al _P.S. I could go on and on about how great Peggy is. But instead, let me share a quick story from my first Senate campaign in 2008. Peggy was an organizer working with Native American communities and my advisor on Indian Affairs, and she told me if I went to the powwow at Red Lake, I should NOT dance. Good advice. But then a young man invited me to join in. So, I addressed the crowd and said, “Only if you don’t make fun of me after I leave.” They laughed and agreed, I danced, and a woman danced up to me and said, “You dance like a white guy.” I reminded her of the conditions of my dancing — to which she replied, “You said after you leave.” That was my first lesson in Ojibwe humor._
---

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T90b8e7b0-3cf5-46d8-b392-e98b9f402371/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Oh, and in case you’re wondering — yes, Peggy will be the first Native American woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate. It’s about time. She is Ojibwe and a member of White Earth, and her Anishinaabe name, Gizhiiwewidamookwe, means ‘speaks in a loud and clear voice woman.’ If there’s one thing I know about Peggy, it’s that she’ll use that voice to fight for all Minnesotans — whether they agree with her or not. | | | | | | | | | | | | Al P.S. I could go on and on about how great Peggy is. But instead, let me share a quick story from my first Senate campaign in 2008. Peggy was an organizer working with Native American communities and my advisor on Indian Affairs, and she told me if I went to the powwow at Red Lake, I should NOT dance. Good advice. But then a young man invited me to join in. So, I addressed the crowd and said, “Only if you don’t make fun of me after I leave.” They laughed and agreed, I danced, and a woman danced up to me and said, “You dance like a white guy.” I reminded her of the conditions of my dancing — to which she replied, “You said after you leave.” That was my first lesson in Ojibwe humor. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

|

Peter, Colin Allred here, and I have some exciting news to share: I am officially launching my campaign this week to be Texas’ next U.S. Senator.

**[Will you split a donation of $7 between my campaign and Democracy On The Line right now to help me raise $1 million in the first few days of my campaign for Senate? I need your support so we can flip Texas blue and take on the corrupt politicians like John Cornyn and Ken Paxton who are rigging the economy against hard working Texans.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110750129/555208051/1673425852?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20250702_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzMWRmODIyLTdmNTctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-CUjN8H5omC0xqO-HwW2cNZ_KhoWA-NXAIAJFxNUcYQ=)** **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110750130/555208052/1673425852?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20250702_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzMWRmODIyLTdmNTctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-CUjN8H5omC0xqO-HwW2cNZ_KhoWA-NXAIAJFxNUcYQ=)** | **[DONATE $7 NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110750134/555208054/1673425852?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20250702_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzMWRmODIyLTdmNTctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-CUjN8H5omC0xqO-HwW2cNZ_KhoWA-NXAIAJFxNUcYQ=)**

Here's why you giving $7 today matters more than ever:

\- Republicans are already in a messy primary, with front-runner Texas AG Ken Paxton trying to throw doctors in jail for providing abortion care.

**\- Now, not just one but TWO brand-new polls show me leading in this race.**

\- With Trump and the GOP wreaking havoc on our economy, our fundamental rights, and our democracy, we need leaders who will take on corruption.

People are fired up – _and they’re ready to fight back!_

**[That’s why I’m asking for $7 today.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110750135/555208059/1673425852?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20250702_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzMWRmODIyLTdmNTctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-CUjN8H5omC0xqO-HwW2cNZ_KhoWA-NXAIAJFxNUcYQ=)** Seriously, it can make a HUGE difference in these early days of our grassroots campaign.

I know $5 might not sound like much when you think of the tens of millions the GOP and their rich mega donors have. But it adds up quickly! If everyone reading this chips in, we'll hit our goal in minutes – and we'll be that much closer to finally bringing Texas the leadership we deserve.

name: Colin Allred
subject: Seriously, just $5
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Colin Allred here, and I have some exciting news to share: I am officially launching my campaign this week to be Texas’ next U.S. Senator.
**[Will you split a donation of $5 between my campaign and Deb Haaland right now to help me raise $1 million in the first few days of my campaign for Senate? I need your support so we can flip Texas blue and take on the corrupt politicians like John Cornyn and Ken Paxton who are rigging the economy against hard working Texans.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250702_1_split?amount=5&refcode=em20250702-2980&refcode2=2980_400544_hMmR7U&akid=2980%2E400544%2EhMmR7U)**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250702_1_split?refcode=em20250702-2980&amount=5&refcode2=2980_400544_hMmR7U&akid=2980%2E400544%2EhMmR7U)
**[Donate Now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250702_1_split?refcode=em20250702-2980&amount=5&refcode2=2980_400544_hMmR7U&akid=2980%2E400544%2EhMmR7U)**
Here's why you giving $5 today matters more than ever:
\- Republicans are already in a messy primary, with front-runner Texas AG Ken Paxton trying to throw doctors in jail for providing abortion care.
\- **Now, not just one but TWO brand-new polls show me leading in this race.**
\- With Trump and the GOP wreaking havoc on our economy, our fundamental rights, and our democracy, we need leaders who will take on corruption.
People are fired up – _and they’re ready to fight back!_
[**That’s why I’m asking for $5 today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250702_1_split?amount=5&refcode=em20250702-2980&refcode2=2980_400544_hMmR7U&akid=2980%2E400544%2EhMmR7U) Seriously, it can make a HUGE difference in these early days of our grassroots campaign.
I know $5 might not sound like much when you think of the tens of millions the GOP and their rich mega donors have. But it adds up quickly! If everyone reading this chips in, we'll hit our goal in minutes – and we'll be that much closer to finally bringing Texas the leadership we deserve.
[**Will you be a Founding Donor of this campaign by giving $5 now to split between my campaign and Deb Haaland, so that I can reach voters in every corner of Texas and win this race?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250702_1_split?amount=5&refcode=em20250702-2980&refcode2=2980_400544_hMmR7U&akid=2980%2E400544%2EhMmR7U)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250702_1_split?refcode=em20250702-2980&amount=5&refcode2=2980_400544_hMmR7U&akid=2980%2E400544%2EhMmR7U)**
I want to finish the job we started last year, but I need your help to do it.
– Colin Allred

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=1&akid=2980%2E400544%2EhMmR7U)

name: Team Ossoff
subject: A quick thank-you from all of us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Hey Peter, it’s Ellen — Jon’s campaign manager. I’m reaching out today with a very important message:
**_🎉🎉🎉 THANK YOU!!! 🎉🎉🎉**_
I know Jon and our whole team have been reaching out a lot to try to hit our goals before our FEC deadline. And I know how pesky these messages can be.
So I wanted to send a quick note to emphasize how grateful we are to you for sticking with us.
When we say that Jon’s campaign is _overwhelmingly_ powered by grassroots supporters like you, it’s not just talk. It’s the absolute truth.
Without folks like you on our team, we wouldn’t have a chance.
It’s no secret that this is likely to be the closest, most-expensive Senate race in the country. And unlike his GOP opponents, Jon can’t self-fund tens of millions of dollars, or count on a Elon Musk-backed Super PAC to come to the rescue.
To fight back against that onslaught of dark money, our strategy remains the same: _to build the biggest, most relentless organizing and turnout effort Georgia has ever seen._
That’s what we’re doing on this campaign, and Jon and all of us on the team and so incredibly grateful that you’re a part of it.
Ellen
Campaign Manager
Jon Ossoff for Senate

* * *

[](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-july25.vLE_dc&refcode=em250702-1-b-full&t=1&akid=527%2E5691347%2EdEFmLN)
Jon Ossoff built his career exposing corruption. As an investigative journalist, he led a team that uncovered war crimes, human traffickers, and contract killers — exposing those who abuse power. Then, in 2021, he took that same fight to the U.S. Senate, winning a historic race in Georgia that secured the Democratic majority.
**Now, he’s the only Democrat up for re-election in a state Trump won. That means MAGA is coming for him. Trump and his allies will stop at nothing to reclaim this seat.**
[**If you can make it work, donate to Jon’s campaign today. We’re counting on your support to fight back against MAGA and WIN.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-july25.vLE_dc&refcode=em250702-1-b-full&t=2&akid=527%2E5691347%2EdEFmLN)

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: No ask, just a thank you!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4851%2E35263%2EsZen-3)
Hi Peter, I'm reaching out to thank you for your incredible support leading up to our end-of-quarter deadline. I know you probably received a lot of emails in the final few days of the month, so it means the world that you've chosen to open and read ours. Having you as a member of our team means so much to me — especially right now. I know things aren't easy for most Americans at this moment. While Republicans are working overtime to ram through their sweeping tax breaks for the wealthiest few, hard-working Americans are struggling to get by. People are worried about what life might look like if they lose access to their health care or the food assistance they rely on to feed their families. It’s during times like these that I’m reminded of how strong we are when we come together to fight for what's right. We still have our work cut out for us — there's no denying that. But with this strong grassroots team behind me, I feel all the more empowered to keep up the fight. And I promise, Peter, I will never stop fighting for you in Washington. Thank you for everything, Tammy | [DONATE](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4438?c0=stb-em-july25.PrghHS&refcode=AU_STB_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20250702_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4851%2E35263%2EsZen-3)

name: Congresswoman Sarah Elfreth
subject: Senate Republicans Pass Least Popular Legislation in Decades
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q1-2025-em?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2025-01-04_1&amount=25]
Yesterday, President Trump and Senate Republicans passed some of their least popular legislation to date - and now the House is trying to rush the bill through. But you don’t have to take my word for it, just look at the numbers. The American people do not like the “Big Beautiful Bill.”
Now, why are Republicans underwater when it comes to this legislation? Let’s take a look at what this bill actually does...
1. Guts Medicaid. This is the single largest loss of health care coverage in American history.
2. Delivers tax breaks for corporations and billionaires. Congressional Republicans have prioritized unprecedented tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy at the expense of working-class Americans.
3. Adds trillions to the deficit. Finally, this legislation isn’t even fiscally responsible.
Make no mistake, I will be voting no when this legislation comes to the House, but we have to keep getting the word out about this deeply unpopular legislation. Will you chip in to be part of the solution? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q2-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-06-29]

Sarah Elfreth

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110751649/555212469/-1384072709?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjFkYjVhOC04MzU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Du5P23gX5KuQ7UQS-ZM6yvoEEuMj-ogvU3SXWbGlBRI=)
HUGE NEWS, Peter: It appears the Republicans have found their pick in CA-27.

**A new GOP candidate just filed papers to run against me — and within hours, Mike Garcia, the Republican I defeated last November, gave him his full-throated endorsement.**

That should tell you everything you need to know about what’s coming. Our race is officially at the center of the fight for House control, and I need your help to respond to this news _immediately._

**[We’ve set an urgent goal of raising $15,000 before we break for the holiday to prepare for the attacks to come. Can I count on your $3 right now to help us hold the line?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110751650/555212470/-1384072709?refcode=em-7.2.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjFkYjVhOC04MzU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Du5P23gX5KuQ7UQS-ZM6yvoEEuMj-ogvU3SXWbGlBRI=)**

Peter, the national GOP is _furious_ that I ousted the last remaining Republican representing Los Angeles County in Congress.

This announcement is sure to come with a surge of attacks and outside spending to take this seat back – and crush our hopes of flipping the House majority.

_Politico_ is already calling this one of the most closely watched races in California, and _The Cook Political Report_ has us ranked among the most competitive in the country.

Only three seats separate control, and we can’t afford to fall behind:

**[That’s why I need your support today. Will you stand with me and chip in $3 to build the war chest we need to defeat the GOP establishment in this race?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110751652/555212472/-1384072709?refcode=em-7.2.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjFkYjVhOC04MzU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Du5P23gX5KuQ7UQS-ZM6yvoEEuMj-ogvU3SXWbGlBRI=)**

clean_body: | = HUGE NEWS, Peter: It appears the Republicans have found their pick in CA-27. A new GOP candidate just filed papers to run against me — and within hours, Mike Garcia, the Republican I defeated last November, gave him his full-throated endorsement. That should tell you everything you need to know about what’s coming. Our race is officially at the center of the fight for House control, and I need your help to respond to this news immediately. = | **= Peter, the national GOP is furious that I ousted the last remaining Republican representing Los Angeles County in Congress. This announcement is sure to come with a surge of attacks and outside spending to take this seat back – and crush our hopes of flipping the House majority. Politico is already calling this one of the most closely watched races in California, and The Cook Political Report has us ranked among the most competitive in the country. These are great numbers, but there’s no time to celebrate. Jon Ossoff, Chuck Schumer, and the rest of the Left are all seeing the same numbers we are. | | | Bitcoin changed everything. It proved the world was ready to opt out of fiat — to build wealth outside the reach of governments and banks. But it also had major flaws:
* It's backed by nothing but faith
* It's wildly volatile
* And it burns more electricity than Argentina

That was the prototype.
Now comes the masterpiece: [**NatGold is the next evolution**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zrFyszAMB_CnMVs4WbYxDB6-rzkytGm79NKOxsaJGzsQoNC8fc-5HIM0SL_TXzr2wbubIvI_QTx5OxJEwv4RxOvXEoef7_i827y9z_vNtXiNIm3x6UFnXPHF6MB3tf09fxzGz3PlXvbXw0xXPt36dsWP0LyN2oc0ldvMKuYs8KxVVArKy0pQlp0UOql5w4QwhaPQuLIBi0xXrODomG4yrxBQgAREEJRVOTQVM8aBNSVAiUg43HNyHdvBG03HadHD0HUxN13MgjpNUz_eH6sJ1hc9Hbtg89SWbgg2KYJ1l6onWFe0FJISVmvCtoLLklPJs0HZfvEh-LGQhMPxnpjuzwr_AgAA__8m12ia) — a digitally mined token backed by real, verified gold still in the ground. It merges the scarcity and freedom of Bitcoin with the tangible value and trust of gold. And it goes even further: ❌ No physical extraction — the gold stays in the earth

❌ No storage costs, no middlemen

❌ No pollution or environmental harm

✅ Just real gold, digitally secured and globally tradeable Built by a team of former SEC advisors, global mining executives, and institutional blockchain partners trusted by Goldman Sachs.

Only **10,000 NatGold Tokens **are available in this exclusive pre-market round — and they're being offered now at a [**10% discount to gold's Baseline Intrinsic Value.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zrFyszAMB_CnMVs4WbYxDB6-rzkytGm79NKOxsaJGzsQoNC8fc-5HIM0SL_TXzr2wbubIvI_QTx5OxJEwv4RxOvXEoef7_i827y9z_vNtXiNIm3x6UFnXPHF6MB3tf09fxzGz3PlXvbXw0xXPt36dsWP0LyN2oc0ldvMKuYs8KxVVArKy0pQlp0UOql5w4QwhaPQuLIBi0xXrODomG4yrxBQgAREEJRVOTQVM8aBNSVAiUg43HNyHdvBG03HadHD0HUxN13MgjpNUz_eH6sJ1hc9Hbtg89SWbgg2KYJ1l6onWFe0FJISVmvCtoLLklPJs0HZfvEh-LGQhMPxnpjuzwr_AgAA__8m12ia) And NatGold is just getting started. Over **$20 trillion in gold** lies dormant underground — untouched, untapped, and unmonetized. **NatGold unleashes that value — instantly, cleanly, and without ever disturbing the earth.** This isn't just another token. It's the first asset designed to truly ** fix money** — and a rare opportunity to get in before the world catches on. [**Click here to reserve your discounted NatGold Tokens.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zrFyszAMB_CnMVs4WbYxDB6-rzkytGm79NKOxsaJGzsQoNC8fc-5HIM0SL_TXzr2wbubIvI_QTx5OxJEwv4RxOvXEoef7_i827y9z_vNtXiNIm3x6UFnXPHF6MB3tf09fxzGz3PlXvbXw0xXPt36dsWP0LyN2oc0ldvMKuYs8KxVVArKy0pQlp0UOql5w4QwhaPQuLIBi0xXrODomG4yrxBQgAREEJRVOTQVM8aBNSVAiUg43HNyHdvBG03HadHD0HUxN13MgjpNUz_eH6sJ1hc9Hbtg89SWbgg2KYJ1l6onWFe0FJISVmvCtoLLklPJs0HZfvEh-LGQhMPxnpjuzwr_AgAA__8m12ia) To your wealth, Brian Hicks

name: Katie Porter
subject: Billionaires get tax cuts; we get health care cuts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39859%2E3422442%2EFk0qVA)
Dear Derek,
Yesterday, Senate Republicans passed their latest version of the Trump tax giveaway. The bill makes permanent tax cuts for the ultra-wealthy, while slashing over $1 trillion from health care. The House has yet to vote on this bill, but they’re expected to pass it this week.
In practice this means Americans will delay care they need because they can’t afford it. Families will lose their savings because of a medical bill. And overall, costs associated with health care will go up while it becomes harder to access quality care. Some patients will lose their lives—deaths that were completely preventable.
I won’t sugarcoat it, Derek. I’m pissed off.
I’ve long said that California’s next governor is going to have to be a health care governor, and this week’s events in Washington make clear why. We need our state leaders across this country to be a strong line of defense against Trump’s extremism.
My campaign is focused on making life easier and more affordable for Californians—and it’s apparent that we can’t do that without standing up to Trump’s attacks on working families.
**[But, I can’t win this campaign and fight for families without your help. Can you chip in $5 to my campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250702_1_ak?refcode=em20250702-39859&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39859_3422442_Fk0qVA&akid=39859%2E3422442%2EFk0qVA)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250702_1_ak?refcode=em20250702-39859&refcode2=39859_3422442_Fk0qVA&akid=39859%2E3422442%2EFk0qVA)
Onward,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250702-39859&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39859_3422442_Fk0qVA&akid=39859%2E3422442%2EFk0qVA)**

name: Ghazala Hashmi
subject: Three reasons I need your help today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Hi there, it’s VA State Senator Ghazala Hashmi, the Democratic nominee for Lt. Governor of Virginia.

I know you’re getting a lot of emails right now, but if you have a minute, I’d like to share three reasons why I need your help today:
1. I am a fierce champion of Democratic values and have fought for key legislation to improve the lives of all Virginians, including the right to contraception, in-state tuition for all eligible students, and environmental protection. These policies make a real difference in people’s lives.

2. Our campaign has momentum – and with your help, we can set ourselves apart from the rest of the field.

3. During this year’s legislative session, my campaign was blocked from certain activities, including fundraising. So to catch up, I’ve set a goal of raising $5,000 by MIDNIGHT.

[_**Can I count on you to be one of the critical supporters I need to split a donation between my campaign and Senator Mark Warner today? With your help, we will make a difference in Virginians’ clean_body: | | | Hi there, it’s VA State Senator Ghazala Hashmi, the Democratic nominee for Lt. Governor of Virginia. I know you’re getting a lot of emails right now, but if you have a minute, I’d like to share three reasons why I need your help today: 1. I am a fierce champion of Democratic values and have fought for key legislation to improve the lives of all Virginians, including the right to contraception, in-state tuition for all eligible students, and environmental protection. These policies make a real difference in people’s lives. 2. Our campaign has momentum – and with your help, we can set ourselves apart from the rest of the field. 3. During this year’s legislative session, my campaign was blocked from certain activities, including fundraising. So to catch up, I’ve set a goal of raising $5,000 by MIDNIGHT. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically split between Ghazala Hashmi and Mark Warner: = = = = = = Thank you, Ghazala Hashmi **= | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

subject: Can I get your feedback before this goes to President Trump?

body:
#
[https://secure.winred.com/rnc/big-beautiful-bill-survey-jdv-v4-56021364?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=56021364_email&utm_campaign=20250702_bk000011_vance-bbb_vance_rnc&utm_content=gop_survey&amtposition=2&utm_term=lrm-active]

Fellow patriot, I’m proud to announce that the BIG BEAUTIFUL BILL
PASSED THE SENATE!

_We are SO CLOSE to getting it to President Trump’s desk. _

BUT BEFORE I STAND BESIDE HIM AS HE SIGNS IT, I WANT TO MAKE SURE YOU
SUPPORT IT.

WILL YOU TAKE A MINUTE TO TELL ME WHAT YOU THINK ABOUT THE BIG
BEAUTIFUL BILL BEFORE IT GETS TO THE WHITE HOUSE?
[https://secure.winred.com/rnc/big-beautiful-bill-survey-jdv-v4-56021364?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=56021364_email&utm_campaign=20250702_bk000011_vance-bbb_vance_rnc&utm_content=gop_survey&amtposition=2&utm_term=lrm-active]

TAKE THE SURVEY
[https://secure.winred.com/rnc/big-beautiful-bill-survey-jdv-v4-56021364?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=56021364_email&utm_campaign=20250702_bk000011_vance-bbb_vance_rnc&utm_content=gop_survey&amtposition=2&utm_term=lrm-active]

This bill is truly as beautiful as the President says it is.

It’s a clear roadmap to putting America FIRST.

We’re further securing our border, providing tax cuts to hardworking
families, and making sure our country is safe, affordable, and GREAT!

SUPPORT THE BIG BEAUTIFUL BILL
[https://secure.winred.com/rnc/big-beautiful-bill-survey-jdv-v4-56021364?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=56021364_email&utm_campaign=20250702_bk000011_vance-bbb_vance_rnc&utm_content=gop_survey&amtposition=2&utm_term=lrm-active]

I WANT TO MAKE SURE THERE’S A SURGE OF SUPPORT FOR THE BIG BEAUTIFUL
BILL AS PRESIDENT TRUMP GETS READY TO SIGN IT. WILL YOU TAKE OUR
SURVEY NOW AND LET ME KNOW WHAT YOU THINK?
[https://secure.winred.com/rnc/big-beautiful-bill-survey-jdv-v4-56021364?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=56021364_email&utm_campaign=20250702_bk000011_vance-bbb_vance_rnc&utm_content=gop_survey&amtposition=2&utm_term=lrm-active]

TAKE THE SURVEY
[https://secure.winred.com/rnc/big-beautiful-bill-survey-jdv-v4-56021364?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=56021364_email&utm_campaign=20250702_bk000011_vance-bbb_vance_rnc&utm_content=gop_survey&amtposition=2&utm_term=lrm-active]

I can’t wait to see your response!

Thank you,

#
[https://secure.winred.com/rnc/big-beautiful-bill-survey-jdv-v4-56021364?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=56021364_email&utm_campaign=20250702_bk000011_vance-bbb_vance_rnc&utm_content=gop_survey&amtposition=2&utm_term=lrm-active]

We’re further securing our border, providing tax cuts to hardworking families, and making sure our country is safe, affordable, and GREAT! SUPPORT THE BIG BEAUTIFUL BILL [] I WANT TO MAKE SURE THERE’S A SURGE OF SUPPORT FOR THE BIG BEAUTIFUL BILL AS PRESIDENT TRUMP GETS READY TO SIGN IT. WILL YOU TAKE OUR SURVEY NOW AND LET ME KNOW WHAT YOU THINK? [] TAKE THE SURVEY [] I can’t wait to see your response! Thank you, [] JD Vance Vice President of the United States of America Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.GOP.com [] Republican National Committee (RNC), 310 1st Street SE Washington, DC, 20003-1885, US We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Republican Party. Thank you for joining our movement. Reaching grassroots supporters directly is key if we’re going to cut through the Fake News media and spread our conservative message, but if we’re going to do that, we need to provide them with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts. If you want to be one of the FIRST Patriots to get the latest updates on efforts directly from the Republican Party, please make sure to follow us on FACEBOOK [] and TWITTER, [] and TEXT WIN TO 80810.

name: Colin Allred
subject: I have a big announcement, friend!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
I just launched my campaign for U.S. Senate here in Texas
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110753214/555217985/-2086767772?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5565-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTY1MTdlNy04ODU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=03vouYIwAPgA30-wkw1iH2Co3tCuKn-dpf7Ike3Ib3E=)
Hi friend, it’s Colin Allred. I just launched my campaign for U.S. Senate here in Texas, and I’d love to take just a moment to explain to you why I’m running again:
**I’m running for Senate to fight for working families, not tax cuts for billionaires.** I’ve heard and seen so much frustration about what’s going on in Washington right now. I know Texans are struggling, but Congress is more focused on cutting taxes for the wealthy than lowering prices for everyday families. That needs to change.
**I’m running for Senate to give every kid in Texas and across America the opportunities that were given to me.** I was raised by a single mom who often worked two jobs to make ends meet, and I’ve gone on to play in the NFL, graduate law school, work for President Obama, and make it to Congress.
**And I’m running for Senate because we have a real shot to win in Texas** – in fact, the first two polls in this race show me already in the lead!
But if we're going to win, we need to build on the historic grassroots movement we created last year. And that means I need you on this team from the very start – early momentum can make or break our campaign.
[**That’s why my team and I set a critical goal of raising $1 million in the first few days of my campaign and why I’m personally asking for your help. Can you rush $5 or more right now to be split between me and Jacky Rosen? Together we can fight to bring real leadership back to Texas.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110753216/555217986/-2086767772?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5565-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTY1MTdlNy04ODU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=03vouYIwAPgA30-wkw1iH2Co3tCuKn-dpf7Ike3Ib3E=)

Yassamin Ansari — proud representative of Arizona’s 3rd Congressional District and the first Iranian-American Democrat elected to serve in Congress.

Maxwell said I could reach out today, because right-wing conspiracy theorist Laura Loomer just attacked me on X.
[](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/bo_2X8_ZbY92xJYDs8IZdA~~/AAPPABA~/Q4XAtK6H2qjSs61UAIziFgxBKxKDSwnZloBsnPXspkJJGEStP8fg13KBKt9rwQGpBJrmYIwDydoNSlzURWHLQOIO0SxdkgXDM3QOgz5BmHjHKr38TNNszdNRofYCSb3XPPU-k5vzrX7OYuxEI4Fk7xUssC-_O7JEWy8pmhn7EWkOFDckOQgUBX6GLykEpGM1eIhVkjKLjPRoSSpRITQHcc1nJXzWmd-z19RBPzIniH_ccAZo4xS8zicVZZM0c8spL2Njr1zQ3CLrtFTDnJPrOHMdHUlzssYMxKu4NVmAP_DIGduk5wV1G-DtawL7GrqQaF6BlwvHgUKH_ZD3zfxK3HXhbVleF1WBgRO0DijmCzqHlgFre1SUycWWUCBPwIhx) 👆 This was Laura Loomer’s disturbing and downright racist response after I called her out for her disgusting hate speech calling for mass deportations of Muslim immigrants.

Peter, I was born in Seattle to U.S. citizen parents. I’m proudly agnostic and proudly Iranian-American.

Let me be abundantly clear: Assumptions, accusations, and threats like these are dangerous. **Speech like this incites violence that can cost lives.**

It’s obvious why Laura Loomer and other right-wing activists are coming after me. They want to silence any person who is calling this extreme administration exactly what it is: _a fascist dictatorship._

While the Trump administration recklessly catapults us into another endless war, thwarts due process and free speech at home, and dismantles the foundations of our democracy, far-right extremists are working overtime to prevent us from speaking out.
[**_But Maxwell and I are not backing down. Maxwell said I could reach out today, because right-wing conspiracy theorist Laura Loomer just attacked me on X. 👆 This was Laura Loomer’s disturbing and downright racist response after I called her out for her disgusting hate speech calling for mass deportations of Muslim immigrants. Peter, I was born in Seattle to U.S. citizen parents. I’m proudly agnostic and proudly Iranian-American. Let me be abundantly clear: Assumptions, accusations, and threats like these are dangerous. They want to silence any person who is calling this extreme administration exactly what it is: a fascist dictatorship. To help alleviate anxiety or confusion on how to contact your member of Congress, I called today and recorded myself to show you how simple and easy it truly is. We still have a chance to stop this monstrosity from becoming law, but we need to act immediately. **Let 's Address This.**
**If you support my human rights advocacy and efforts to uphold justice, I invite you to subscribe as a free or paid subscriber and elevate our platform!**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..O5LxEH21UFzCVzlkhErTbY9fKtpAIqf0s-LMrza06gA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=167387613)
**STEP 1:** Watch my short 2 minute video on how to call your member of Congress.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a27d0634-aace-445a-acda-2dabc4b6ff7d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**STEP 2:** Click on this link to get started with your own phone call.
[Click to Start Calling Congress](https://substack.com/redirect/ca273e46-79bc-4956-a94b-84dd83d5aea9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**STEP 3:** Use this script to speak to your member of Congress, or to leave a message.
> Hi, my name is [Your Name], and I'm a voter from [Your City, ZIP Code].
> I'm calling to urge you to vote **NO** on the Republican reconciliation bill. This bill is a disaster for working families. It guts nearly a trillion dollars from Medicaid, strips coverage from 17 million Americans, attacks the Affordable Care Act, and defunds Planned Parenthood--all just to give tax breaks to billionaires.
> It also kicks millions off SNAP and slashes green energy funding, eliminating tens of thousands of good-paying jobs.
> This bill doesn't reflect the values of your constituents. I'm asking you to do the right thing and oppose it.
> Thank you.
**STEP 4:** Forward this post to your family and friends, and post it on your social media. The number one reason anyone takes action is because someone they trust asked them to take action. Be that trusted person in your circle that inspires others to act.
**STEP 5:** If in your capacity, be sure to [subscribe to support my efforts](https://substack.com/redirect/623202d9-6d34-4249-946e-f33b07aa67c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to continue to combat these injustices.
Thank you for your trust and support. Let's go out and protect our nation from harm and injustice.

The number one reason anyone takes action is because someone they trust asked them to take action. Be that trusted person in your circle that inspires others to act. STEP 5: If in your capacity, be sure to to continue to combat these injustices. Thank you for your trust and support. Let's go out and protect our nation from harm and injustice. Yesterday, we were proud to launch “Operation Virginia Victory,” a coordinated campaign that will help elect Democratic candidates across the Commonwealth in November. We know that mobilizing and engaging voters in every corner of the Commonwealth will be the difference in whether we win in November, so that’s why we are hitting the ground running with initiatives like these:

GOP Rep. Tim Burchett **[utterly destroyed CNN's Kaitlan Collins](https://substack.com/redirect/2a58ffd1-d8d0-4fcd-b7e7-1a02fe3e9f0e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during a tense live sit down about President Trump's Big Beautiful Bill Medicaid reforms, reducing fraud and abuse in the healthcare system.
She wasn't ready for this one bit...
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/2a58ffd1-d8d0-4fcd-b7e7-1a02fe3e9f0e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2a58ffd1-d8d0-4fcd-b7e7-1a02fe3e9f0e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"So you are 100% confident that if this bill passes, maybe by Friday, that no one who is qualified for Medicade will lose funding to it, like the concerns that some of your fellow Republicans have?" Collins asked Burchett.
"No I'm not concerned, I trust in what is in the legislation," Burchett answered. "I've looked through the fact and the numbers and again I think the CBO is completely wrong they're not taking into account fraudulent behavior. What does the Democrat Party have against someone who is able bodied, **[getting out and getting a dad-gum job?!!"](https://substack.com/redirect/2a58ffd1-d8d0-4fcd-b7e7-1a02fe3e9f0e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

# **[Deep State Fires A Warning Shot At Your Vote And Your Future](https://substack.com/redirect/f0756fc7-dcd1-4498-aec1-db5a2042ca10?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f0756fc7-dcd1-4498-aec1-db5a2042ca10?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

It wasn't long ago there was an attempt to _**put Trump behind bars**_.
To _**bankrupt him**_ through legal fees.
And to _**even assassinate him**_ ... twice!
But President Trump has prevailed each and every time. And despite having overcome these hits, one after another, the battle may still be far from over.
President Trump has repeatedly stated he wants to _**"demolish the deep state, "**_ and claims this to be his _**" final battle"**_**** against these shadowy figures.
But the truth is... the battle may have only just begun.
Rogue Judges across the country have tried to stop his actions at every turn. Congress hasn't been much help in passing his legislation, and the media is at his throat like always.
So, _**how will Trump bring prosperity to the American People**_ while the Deep State runs rampant, putting up roadblocks for everything he does for America?
_**Will he be able to succeed in Making America Great Again?**_
Only time will tell, but thousands of American Patriots are preparing themselves for a worse case scenario. They _ARE NOT_ leaving things up to chance. They are helping to _**protect themselves**_ in case the Deep State has one more potential _ace up their sleeve._

# Trump admin bails out Newsom's California for riot damage
The Trump administration **[approved disaster aid to address an estimated $1 billion in damage](https://substack.com/redirect/7b53505a-f441-4b66-a4b2-e37ba4f0fe68?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** from anti-ICE riots that hit Los Angeles in June, with the Small Business Administration allowing affected businesses to apply for up to $2 million in loans.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7b53505a-f441-4b66-a4b2-e37ba4f0fe68?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Where It All Started:** The riots began June 6 and involved violent mobs lighting fires and assaulting law enforcement during immigration enforcement operations, while Democrats criticized federal efforts to help.

* **Political Battle:** Governor Gavin Newsom blamed Trump for the violence, claiming he "deliberately sowed chaos" by deploying National Guard troops and Marines to restore order, while Trump officials accused Newsom of "siding with criminal illegal aliens" and allowing "a mob to rampage Los Angeles." The SBA had publicly urged Newsom to accept disaster relief on June 9, four days into the riots.
* **Federal Response and Investigation:** Beyond providing disaster funding, the Trump administration is tracing funding behind the riots for potential criminal prosecutions, with SBA Administrator Kelly Loeffler saying Newsom "refused federal relief for weeks" while standing with "violent rioters, paid protestors, and criminal illegal aliens." Los Angeles officials estimated at least $32 million in direct costs to the city from police response, lost tourism, and property damage.
