* * *
# Sec McMahon says UPenn Title IX ruling marks huge win in fight for women's sports
U.S. Education Secretary Linda McMahon **[announced a resolution with the University of Pennsylvania](https://substack.com/redirect/3a946509-47bc-412c-aeb3-35fabd60a51b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** over its handling of the transgender swimmer Lia Thomas case, marking a major move in the Trump administration's push to bar trans athletes from women's sports.
_" She should have walked away with that... and that just didn't happen," _McMahon said, referencing Riley Gaines' tie with Thomas at the 2022 NCAA championships.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3a946509-47bc-412c-aeb3-35fabd60a51b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **The Education Department determined that UPenn violated Title IX** and froze $175 million in federal funding until the university agreed to ban transgender athletes from women's teams and apologize to impacted athletes. "It's actually just the right thing to do... men should not compete in women's sports," McMahon said.
* **The administration is pursuing similar actions against states like Maine, California, and Minnesota,** which have resisted Trump's Title IX interpretation. "There are federal funds that have been withheld... there's penalties involved," McMahon warned.
* **McMahon also confirmed an ongoing investigation into San Jose State University** over its handling of former trans volleyball player Blaire Fleming, amid misconduct allegations and a high-profile legal standoff involving the Mountain West Conference.

* * *
# **N.Y. driving school accused of scam fast-tracking licenses for illegal immigrants**
T&E Driving School in Queens paid off DMV examiners on Staten Island to fraudulently fast-track driver's licenses for illegal immigrants, many of whom were Chinese nationals who couldn't speak English or even drive, **[the NY Post reports](https://substack.com/redirect/369124a5-c797-4c33-b333-c35fe0db8dd6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
* **The school reportedly guaranteed licenses** "regardless of their immigration status, language, and even their ability to operate a vehicle," using social media to target and exploit Chinese community members.

* **Widespread Corruption Network:** The scheme involved T&E Driving School owner Weixian Tan, three employees, and three DMV examiners who rubber-stamped applicants without requiring actual road tests. Prosecutors believe the scam affected "hundreds if not thousands" of people, noting that individual examiners can conduct about 1,500 tests per year and two of the corrupt examiners had been working for four to five years.
* **Ongoing Investigation:** Operation Road Test resulted in 24 suspects in custody with more expected, as prosecutors call this "just the tip of the iceberg." The defendants face fraud, tampering, and theft charges but were released without bail under New York's 2019 criminal justice reforms, though they must surrender their passports while the joint investigation with Homeland Security continues.

The defendants face fraud, tampering, and theft charges but were released without bail under New York's 2019 criminal justice reforms, though they must surrender their passports while the joint investigation with Homeland Security continues. This bill will be a huge win for hard-working American families, and I applaud President Trump and Republicans in Congress for standing strong on our behalf. Let's get it done. | [](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=9bf320fd319f4fb2890f37261830034c&_e=4Zh7HenKhnGNc-2r-LJFqgb_t-gap-3bK5AotDtvXguI78zs2_H5Yim6l7DMwKlOTvHU-qIaRnioLFFiJiAPS3pp_L5osy-_eSW5LN-h0lnYZalYBMeyrwURpAIj0_V3_YNJo4ae0Db0qdTjV7p93TmcHPw7IWAZFtMxmck-c7qR7h1GJSbWe2-c6xrpS_Sq9cWTBLiVBFOr-pv5qwSPnovl6fD8Kge3tYl4Va5U6VQpWArg-BY5PThF7Law6dozyZUo62gl7FD8fEhnNa0O-c1h_wIatn2m20cEmOnFub200H-0xEYxGkMYyTcq6K4qtlii7vXAgdec5KY-nSjl5P5Zz-M9gbRIMS443mS3Snds8leKeIkXkyMkmnO_lLN-37tmFHZ_m70yKo8JgcDaKXs-hyInsNmgHqsWQK_vZn8_rL2aTvP8Okj6UNBJCLhgO_aBMxgB2wDuSRbl9IlonxU8_Iz0bKtlmFKX28MV36Ew9C_z4l337wCuX5e0aXvRYlYUK96_eposbYSNAsRtfILdjDEfs1q5b_6IBxHsQ_PeKEKuJO6bHajRfsQCH7E9yRt_RnPyJnlGtr8rX6QTeirdZt16V4pIWf6I9i71NRhI8KIFNI19UVA0QQWVpRLj-76NXl9QdCWTcvpXtk6uAXpIWstmk9ipuR5elODloIt7xVAii1NZYQfFIc6oaqgUUvGtprbOoGK_VNX2QEz9KA%3D%3D)

Friend

The Senate has passed the One Big Beautiful Bill and it is now before the House of Representatives for their consideration.

I want to share with you the Op-Ed I just had published on why Congress should pass the OBBB and send it to President Trump for his signature.

This bill will be a huge win for hard-working American families, and I applaud President Trump and Republicans in Congress for standing strong on our behalf.

Let's get it done.

--Marty

* * *
[](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=9bf320fd319f4fb2890f37261830034c&_e=4Zh7HenKhnGNc-2r-LJFqlTqBhQOD6AW5e2mXJGtZ0N-ItkjTtzk-R00_yUbcAcW8rsSDSTTueFDXwwlbKH6ZokDVaYTWHf2j7czB7T-Uvzs637ZKVWUZV6EXPF-IQRrtmd7IJeq51NUJFiz6IJcCUkRfy2F7T1BcjXjvF0_0NAcQ36RfEY_EJJ3qgJDFPAOO4_i7YWJ8_9QLuxTbloESDeAb9Nxek1EvjylDo5BV8AHGKFLNXm8RAAp0u0cJ1mv9KkfA_ChDa8vhqWUcVD6zqHoVn3UIYR2h36122XhBbSjii5kxZMHA0c3n58vfucqjsYGcRbwNTg8JbkpBLtcaCaht0S3WnMmOPQjeuI_xhNRdwvEP16lbLwew3JjNkFSWTN5bksfqYUFVSrHYlLzaxdhR2C60ks0SGY5aiYLXSLJfxne5_w_K8jp5Oz6EMT42plJklpqyk12OFXtDALoq2dbR25506eew3Yn3GXz4NSGLra0mMHcyyx7ywZE49U_1F53bI9T6x4s60KM5rnrQQ%3D%3D)
**Op-Ed: Marty O’Donnell: The Big Beautiful Bill delivers for Nevada’s working families**
Jul 01, 2025

My philosophy on government is simple and can be summed up with a fable we are likely all familiar with from our childhood: The Goose that Laid the Golden Egg.

You remember the story, don’t you? Once upon a time there was a farmer and his wife who had a goose. The goose laid eggs and one day the goose laid a solid gold egg. The farmer and his wife sold it for a lot of money and got filthy rich. They waited and waited for the next golden egg. The goose took too long, and the farmer and his wife got impatient, so they decided to cut the goose open to get the rest of the golden eggs.

What did they get instead? A dead goose.

The moral of the story is that you have to nurture and care for the goose if you want it to lay more golden eggs. In our country, and my state of Nevada, middle class families and small businesses are the goose. Through their hard work, our society enjoys prosperity, innovation, and healthy communities.

Sadly, for far too long, the federal government, big corporations, and big unions have taken advantage of the goose.

But who appreciates the goose? President Donald Trump — and that is why I am excited that his One Big Beautiful Bill is nearing the finish line. The Big Beautiful Bill is a huge win for the goose.

This bill isn’t another bloated piece of legislation that allows special interests to feed at the trough. It is a commonsense overhaul of our government that puts working people ahead of the corporations and their highly paid lobbyists.

For the folks I am running to represent in southern Nevada, this bill provides more take-home pay, more security, and more opportunity for them to prosper.

Let’s start with tip workers. I’ve talked to countless bartenders, servers, and hospitality staff in my district who rely on their tips to pay for their education, provide food for the table, and sign their children up to play hockey. Too often, they have to take on a second or third job just to make ends meet.

One good job should be enough to provide for your family.

The elimination of federal taxes on tips in the Big Beautiful Bill is a game-changer for Nevada’s service economy. If you earn it, you keep it. It’s that simple. And it is the right thing to do.

Big Beautiful doesn’t stop there. This bill ends federal taxes on overtime pay, too. That’s good news for union workers, tradesmen, nurses, and law enforcement officers. These workers help make our community the best place to live. They shouldn’t be penalized for their hard work that has driven our growth; they should be rewarded.

Big Beautiful isn’t just about putting money back in the pockets of the goose, it also takes real action on protecting their neighborhoods by securing our southern border. Because the Biden administration allowed our border to be wide open, lawlessness has strained our communities.

Under Joe Biden, fentanyl ravaged our streets and the overwhelmed immigration system allowed violent criminals to roam our streets while punishing legal applicants and rewarding chaos. The Big Beautiful Bill includes strong funding for border wall construction, additional border patrol agents, and modern surveillance tools to fulfill President Trump’s promise to put an end to illegal border crossings once and for all.

Naturally, politicians like my opponent, Susie Lee, who have made a career of abusing the goose are attacking this bill through lies and fear. No, people who need Medicaid won’t lose coverage. In fact, by not allowing illegal immigrants or childless, able-bodied people to abuse this vital program, Medicaid will be protected for those who need it most.

I will never understand why people like Susie Lee are lying to you and seemingly comfortable with putting Medicaid at risk for millions of people that need it just to protect coverage for people in this country illegally.

As someone who spent years meeting payroll, not writing policy memos, I can tell you this: We don’t need politically ambitious people like Susie Lee in Congress. We need leaders who understand that the life of the goose who lays the golden eggs should be prioritized. I’m running to represent the goose, not myself or the special interests who would cut the goose open to enrich themselves further.

Congress needs to get the Big Beautiful Bill to President Trump’s desk this week. It’s time to reward the goose and show it how much it means to the health and prosperity of this country and southern Nevada.

_Marty O’Donnell is a former small business owner and is a Republican candidate for Congress in Nevada’s 3rd District. He is a music composer and audio designer best known for his work on the Halo and Destiny video games as well as jingles for products such as Mr. Clean and Flintstones Chewable Vitamins._

* * *

[ **DONATE**](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=9bf320fd319f4fb2890f37261830034c&_e=4Zh7HenKhnGNc-2r-LJFqgb_t-gap-3bK5AotDtvXguI78zs2_H5Yim6l7DMwKlOTvHU-qIaRnioLFFiJiAPS3pp_L5osy-_eSW5LN-h0lnYZalYBMeyrwURpAIj0_V3_YNJo4ae0Db0qdTjV7p93TmcHPw7IWAZFtMxmck-c7qR7h1GJSbWe2-c6xrpS_Sq9cWTBLiVBFOr-pv5qwSPnovl6fD8Kge3tYl4Va5U6VQpWArg-BY5PThF7Law6dozdbF0BdUHUygnkPvxpdhhPRerrKE-imubAcVZFebE-AzQLs6aRgi0VPeJ6sq01mlidz_I2b1d-seREmBbykVo2pqVgtgDB95Sviq4eXbefbA4TTV38Z2YKxq96FpooJ7f-0cq1ckBfTikkNChOCEu6tsSagQQL2d5XNaBkJPRE2ZR8lVOYC_fxA2w2Np54D9ArttyiLdnW4jfpeA1mOm21Yt5XLfbSxCBBy4X5NI38lq9op9luNKKbRy5E_63s3LO1Sj6Rv_Lb4JNRhHHo9hbPng3b8bLQwz5pZkuuHVfvcunK2xsEBE0GJmfNUPQ91XAYQymYB2hw9Wam25tQMWu-vr54g9bRFgMB7pKZ76-h-OUbqIGG-MTL8keYbM3KlgmBxgya5hALXJfX9NjXG7iFLqiebuvBOCQ-uixT_Tg-zbMgGNIFDQCeiQZPm5FcMQj0oMr7yBj2T1VgpVywpJm8Q%3D%3D)

| **ABOUT MARTY**
**Marty O’Donnell isn’t a politician** and he’s not taking any corporate PAC money. Marty will give us a voice – not special interests or Wall Street. It’s time to turn our nation around to make life better for Nevadans.

**Marty O’Donnell has an ear for solving problems.** He’s an award-winning composer who wrote the iconic soundtracks for the video games Halo and Destiny. Marty will cut through the noise in DC.

**Marty O’Donnell will be a champion for Nevada families.** As a husband, father, and grandfather, Marty can’t sit on the sidelines as local families struggle because of the problems created by Big Government.

clean_body: This bill will be a huge win for hard-working American families, and I applaud President Trump and Republicans in Congress for standing strong on our behalf. Let's get it done. | Friend The Senate has passed the One Big Beautiful Bill and it is now before the House of Representatives for their consideration. I want to share with you the Op-Ed I just had published on why Congress should pass the OBBB and send it to President Trump for his signature. This bill will be a huge win for hard-working American families, and I applaud President Trump and Republicans in Congress for standing strong on our behalf. Let's get it done. --Marty Op-Ed: Marty O’Donnell: The Big Beautiful Bill delivers for Nevada’s working families Jul 01, 2025 My philosophy on government is simple and can be summed up with a fable we are likely all familiar with from our childhood: The Goose that Laid the Golden Egg. You remember the story, don’t you? Once upon a time there was a farmer and his wife who had a goose. The goose laid eggs and one day the goose laid a solid gold egg. The farmer and his wife sold it for a lot of money and got filthy rich. They waited and waited for the next golden egg. The goose took too long, and the farmer and his wife got impatient, so they decided to cut the goose open to get the rest of the golden eggs. What did they get instead? A dead goose. The moral of the story is that you have to nurture and care for the goose if you want it to lay more golden eggs. In our country, and my state of Nevada, middle class families and small businesses are the goose. Through their hard work, our society enjoys prosperity, innovation, and healthy communities. Sadly, for far too long, the federal government, big corporations, and big unions have taken advantage of the goose. But who appreciates the goose? President Donald Trump — and that is why I am excited that his One Big Beautiful Bill is nearing the finish line. The Big Beautiful Bill is a huge win for the goose. This bill isn’t another bloated piece of legislation that allows special interests to feed at the trough. It is a commonsense overhaul of our government that puts working people ahead of the corporations and their highly paid lobbyists. For the folks I am running to represent in southern Nevada, this bill provides more take-home pay, more security, and more opportunity for them to prosper. Let’s start with tip workers. I’ve talked to countless bartenders, servers, and hospitality staff in my district who rely on their tips to pay for their education, provide food for the table, and sign their children up to play hockey. Too often, they have to take on a second or third job just to make ends meet. One good job should be enough to provide for your family. The elimination of federal taxes on tips in the Big Beautiful Bill is a game-changer for Nevada’s service economy. If you earn it, you keep it. It’s that simple. And it is the right thing to do. Big Beautiful doesn’t stop there. This bill ends federal taxes on overtime pay, too. That’s good news for union workers, tradesmen, nurses, and law enforcement officers. These workers help make our community the best place to live. They shouldn’t be penalized for their hard work that has driven our growth; they should be rewarded. Big Beautiful isn’t just about putting money back in the pockets of the goose, it also takes real action on protecting their neighborhoods by securing our southern border. Because the Biden administration allowed our border to be wide open, lawlessness has strained our communities. Under Joe Biden, fentanyl ravaged our streets and the overwhelmed immigration system allowed violent criminals to roam our streets while punishing legal applicants and rewarding chaos. The Big Beautiful Bill includes strong funding for border wall construction, additional border patrol agents, and modern surveillance tools to fulfill President Trump’s promise to put an end to illegal border crossings once and for all. Naturally, politicians like my opponent, Susie Lee, who have made a career of abusing the goose are attacking this bill through lies and fear. No, people who need Medicaid won’t lose coverage. In fact, by not allowing illegal immigrants or childless, able-bodied people to abuse this vital program, Medicaid will be protected for those who need it most. I will never understand why people like Susie Lee are lying to you and seemingly comfortable with putting Medicaid at risk for millions of people that need it just to protect coverage for people in this country illegally. As someone who spent years meeting payroll, not writing policy memos, I can tell you this: We don’t need politically ambitious people like Susie Lee in Congress. We need leaders who understand that the life of the goose who lays the golden eggs should be prioritized. I’m running to represent the goose, not myself or the special interests who would cut the goose open to enrich themselves further. Congress needs to get the Big Beautiful Bill to President Trump’s desk this week. It’s time to reward the goose and show it how much it means to the health and prosperity of this country and southern Nevada. Marty O’Donnell is a former small business owner and is a Republican candidate for Congress in Nevada’s 3rd District. He is a music composer and audio designer best known for his work on the Halo and Destiny video games as well as jingles for products such as Mr. Clean and Flintstones Chewable Vitamins. | ABOUT MARTY Marty O’Donnell isn’t a politician and he’s not taking any corporate PAC money. Marty will give us a voice – not special interests or Wall Street. It’s time to turn our nation around to make life better for Nevadans. Marty O’Donnell has an ear for solving problems. He’s an award-winning composer who wrote the iconic soundtracks for the video games Halo and Destiny. Marty will cut through the noise in DC. Marty O’Donnell will be a champion for Nevada families. As a husband, father, and grandfather, Marty can’t sit on the sidelines as local families struggle because of the problems created by Big Government. | PAID FOR BY MARTY FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

clean_body: Correct me if I'm wrong... But it feels like every time you turn on the TV, hop online, or scroll through the headlines, there are SCORES of news stories of Liberal activists burning our flag, attacking cops, or rioting in support of lunatics who hate this country. I don't know about you but it makes me sick to my stomach and worried for America. The country we know and love is under threat right now by a Liberal Mob that knows no bounds. They think they can get away with pitting us against each other, sacrificing American values on the altar of their woke agenda, and forcing their will on the American People. But hear this: They will NEVER get away with it! I'm going to make sure of that. Look: The Liberal Mob is raking in BOATLOADS of cash to obliterate our House and Senate Majorities and block EVERYTHING our President tries to pass through Congress. They're even scheming to impeach and remove him from office once and for all. I know going head-to-head with the Liberal Mob is no easy feat - standing up for what is right is never easy. It certainly wasn't in 1776 when our Founding Fathers took on the most powerful monarchy in the world... But if we want to save our country from falling back to radical tyranny, it's incumbent on all of us to step up. I'm counting on you to help me out. God bless you and God Bless America, - Steve STEVE SCALISE Majority Leader \- Democrat Leadership formed an anti-Trump task force \- More than a dozen Attorneys General are suing the Trump Administration \- A House Democrat just introduced 7 Articles of Impeachment If they manage to strip us of our House Majority, they'll have the power to impeach, investigate, and bring his entire legislative agenda to a SCREECHING HALT! subject: 22 years of nothing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110754025/555221115/-1591572682?refcode=250702_MFC_Annie_22YearsOfNothing&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTkxNTc1ZC04ZDU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6FaMK7khXCXDgD-8Ecdw51LFkTEduHlr9FEsJEyON-w=) Friend, I’m Dr. Annie Andrews, a pediatrician, a mom of three, and the Democrat running for U.S. Senate to defeat Republican Lindsey Graham in South Carolina. If we flip this seat, we can end Lindsey Graham’s career and help Democrats retake the Senate, and expand the map for Democrats in future elections I know this won’t be easy. But I’ve treated kids who were shot, hospitalized, and failed by broken systems. Nothing about this moment feels optional. [**We need an overwhelming surge of grassroots support in these early days to prove that we can finally defeat Lindsey Graham. So I’m humbly asking: Will you chip in a split donation of $50, $25, or even a $3 donation between Seth Moulton and my campaign before midnight to become a Founding Donor of my campaign? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110754026/555221116/1094341437?refcode=250702_MFC_Annie_22YearsOfNothing&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTkxNTc1ZC04ZDU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6FaMK7khXCXDgD-8Ecdw51LFkTEduHlr9FEsJEyON-w=) Let me introduce myself. I’ve spent nearly 20 years serving my community as a pediatrician, treating everything from asthma and violent trauma to the emotional toll of growing up in poverty. I’ve seen what bad policy does to good families — and I’ve seen kids suffer because people like Lindsey Graham would rather protect their own power than protect children. In 2022, after 15 years of working in hospitals, I ran for Congress because I knew our kids needed a voice in Washington. I lost — and I told my oldest daughter I wouldn’t run again. But then Trump’s chaos came back. And Lindsey Graham? He cheered. The truth is, I’m scared. And I’m angry. And I’m done waiting. So I’m stepping up — because our kids, and this country can’t afford another six years of Lindsey Graham. I’m building a people-powered campaign to flip South Carolina and give kids the voice they deserve. And I need your help. [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110754027/555221117/-1591572682?refcode=250702_MFC_Annie_22YearsOfNothing&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTkxNTc1ZC04ZDU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6FaMK7khXCXDgD-8Ecdw51LFkTEduHlr9FEsJEyON-w=) Thank you — from the bottom of my heart. This campaign is for the kids, but it only works with you in it. Until the kids are alright, Dr. Annie Andrews
Democratic Candidate for U.S. Senate

name: Team NDRC
subject: How Donald Trump and Marjorie Taylor Greene are attacking fair maps right now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
This is one of the most blatant, outrageous attacks we’ve seen on fair maps and a fair census.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110754209/555221819/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzODg3MjI5LThmNTctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=M6CoR-glhmzoiVRVrZAkFaY6irmAegdfpQQ2TRc_Ax0=&emci=5509ca45-8957-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=03887229-8f57-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, We’ve seen plenty of attacks on fair maps and a fair census — but this is one of the most destructive. Extreme MAGA Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene (R-GA) is planning to introduce a bill to mandate a new, distorted census that would directly violate the Constitution by excluding non-citizens. She wants this to happen now, ahead of the regular once-a-decade schedule, and her proposed bill would then force states to **“immediately begin a redistricting of all U.S. House seats”** based on that warped census — in a blatant attempt to give Republicans an unearned advantage to cling onto power by manipulating maps all over America, leading to less representation for communities with higher populations of immigrants and undocumented people. And guess what: **Donald Trump is on board.** | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110754210/555221820/-575129389?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_MTGBillRR_email_20250702-NDRC-Tier1-MTGBillRR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250702-NDRC-Tier1-MTGBillRR_&utm_campaign=MTGBillRR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzODg3MjI5LThmNTctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=M6CoR-glhmzoiVRVrZAkFaY6irmAegdfpQQ2TRc_Ax0=)
---
“We love it,” he said when asked on TV about her bill. “I know all about it.”
Let’s be clear about what’s happening: **Donald Trump and Marjorie Taylor Greene are directly attacking fair maps. They want to order a new census and manipulate district lines to keep Republicans in power and quash opposition to their extreme and reckless agenda.**
[**Our movement is working to ensure an accurate count that leads to fair representation. Donate now to fight back against unconstitutional and outrageous attacks on fair maps and a fair census.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110754211/555221821/-575129389?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_MTGBillRR_email_20250702-NDRC-Tier1-MTGBillRR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250702-NDRC-Tier1-MTGBillRR_&utm_campaign=MTGBillRR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzODg3MjI5LThmNTctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=M6CoR-glhmzoiVRVrZAkFaY6irmAegdfpQQ2TRc_Ax0=)
Marjorie Taylor Greene, Donald Trump, and other MAGA Republicans have seen the progress we’ve made to ensure fair maps since the NDRC’s founding.
And they are determined to hit the brakes and reverse course. They want to make our democracy _less representative_ because it helps them hold onto power.
We must hold strong against this brazen attempted power grab — just like how the fair maps movement helped stop a racist, unconstitutional attempt by the Trump administration to manipulate the 2020 Census by adding a citizenship question to it.
Now, they’re determined to try again — and go even farther — in his second term.
Hours after being sworn in, Trump repealed an order that affirmed that everyone in the country should be counted in the U. S. Census.
Republican state attorneys general have also sued to stop the 2030 Census from counting non-citizen residents and those here on temporary visas — in direct violation of the clear text of the Constitution.
Marjorie Taylor Greene’s new proposal is this same playbook on steroids.
**To ensure fair elections with fair maps, we need a fair count in the census, and we must stop anti-democracy assaults like this one from Marjorie Taylor Greene and Donald Trump.**
[**If you’re outraged and ready to fight back for a truly representative democracy, make a contribution right now.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110754212/555221822/-575129389?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_MTGBillRR_email_20250702-NDRC-Tier1-MTGBillRR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250702-NDRC-Tier1-MTGBillRR_&utm_campaign=MTGBillRR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzODg3MjI5LThmNTctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=M6CoR-glhmzoiVRVrZAkFaY6irmAegdfpQQ2TRc_Ax0=)

clean_body: This is one of the most blatant, outrageous attacks we’ve seen on fair maps and a fair census. | Peter, We’ve seen plenty of attacks on fair maps and a fair census — but this is one of the most destructive. Extreme MAGA Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene (R-GA) is planning to introduce a bill to mandate a new, distorted census that would directly violate the Constitution by excluding non-citizens. She wants this to happen now, ahead of the regular once-a-decade schedule, and her proposed bill would then force states to “immediately begin a redistricting of all U.S. House seats” based on that warped census — in a blatant attempt to give Republicans an unearned advantage to cling onto power by manipulating maps all over America, leading to less representation for communities with higher populations of immigrants and undocumented people. And guess what: Donald Trump is on board. | = “We love it,” he said when asked on TV about her bill. “I know all about it.” Let’s be clear about what’s happening: Donald Trump and Marjorie Taylor Greene are directly attacking fair maps. They want to order a new census and manipulate district lines to keep Republicans in power and quash opposition to their extreme and reckless agenda. = Marjorie Taylor Greene, Donald Trump, and other MAGA Republicans have seen the progress we’ve made to ensure fair maps since the NDRC’s founding. And they are determined to hit the brakes and reverse course. They want to make our democracy less representative because it helps them hold onto power. We must hold strong against this brazen attempted power grab — just like how the fair maps movement helped stop a racist, unconstitutional attempt by the Trump administration to manipulate the 2020 Census by adding a citizenship question to it. Now, they’re determined to try again — and go even farther — in his second term. Hours after being sworn in, Trump repealed an order that affirmed that everyone in the country should be counted in the U. S. Census. Republican state attorneys general have also sued to stop the 2030 Census from counting non-citizen residents and those here on temporary visas — in direct violation of the clear text of the Constitution. Marjorie Taylor Greene’s new proposal is this same playbook on steroids. To ensure fair elections with fair maps, we need a fair count in the census, and we must stop anti-democracy assaults like this one from Marjorie Taylor Greene and Donald Trump. = Thank you, The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. clean_body: | | | | United, Organized, and Ready to WIN Friend, No matter what headlines you may read — let me set the record straight: the Republican ticket in Virginia is united, energized, and ready to win. Winsome Earle-Sears. John Reid. Jason Miyares. Three proven commonsense leaders. One unstoppable ticket. There’s no division. No drama. No daylight between us. Just one shared mission: ✅ Secure the Governor’s Mansion ✅ Flip the House of Delegates ✅ Defend our conservative values from the radical left Democrats want nothing more than to divide us. Why? Because they know if we’re united — they’re finished. But campaigns aren’t won on press releases. They’re won with resources. Field staff. Ads. Door knocks. Yard signs. Every dollar matters. | Let the Democrats read their own headlines. We’ll keep writing the story of our victory. For Virginia, Mark J. Peake Chairman, Republican Party of Virginia P.S. The only thing that can stop our momentum is complacency. Don’t sit this one out — | = \- == PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF VIRGINIA

Dr. Patrick Soon-Shiong joins me today to discuss all the interesting things he is doing at the LA Times. The LA Times studio and voices is the new media aspect of the LA Times adding content and culture like never before at the timeless outlet. It's been an uphill journey battling the entrenched bureaucratic voices that aren't privy to change. Dr. Soon-Shiong is a revolutionary and his research into curing cancer is cutting-edge. Since successfully discovering the killer cells in our body's natural immune system, Dr. Soon-Shiong has treated bladder cancer patients successfully for 10 years plus. Dr. Soon-Shiong's patients have a wonderful quality of life and are cancer free. Traditional radiation treatment for cancer is absolutely destroying our natural killer cells and weakening our immune system. The cancer bioshield is a revolutionary treatment that stimulates and proliferates our God-given cancer fighting cells and Dr. Soon-Shiong is ready for it to be available nationwide.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: The largest Medicaid, Medicare, and SNAP cuts in history
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Yesterday, the Senate narrowly passed Donald Trump’s “Big Ugly Bill” in a
50-50 vote with JD Vance serving as the tie-breaker. Now, it’s being
considered in the House as we speak.

We can’t emphasize enough just how devastating this budget would be for
working families and communities across the nation if passed and signed by
Trump. As it stands, the bill would:

* Slash more than $1 trillion from Medicaid, Medicare, and food
assistance — the largest cuts to these programs in U.S. history.

* Increase taxes on working families making $50,000 or less per year
while gifting MASSIVE tax breaks to millionaires and billionaires;

* Give $150 BILLION to ICE and immigration enforcement, beefing up
Trump’s Gestapo and mass deportation efforts;

* Potentially increase energy bills for families by 30% while destroying
our path to clean energy.

Today, Justice Democrats members took to the floor of the House to
introduce amendments to save Medicaid and SNAP from these life-threatening
cuts. They’re doing everything they can to stop this bill.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250702?refcode=em20250702-36810&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36810_1203867_WFFFQB&akid=36810%2E1203867%2EWFFFQB ][IMG]

We’ve seen this before. Republicans are pushing immoral, dangerous
policies that hurt working people. And it won’t stop here.

If we’re going to take back Congress from the GOP’s horrific and cruel
rule, we need Democrats on the ballot who actually inspire voters to
believe in this Party’s ability to fight back against fascism and deliver
a better future for us all.

Recent polls show nearly half of all Americans haven’t even heard of this
bill. With the GOP threatening the largest Medicaid, Medicare, and food
assistance cuts in history, this is a failure of Party leadership.

We need a real opposition party if we ever want to take back the majority.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250702?refcode=em20250702-36810&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36810_1203867_WFFFQB&akid=36810%2E1203867%2EWFFFQB ]Justice Democrats is recruiting and endorsing a new slate of candidates
who will take on Republican fascism with the urgency it demands AND grow
our progressive bloc in Congress. But we need your help to elect them.
Chip in your
first $5 today to help us power our
campaigns to victory in the midterm elections next year.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250702?refcode=em20250702-36810&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36810_1203867_WFFFQB&akid=36810%2E1203867%2EWFFFQB ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250702-36810-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36810_1203867_WFFFQB&akid=36810%2E1203867%2EWFFFQB

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36810%2E1203867%2EWFFFQB

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Colin Allred
subject: I am running for Senate!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110754531/555222978/-84471850?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk5563-bu-seg1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2VlMTNlMS04ZjU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mXOzqIQtGdNJVc5wA2FkwApg4UF0dIrLO59Q__q1Bs0=)
Hi friend, it’s Colin Allred. I just launched my campaign for U.S. Senate here in Texas, I’d love to take just a moment to explain to you why I’m running again:
**I’m running for Senate to fight for working families, not tax cuts for billionaires.** I’ve heard and seen so much frustration about what’s going on in Washington right now. I know Texans are struggling, but Congress is more focused on cutting taxes for the wealthy than lowering prices for everyday families. That needs to change.
**I’m running for Senate to give every kid in Texas and across America the opportunities that were given to me.** I was raised by a single mom who often worked two jobs to make ends meet, and I’ve gone on to play in the NFL, graduate law school, work for President Obama, and make it to Congress.
**And I’m running for Senate because we have a real shot to win in Texas** – in fact, the first two polls in this race show me already in the lead!
But if we're going to win, we need to build on the historic grassroots movement we created last year. And that means I need you on this team from the very start – early momentum can make or break our campaign.
[**That’s why my team and I set a critical goal of raising $1 million in the first few days of my campaign and why I’m personally asking for your help. Can you rush $5 or more right now to be split between me and Raphael Warnock? Together we can fight to bring real leadership back to Texas. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110754532/555222979/-84471850?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk5563-bu-seg1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2VlMTNlMS04ZjU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mXOzqIQtGdNJVc5wA2FkwApg4UF0dIrLO59Q__q1Bs0=)

24 hours left before the LARGEST TRUMP RALLY OF THE YEAR!

[RATE TRUMP NOW](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kU2ToyAQhn8N3rSk8fPgYWctZw-ZquQwVdmTpdBGJoAsotnMr9_STXJ9ebp5Xui0VXK4VyR_IwCjFDMBIOwHATgf-4_vd7z3x_BjehehOP4-pIftGH4-2BVetOHdmh1_xZfD559ZXdMPrnJxEit9Dfi7xRf-uDdC3Um1pXkdiAp4AZwHWNE8pUmZsJIGY8UY8K4oRFfQUmQAWFLsi5SKoe_znMWBrCCGNM5jAKCMxhEbkqzoYsGylBZlTkkS36SJxGQ6Jb68W7SN-KQDVY3e23lXagg0M_LFYXSTxqHYCAKNwRVdOC_OoRHoCDTKhuMQ7ubhbBH5GPZK-u9wLQlrFq9bjUIumrD6US_bwnlaHEfCamVbZdtxeOS807aTF0NY_azResPb_6ufm9txaMVu3ir7nJyMR-MJq7dmHglkrVFSEFbrt9Nw9cvfq9nD_WNZfT-s5tN9nU_nwFXC3qRScs5yksSXTXR_k7WCfwEAAP__LtCp5w)

Senate Republicans just voted 51–50 to pass a massive tax-and-spending package that includes **nearly $1 trillion in Medicaid cuts** , forcing about **12 million Americans** off their health insurance. More than **17 million people** could lose coverage by 2034. Rural hospitals, pregnant women, children, and seniors will be the hardest hit.

When billionaires and MAGA lawmakers prioritize tax breaks for the wealthy over healthcare for families, **communities suffer and lives are lost.**

**This is exactly why we need more Democratic women in office** —leaders who truly understand the stakes and bring empathy, experience, and urgency to every vote.

Emerge is building that bench, including **three Emerge alums** **running for U.S. Senate** right now. Emerge women are ready to defend _your_ health, _your_ family, and _your_ community. Team, Today, the House of Representatives is taking up Donald Trump’s disastrous “Big, Beautiful Bill.” It contains the largest Medicaid cuts in US history, cuts that would strip millions of Americans of their health care coverage and shutter rural hospitals. It will slash food aid for over 40 million low-income Americans. It will increase energy bills for working families — _all while handing billionaires another tax cut._ **It’s a moral disaster. And that’s why we’re watching these three Arizona Republicans closely:**
1. David Schweikert (AZ-1)
2. Eli Crane in (AZ-2)
3. Juan Ciscomani (AZ-6)

David Schweikert, Eli Crane, and Juan Ciscomani have worked in lockstep with Trump’s agenda every step of the way. Regardless of how they vote on Trump’s big, ugly bill, they’ve given Trump a free pass for far too long. They will own this mess. Here’s the good news: **Democrats need to flip just THREE seats to take back the House — and by unseating Schweikert, Crane, and Ciscomani next November, we can deliver Democrats the majority right here in Arizona.** But that work needs to start NOW, so please: [Chip in $3 or any amount to help us flip these 3 key Republican-held seats, win back the House majority, and elect Democrats who will fight for working families, not billionaires.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110755367/555226039/546334298?amount=3&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250702_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmQ1YzQxMjUtOTM1Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0axpV57bJ11DFxV8vVGzr1o-36W9YXzciztCkTrolwE=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[CHIP IN $3 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110755368/555226040/-1963529075?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250702_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmQ1YzQxMjUtOTM1Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0axpV57bJ11DFxV8vVGzr1o-36W9YXzciztCkTrolwE=)**

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: The impact of these town halls
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

First I was in San Antonio,

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250702.6DmEvX&refcode=ema20250702-240201&t=1001&akid=240201%2E444211%2EXTXekL ]Beto O'Rourke speaking to a full auditorium in San Antonio.

then Laredo,

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250702.6DmEvX&refcode=ema20250702-240201&t=1002&akid=240201%2E444211%2EXTXekL ]Beto O'Rourke speaking to room full of seated people in Laredo.

next Tyler,

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250702.6DmEvX&refcode=ema20250702-240201&t=1003&akid=240201%2E444211%2EXTXekL ]Beto O'Rourke speaking to room full of seated people in Tyler.

and most recently, Beaumont.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250702.6DmEvX&refcode=ema20250702-240201&t=1004&akid=240201%2E444211%2EXTXekL ][IMG]

Over the past few days, I’ve had the chance to travel across Texas again,
holding town halls where Texans showed up — not just to listen, but to be
heard.

They shared what they were going through: The man fighting for teachers
attacked by Greg Abbott’s voucher bill; the mother of three young
children, terrified that her daughter doesn’t have rights to her own body;
the mental health worker looking to protect community health services that
are on the chopping block. And that’s just to name a few.

That’s the impact of a town hall. These aren’t soundbites or press
releases — they’re real people with real stakes in what happens next. It
moves you. It compels you to act.

And what I’ve seen is that more and more people are acting. They’re not
waiting for permission, or for the perfect plan. They’re stepping up where
the political establishment has too often stepped back, whether it be
running for school board, registering voters in their neighborhood, or
hosting organizing meetings in their living rooms.

These people didn’t show up because they support a political party or a
candidate. They showed up because they support the United States of
America and won’t sit by just watching the corruption in the Oval Office
unfold.

We’re building a movement, the broadest coalition possible — people who
know that we can’t afford to wait until 2026, and are ready to do the work
necessary for a better future now.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250702.6DmEvX&refcode=ema20250702-240201&amount=3&t=1005&akid=240201%2E444211%2EXTXekL ]If you’re able, I’m asking you to chip in $3 right now
to Powered by People to help keep me on the road hosting more town halls.
Every donation makes a difference.

— Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1006&akid=240201%2E444211%2EXTXekL

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

body:
| | | Patriot, When I served as an Apache pilot in the U.S. Army, my co-pilots were everything to me.

Neither of us could achieve our missions alone, and our unwavering trust in each other helped us get the job done and DEFEND America.

I may be out of the pilot’s seat, but now, I need a co-pilot for our new mission: defending our values and keeping the American Dream alive for the next generation.

name: Team ITT PAC
subject: We have to stop this Big Ugly Bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
In Andy's own words: Ain't nobody getting over this.
Peter,

From the very beginning, Andy has been an opponent of the Trump Reconciliation Bill.

If it passes, it will slash Medicaid coverage, kick **200,000 Kentuckians** off their healthcare, put **35 of Kentucky’s rural hospitals** at risk of closure, and cost our rural communities **20,000 healthcare jobs.**

Entire communities will lose their only emergency rooms. Families will be forced to drive hours for a doctor. Kids, seniors, and people with disabilities will be left without care. And rural communities will lose some of their largest employers and economic drivers.

Andy has stood up and called out leaders in Congress for not listening to their constituents when they raised concerns about this bill. He has pressed them to think of their communities before voting to pass it. _But did they listen?**NO.**_

Republican leaders in the Senate went ahead and passed their bill anyway. And now it’s on members of Congress in the House to stop it.

[**We must raise our voices and tell the Kentucky Congressional delegation to vote NO. Call your representative today and make sure they hear your opposition to this bill.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110755503/555226554/-508116748?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjIzZDBlMTItOTQ1Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jy6POqOmOXxPK695CH-fUpVLGMXR2cyGYwByKtahpoY=&emci=a9fd7cd9-8d57-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=b23d0e12-9457-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=17458827)

Peter — these aren’t numbers on a spreadsheet — they’re parents, grandparents, neighbors, and friends who are at risk of losing their healthcare in favor of tax breaks for the most wealthy Americans.

Andy had a message for these Republicans who passed this bill: **“Ain’t nobody getting over this.”**

Now, we need to show that Andy is right. We won’t forget the leaders who voted to pass this bill, and we’ll fight with everything we’ve got to stop it in the House once and for all.

[**Call your representative today. Tell them you stand against the GOP cuts to Medicaid and to vote NO on this bill.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110755504/555226555/-508116748?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjIzZDBlMTItOTQ1Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jy6POqOmOXxPK695CH-fUpVLGMXR2cyGYwByKtahpoY=&emci=a9fd7cd9-8d57-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=b23d0e12-9457-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=17458827)

Thank you,

Team In This Together PAC | | **Andy and In This Together PAC are working to support leaders who will lead with compassion and decency, reject anger politics, and always do what's right. Will you donate today to support In This Together's mission?** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110755505/555226556/841405539?refcode=em25_250702_medica_fndd_gq_act___ITTPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250702_medica_fndd_gq_act___ITTPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=b23d0e12-9457-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjIzZDBlMTItOTQ1Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jy6POqOmOXxPK695CH-fUpVLGMXR2cyGYwByKtahpoY=)

Thank you, Team In This Together PAC | | Andy and In This Together PAC are working to support leaders who will lead with compassion and decency, reject anger politics, and always do what's right. name: Jason C. Johnson
subject: NEW CASE: New Mexico Officer Charged with Murder
body:
| | | The same city that gave Chance this award is trying to put him in prison for life for doing his job.
---
| |
---
Dear Patriot , That’s me, my three kids, and my husband, Officer Chance Bretches, in the picture I’ve sent you.
---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=eb748e8bcba94150937aa03fc2685828&_e=jHE_2n0u3M6RMRvDGbF-VA3Qase2uAR3gcEF_SIaiHjbcbP9dQFmAOz7TlVeUaOxKlfH-JLSNnAuRCojhZJ-_0N6SbQYK4mm2YZDsMKknud6Vt6ErdJfefDYZHwezWoVuf_PBvUe-JDxRqvT28Bofqa9OTaestz7hdYI2yERoiq4PSzBaokoyGX7iK1P0dHbZBXRHDRbbj_M1-jsWQLgW1J83JIgb1iDcW6wUNU46LTwbtEvlQ79SWIjsHoVHmwUSCojyjeRYiNos3bW4lSYAYlnGQSX6tJs2OQ_mXsdWA-tMFyG7nGPsGLjJCVlqyTAgIXleBqWFZKlDPU1vXBVr3cG3NP56G6vbUtmqItZSz4GD9_Husv8Cjb4TFezV6ExN7COuV8n9pTDPlcLI8OE6qQWrTnICOiHoH0hPET97rA09WOIOPujBSyjqmjLitjmTrFRPXtfHPP-moafCQ72Y7ef9kXa8RqE03ePcb0ODdt0Y3HSGwO9oT5nll-NOeMM6N7PODi_nSsS-_8dFnvrg46zBWOTAoQwFZ4GVX5dYYEPk51oJcC_mvFldcRJF0vOybasMsxNJYZ1l0cDjqNkf8CfEXzMQ52VGpKoKAG86D4ZWdZGGVoF3H54u8PIcDbDZ-xEZW4B18K569SQ6LLUyyMJ1eEMK7OVTVX_jRmG8IdKanLBQSQVrhL-fYs5Te0K)
---
This photo used to be one of my favorites. Now looking at it makes me cry. Because a police-hating, Soros-funded prosecutor... ...is trying to rip my husband away from our family and lock him up for life for doing his job. **[And he might succeed if no one can help us.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=eb748e8bcba94150937aa03fc2685828&_e=jHE_2n0u3M6RMRvDGbF-VA3Qase2uAR3gcEF_SIaiHjbcbP9dQFmAOz7TlVeUaOxKlfH-JLSNnAuRCojhZJ-_0N6SbQYK4mm2YZDsMKknud6Vt6ErdJfefDYZHwezWoVuf_PBvUe-JDxRqvT28Bofqa9OTaestz7hdYI2yERoiq4PSzBaokoyGX7iK1P0dHbZBXRHDRbbj_M1-jsWQLgW1J83JIgb1iDcW6wUNU46LQmePggA0-OlDlDGnEnLwUSJC_shOLUHL6JeksmGGmrdY7MAKnO1Sk_u5BZiC9lLRRkJufy9UPwRwujKsKsl0GkFAwWEPYzIP_PEuN1chSeXW-f4MS4dVOe30MRfmigzHKjoe2eyl6BdfAESx8v7dUw66u1JGOflYzv9KNNGAnAt7EoJWn1y-HHWbgIdrAjiHjE25X7gkVJvWa70pLiCxeEMhcTSKrTgE25xdZ3FP04BK9w7KMEQJTdsslvkCe_7We2GSw5g13XtDcyvK8XcRfI1BEB6v1WWDvEQZevUSzlivJZjCegNrxixMMEk1cIUhCtx6DB5Zy0GFdIzvMqURAOYb1xw58nBVLWbtekrllZ4ESBwDaHxT1bgl1XsT2pq4vmNv_lgf-Ze3lmA7HgLR8DT42c4XjI1-rUNQXNK4TV-INm2gt4ETIEq4LfQQ7lisorKEoKoAzYb95rqWj2gO1M)** I should explain. For nearly 13 years, Chance has been a decorated police officer with the Austin, Texas Police Department. But in May of 2020, our lives were turned upside down. You probably remember what it was like in our country after George Floyd. Violent, fiery anti-police protests were sweeping through cities. Every step of the way, they were cheered on by radical politicians, Soros-funded prosecutors, and the Mainstream Media who lied to us and said, with a straight face, that these riots were “mostly peaceful.” It was especially bad here in Austin, Texas. For three nights in a row, angry, anti-cop mobs rampaged through downtown, smashing windows, burning police cars and looting stores. The crowd attacked officers like my husband who were trying to keep the peace, pelting them with rocks, bricks, and even lit fireworks. On the third night, things got even worse. Protestors shut down the interstate, and a crazed mob surrounded Police Headquarters. Chance and his fellow officers knew that if they didn’t restore order quickly, the headquarters, and maybe even the entire city, might burn to the ground. Following their training, they fired non-lethal weapons – the same “beanbag guns” that police have used for years to break up riots – to stop the violence before things got any worse. The mob slunk off. And my husband made it home safe and sound. But what Chance didn’t know is that one of the beanbags he fired wound up hurting a rioter’s hand. And nearly **TWO YEARS** after my husband helped save our city from being burned to the ground... ...the county prosecutor decided to charge my husband with “aggravated assault by a public servant” – a charge punishable by life in prison. This is the upside-down world we live in now. A world where lawless thugs who fling rocks at police and try to burn our city to the ground get off scot-free... ...while law-abiding officers get criminal charges and face life in prison for following their training and breaking up a mob of rioters. What are cops like my husband supposed to do when faced with this kind of out-of-control violence?! When Chance told me about the charges, I went from disbelief to anger to despair...and back again. But it all started to make sense when we learned the prosecutor in this case owes his election to a wad of campaign cash from none other than radical Leftist billionaire George Soros. That was when I realized that the anti-cop crowd is trying to get revenge on my husband. They don’t care if my husband is innocent. They’ll do everything in their power to make cops pay. It makes me wonder why anyone would ever sign up to join law enforcement these days. But nearly 13 years ago, my husband did. And he did it because helping innocent people is in his blood. His brother is a firefighter. His dad is a 34-year-old police veteran. My husband was a youth leader at our church and plays guitar in the worship band. He’s served on mission trips – planting churches, planning vacation Bible schools, and sharing the Gospel. And he’s done his job as a police officer with honor and dignity, without a single mark against his record. Chance put his life on the line to protect our city from a violent, unhinged mob... ...and life behind bars could be his “reward.” Even if my husband’s good name is cleared, there is no way we could hope to pay the mountain of legal bills. Thankfully, by God’s grace, there is one group who has stepped up to help us – the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (**LELDF**). If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know that their record has made them a policeman’s best friend. Jason Johnson and the LELDF board organize and fund the successful legal defense of good cops wrongly charged for crimes – like my husband. LELDF hires the best attorneys and secures expert witnesses who will testify to the truth – without being influenced by political paybacks. And now they’ve agreed to help Chance. My friend, you’ve read my email this far so I’m going to ask as boldly as I can: **[Will you help Chance, too?](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=eb748e8bcba94150937aa03fc2685828&_e=jHE_2n0u3M6RMRvDGbF-VA3Qase2uAR3gcEF_SIaiHjbcbP9dQFmAOz7TlVeUaOxKlfH-JLSNnAuRCojhZJ-_0N6SbQYK4mm2YZDsMKknud6Vt6ErdJfefDYZHwezWoVuf_PBvUe-JDxRqvT28Bofqa9OTaestz7hdYI2yERoiq4PSzBaokoyGX7iK1P0dHbZBXRHDRbbj_M1-jsWQLgW1J83JIgb1iDcW6wUNU46LSfhDST7FuKLqFnoRdNEEOKoJuM0M5jFh4VRFJEpRvi9svham_49KTiSaKbvKUXpOEVdKkMuMMTcIXSFSNYxHqwOPBJvKCYxnq6Yz_TS9QmWVsAe8mMS5vLDqComIlJ3ePjPc83voexJPuRDuHQuIXovJ2QvYutygbUnNofnc97Ovodl5V5wUIi_l9sbY3cGEaaLahECYlMLUVFYY9v-_0QVp_Pgy0EMu6BgacTKmu8mf3PZxfSBb6kFgxSJgvRJnCeuzitbY2tRNrnZWjZohyyvUd4oTGgXaxxv4f3DobSY-Pj_arEWN74RTCVo0iU917y4jWiJOlPF_b39YN-mCVK7r_80F-8pDGVMhZNm-nbrs1p9mHSw8BbVCt0SIo5PAbRlJ6YD-GqMT-xXaNilUscDFwmuFOJGlmVgp29rbpj3oNim5L7Z1UhiGuIopkeJY1MHPOfOYJjB1LWXEjIU4xn)** Would you help by sending a one-time gift to LELDF so this amazing group can defend my husband and the other good police officers who have been wrongly accused? You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. They rely entirely on the generosity of kind-hearted folks like you to defend the men and women in blue who defend us. **[So with that in mind, please know that any contribution – be it $35, $100, $500, or even $1,000 – is tax-deductible.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=eb748e8bcba94150937aa03fc2685828&_e=jHE_2n0u3M6RMRvDGbF-VA3Qase2uAR3gcEF_SIaiHjbcbP9dQFmAOz7TlVeUaOxKlfH-JLSNnAuRCojhZJ-_0N6SbQYK4mm2YZDsMKknud6Vt6ErdJfefDYZHwezWoVuf_PBvUe-JDxRqvT28Bofqa9OTaestz7hdYI2yERoiq4PSzBaokoyGX7iK1P0dHbZBXRHDRbbj_M1-jsWQLgW1J83JIgb1iDcW6wUNU46LQHwphIGEmEMw0ttfblghMgqxuw0mb3MahYyT8oAPYL14zOFU2LP8uvx6000LyZa-8JgrqaoFrBcRmEgHFFbMqnLObgwdxCNxriq5VyrZ8WN0y6jC6qNYG8BvjRJlE1N5J-9eaI44jrUS4SbsKWzcowaio-f99ls7fsiPitTCmfhMpj6P5UT5sEaJRO9MQiZ1m5lV0zfDXDrxRCZwEB9CJFDMBMvg-lUkWJBJUm192PiJBjur7LOmLzpftdLoZwQZR0QvGLwO-K6OJdtAYzzImsCCwMi5cZuboDM7KVUTGeOiZYlRND3p1a__mC21JDZaUbieCD6YyaQPsixlAANkK-90h3Kf-QopIWOuJcifVuTuwmHrFnpmfzoz4dHUFGWfesKxgUDp6-cvOBpoTy7LQAfzX4i2VdDYT2NybiB74MbuFzlU35hdvkV6Batxs4X9C6Qeuz84BenpKxi-3BUn45)** But whatever you feel led to give, please send it back quickly. Chance’s trial starts in December. Our legal team needs to be working day and night getting ready for his defense. Because if Chance is found guilty... ...he’ll spend every wedding anniversary, birthday, and Christmas for the rest of his life in prison. He won’t be able to take our sons to football games or teach them how to drive... He won’t be able to walk our daughter down the aisle on her wedding day... I can’t bear the thought of life without him. And I know what happens to former police officers when they get locked up with thousands of criminals. My only hope of saving him today is good-hearted patriots like you. [**So please, my friend, rush back your gift in the next 24 hours if possible.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=eb748e8bcba94150937aa03fc2685828&_e=jHE_2n0u3M6RMRvDGbF-VA3Qase2uAR3gcEF_SIaiHjbcbP9dQFmAOz7TlVeUaOxKlfH-JLSNnAuRCojhZJ-_0N6SbQYK4mm2YZDsMKknud6Vt6ErdJfefDYZHwezWoVuf_PBvUe-JDxRqvT28Bofqa9OTaestz7hdYI2yERoiq4PSzBaokoyGX7iK1P0dHbZBXRHDRbbj_M1-jsWQLgW1J83JIgb1iDcW6wUNU46LS0XaxbjqkaxBioBWbuJEM8Vz5-IgrwubcDmVj3auNwsPVxuGoo32SAr7ZBaDSSyEfU0x05_RcoHCPOjc1IGENpnUNPUEQsIryWFtg7nfQZOJ_dOnbQN9JlN0Aph5pQy3jWZTnBz2KnClkWGnhr6NH_UXDylVOe2jo4JOVPYMc95sYm9QppGONyjRW4H0WQeyLQYUPrApyAR4-ezdL8zd0FJ8b-5av5B4l7V61o2foeXaGVr2uouDFrLOQny1ogDcbtEAaHMSbcOeqJbmJLtjsczMsc7XzsRo_icuydJwQZpf9auOFDotyXiB8cU-yZs8VBSrvqXTDs2WY1fkz3yKzDIYY7q69Q9G-wDN0THmFkOAoabg_PzjCEeueqFN4x5pSAC6Fy9C666WrC3DUZqIO6170201uuvluzZZHiY28hurCleKfH_vtaCdaLX5fUo48HLoKJVoO1kUmKwiCi1t2V) With this radical Soros-funded prosecutor on the warpath, [**your gift of $35**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=eb748e8bcba94150937aa03fc2685828&_e=jHE_2n0u3M6RMRvDGbF-VA3Qase2uAR3gcEF_SIaiHjbcbP9dQFmAOz7TlVeUaOxKlfH-JLSNnAuRCojhZJ-_0N6SbQYK4mm2YZDsMKknud6Vt6ErdJfefDYZHwezWoVuf_PBvUe-JDxRqvT28Bofqa9OTaestz7hdYI2yERoiq4PSzBaokoyGX7iK1P0dHbZBXRHDRbbj_M1-jsWQLgW1J83JIgb1iDcW6wUNU46LScwcTokJAYU86iCdyJpEs6k1ppQZc6SvJzWqF1gUuD8xTrnryD_50NOBSORYjNViryL29vrCPEJ7LNaTImu-IIpz1crxe8UCF18cfVmC_stY4BGG1_M9pC3jlfvprzZE01dO7c9pfpI0oTXc2FDU44lcyCfFV6clmCLGINHSTLB_shUwYzWsy_PS3u2hKXoUYh2JeFc5qoWHAfrHWLgCK-M84iKVp-iGD6mQbPTFARDEFXh7tgYstfJpl_9ah4w9UG0kev6vK4cI7nSXTHjBX-FGBjwYoORmhGe09APh7QQU_4wOPJgBCOsvx_pnk59IGNx1Y1qFfyRIPFh1KNhG2LpLSFHbto7JKgfFlTOCG1OdhYYHUC3dOb43xnuexkAkZ9p6PB_Hnd0Ngz_xoLLKWlXcxmJObbTXDEqR8XKIF1AkybL0SMmjgsrVB0nwXukexZ5KuNxXpA_OGDlTUqaUge) – or any amount – could be the difference between Chance clearing his good name... ...and spending the rest of his life behind bars. ---
With hope and thanks,
---

---
P.S. My husband Chance put his life on the line to keep our city safe from a rabid mob of violent protestors. Now life behind bars could be his “reward.” And to make things worse, we’re up against the deep pockets of a George Soros-back prosecutor in court. We have very little time to act before Chance’s trial begins. Chance and I have three children – and one more on the way. Chance and his fellow officers knew that if they didn’t restore order quickly, the headquarters, and maybe even the entire city, might burn to the ground. Following their training, they fired non-lethal weapons – the same “beanbag guns” that police have used for years to break up riots – to stop the violence before things got any worse. The mob slunk off. And my husband made it home safe and sound. But what Chance didn’t know is that one of the beanbags he fired wound up hurting a rioter’s hand. And nearly TWO YEARS after my husband helped save our city from being burned to the ground... ...the county prosecutor decided to charge my husband with “aggravated assault by a public servant” – a charge punishable by life in prison. This is the upside-down world we live in now. A world where lawless thugs who fling rocks at police and try to burn our city to the ground get off scot-free... ...while law-abiding officers get criminal charges and face life in prison for following their training and breaking up a mob of rioters. What are cops like my husband supposed to do when faced with this kind of out-of-control violence?! When Chance told me about the charges, I went from disbelief to anger to despair...and back again. But it all started to make sense when we learned the prosecutor in this case owes his election to a wad of campaign cash from none other than radical Leftist billionaire George Soros. That was when I realized that the anti-cop crowd is trying to get revenge on my husband. They don’t care if my husband is innocent. They’ll do everything in their power to make cops pay. It makes me wonder why anyone would ever sign up to join law enforcement these days. But nearly 13 years ago, my husband did. And he did it because helping innocent people is in his blood. His brother is a firefighter. His dad is a 34-year-old police veteran. My husband was a youth leader at our church and plays guitar in the worship band. He’s served on mission trips – planting churches, planning vacation Bible schools, and sharing the Gospel. And he’s done his job as a police officer with honor and dignity, without a single mark against his record. Chance put his life on the line to protect our city from a violent, unhinged mob... ...and life behind bars could be his “reward.” Even if my husband’s good name is cleared, there is no way we could hope to pay the mountain of legal bills. Thankfully, by God’s grace, there is one group who has stepped up to help us – the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know that their record has made them a policeman’s best friend. Jason Johnson and the LELDF board organize and fund the successful legal defense of good cops wrongly charged for crimes – like my husband. LELDF hires the best attorneys and secures expert witnesses who will testify to the truth – without being influenced by political paybacks. And now they’ve agreed to help Chance. My friend, you’ve read my email this far so I’m going to ask as boldly as I can: Would you help by sending a one-time gift to LELDF so this amazing group can defend my husband and the other good police officers who have been wrongly accused? You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. They rely entirely on the generosity of kind-hearted folks like you to defend the men and women in blue who defend us. But whatever you feel led to give, please send it back quickly. Chance’s trial starts in December. Our legal team needs to be working day and night getting ready for his defense. Because if Chance is found guilty... ...he’ll spend every wedding anniversary, birthday, and Christmas for the rest of his life in prison. He won’t be able to take our sons to football games or teach them how to drive... He won’t be able to walk our daughter down the aisle on her wedding day... I can’t bear the thought of life without him. And I know what happens to former police officers when they get locked up with thousands of criminals. My only hope of saving him today is good-hearted patriots like you. With this radical Soros-funded prosecutor on the warpath, – or any amount – could be the difference between Chance clearing his good name... ...and spending the rest of his life behind bars. Thank you for reading my email today with such a generous spirit. I can never express how grateful I am to you – in advance – for helping my husband fight back. With hope and thanks, Kimberly Bretches P.S. My husband Chance put his life on the line to keep our city safe from a rabid mob of violent protestors. Now life behind bars could be his “reward.” And to make things worse, we’re up against the deep pockets of a George Soros-back prosecutor in court. We have very little time to act before Chance’s trial begins. Chance and I have three children – and one more on the way. Please don’t let them grow up without their father. | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter! © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc._

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=e1570dc9af40405da106dd95bb41f522&_e=LX-BpqYhq-dnaM3rSG8GCE7Cyejcjh2sH2kSk9gasqsyF_O-gPm61T3dzwIoUagCxtOq_xfm_GmevgUci4HnMvrsYzPoJoONkWyp0uaLftZ0PRv-03YCPw99XK6g9TmpkoIVxhbTu6hMhu5XRIE79o1H08BZlNAkVV4XAaLS9FSkY0PLrcebiX_bQBVYYC-4SBr1jHG_-NnBmzbJjs1Em3-gKw8IngPCqpQfEtGQ_KQ-kChZYEGRWmM4DTatHCwoqzpqWblM7uE5bCq6LHmipB9x1jke0SqYEFyJLy9whLetwfgyg7jSyZVstjdtowf03rQXFY5q5FlYSJBN_A1TYKGoksHyCgue_2SLzpj_iZCAvbr-qSPeAO5JWVoVySFSXjwwuyb6L91c0TBNz_kFLU7BvZqDZWI6KeoyA_unPR58jZYJaSPRTuRW3RVj50Iye3GQseGYDSaPBUDAF6jX0oC4Rpxzb91KLZ3LZCfkcILVGaIHOWE0lK7-wd_uiso2bU4YluRboJ_ydGxcmkmQ5b_39UE3EJeIEvSZxedVq9mGLPfKtpFUMOIGFmaF7Bhq)

name: Brent Hennrich
subject: I’ll say what Marie won’t on theSenate’s “Big Beautiful Bill”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington
body:
| | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMU_BeZcmRBr16dPjlrMKhhjiC51ataw3Peft1wIO87ITqMSLnAp2jE8r5d3n-2ynJYehrTH-bSBMGVUHTPOI27YwxFnDfoINre-k-9nMMMDVK7SUJTqyxeG0aEoYmcfRYJNTWR3VteMyjwP9kjHhehNR51nzn_lC9LPj5hZu3BTgh5e-W0Le1GNnNNvt8a6Nz3ubWXmxn8UsayS2wQbggyJcF4suZUV8nvdGSsISuJfUYhuPUnTu1k-EUSBI4oOJCw/4hu/FwradGENT5-Y1_IBIEqcdA/h0/h001.ih4RcKOjDddjZ2m_o6NduH3pw37_k9eqBi5iwkDQta0)
---
Peter,

While the Senate just passed a bill that rips health care from 17 million Americans, Marie Gluesenkamp Perez was tweeting about car headlights.

Not the Medicaid cuts. Not the attack on SNAP. Not the gutting of rural hospital funding. Not even the death of the Affordable Care Act as we know it.

**Just ... headlights.**
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUBzWevoKqKn0h0GRHG8uJGUQ0BmIEf3vpqJ2_y7p2IgfoC9HfUHIaVQhBymd9tytK5US9ayCR298qiZ7AOTrXAJ3FvQjqyAiNG57mkR-otHoHuFaiM2w8cx94B2CXnytOiGJWybC0tiXD-QQyrBXp2m563H1ZN7KJRY0hneYB4ndlx6nzFISg5JNRlVLk3MScq46jdQKbuqtyNyy-BWuO6vpOuHjX3sWLUg7lsVJFSjI0mz2Ms9n_WGdvqS1L05u2fE9oRLOiLpjtFvCnP-N14Uu95iLW_wCPu9aImi3kVitw/4hu/FwradGENT5-Y1_IBIEqcdA/h1/h001.I2n3XXpscwuctTCJaF4LOXjZpKXR-CJjdwX9558duxw)
---
**We 're watching the most catastrophic rollback of social safety nets in generations and it appears the only thing getting caught in the headlights is Marie's so-called leadership in our district. ** **
** So let me say what Marie won't: this bill guts funding for mental health, prescription drugs, affordable housing, food assistance, and clean water infrastructure. It leaves over 30 million Americans hungry and 17 million uninsured. It is a death sentence for people in our district just so a handful of billionaires can get more tax breaks they don't need.

Marie's job is to use her platform to inform the public--especially when new national polling shows only 8% of Americans know about the Medicaid cuts in Trump's "big beautiful bill."

When a bill this historically dangerous comes down the pike, you cannot just ignore it.

Our representatives have a responsibility to raise the alarm. To explain what's happening. To help people understand what's at stake.

**We know this silence isn 't accidental. It's another example in a long line of politically calculated silences from Marie Gluesenkamp Perez.

**First, it was her silence when Trump unleashed the military on peaceful protesters demanding that ICE stop kidnapping our neighbors.

Then, it was her silence after Trump launched unauthorized airstrikes against Iran.

Now, it's her silence as the Senate passes this disastrous budget.

She isn't warning her constituents because she's too busy calculating how neutral she can appear in a purple district anytime Trump, MAGA Republicans, or Speaker Mike Johnson do something indefensible.

Don't take my word for it, take Marie's....

She recently published a national op-ed addressed to Speaker Mike Johnson, saying she's excited to work with him and that she's ready to "throw him a bone."

She wants credit for being bipartisan, even if it means playing footsie with a party dismantling healthcare, housing, and civil rights.

I'm not running to play games in Washington. I'm running to tell the truth. Every time. Even when it's hard. Especially when it's hard.

[**If that 's the leadership you want, pitch in now and help us build a campaign that doesn't flinch when it matters most.

clean_body: | | Peter, While the Senate just passed a bill that rips health care from 17 million Americans, Marie Gluesenkamp Perez was tweeting about car headlights. Not the Medicaid cuts. Not the attack on SNAP. Not the gutting of rural hospital funding. Not even the death of the Affordable Care Act as we know it. Just ... headlights. | We 're watching the most catastrophic rollback of social safety nets in generations and it appears the only thing getting caught in the headlights is Marie's so-called leadership in our district. So let me say what Marie won't: this bill guts funding for mental health, prescription drugs, affordable housing, food assistance, and clean water infrastructure. It leaves over 30 million Americans hungry and 17 million uninsured. It is a death sentence for people in our district just so a handful of billionaires can get more tax breaks they don't need. Marie's job is to use her platform to inform the public--especially when new national polling shows only 8% of Americans know about the Medicaid cuts in Trump's "big beautiful bill." When a bill this historically dangerous comes down the pike, you cannot just ignore it. Our representatives have a responsibility to raise the alarm. To explain what's happening. To help people understand what's at stake. We know this silence isn 't accidental. It's another example in a long line of politically calculated silences from Marie Gluesenkamp Perez. First, it was her silence when Trump unleashed the military on peaceful protesters demanding that ICE stop kidnapping our neighbors. Then, it was her silence after Trump launched unauthorized airstrikes against Iran. Now, it's her silence as the Senate passes this disastrous budget. She isn't warning her constituents because she's too busy calculating how neutral she can appear in a purple district anytime Trump, MAGA Republicans, or Speaker Mike Johnson do something indefensible. Don't take my word for it, take Marie's.... She recently published a national op-ed addressed to Speaker Mike Johnson, saying she's excited to work with him and that she's ready to "throw him a bone." She wants credit for being bipartisan, even if it means playing footsie with a party dismantling healthcare, housing, and civil rights. I'm not running to play games in Washington. I'm running to tell the truth. Every time. Even when it's hard. Especially when it's hard. want to take a moment to express my gratitude for all of you who have already donated to this campaign. We have a long road ahead of us for the next 14 months, but together we will bring the change our community needs. Thank you for joining the fight. Let's Heal Washington! body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110755641/555226949/-629675555?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjkxZjJjN2QtOTU1Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EgC1XrFNzj60W8QOqnVMs0EJDEfoJqY9kE-vFlbEL7c=) I know you’ve been hearing from my team a lot over the last few days, but I wanted to take a moment to send you a quick note to say thank you. Because of your support we’ve reached our end-of-quarter goal and are in an incredible spot to defend Oregon’s 5th District next year. And I’m so grateful to have you on my team. I also want to thank Oregonians for showing up and voicing their concerns at my town halls. So far I’ve had five stops on my “Give ‘Em Hell” town hall tour, and I’ve been amazed by the amount of people who have shown up to share their thoughts. As our representative, I’m working everyday to amplify your voices and concerns in Washington and build a better future for all Americans. So thank you again for your support and for always showing up. I’m so grateful to have such a strong team standing with me every step of the way. With gratitude, _Janelle_ P.S.: **[If you didn’t get the chance to donate before my end-of-quarter deadline, I’d be so grateful if you would consider donating today to support my fight to defend OR-05.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110755642/555226950/-629675555?refcode=email_070225_TY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjkxZjJjN2QtOTU1Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EgC1XrFNzj60W8QOqnVMs0EJDEfoJqY9kE-vFlbEL7c=)**

name: Mallory McMorrow
subject: Why Michigan is a must-win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio House Democratic Campaign Committee, 545 E Town St
body:
|
---
Hi, this is Mallory McMorrow. You may not know this about Michigan, but one thing we’re known for? **_Close elections._** Trump won Michigan by _less than a single percentage point_. Elissa Slotkin (now Senator Slotkin) won her seat by less than 20,000 votes. And Republicans flipped control of the state House by fewer than 7,000 votes spread across four districts. The margins in Michigan are often **razor-thin** — making voter turnout so important here. We need people across the state heading to the polls if we want any shot of winning this seat. And **that’s where you come in.** It’s easy for people to feel burned out, checked out, and hopeless about politics. So much so that they stop showing up. Your support helps me share ads online and on TV that offer a vision of a New American Dream — one that people can see themselves in. It helps me connect with people from across Michigan about how we’re going to improve lives, not tear people down. And it helps me **stand up to the B.S. lies** from the Republicans trying to drag me down. [**So if you believe in a brighter future for our country, will you split a donation between Ohio House Dems and my campaign? clean_body: | Hi, this is Mallory McMorrow. You may not know this about Michigan, but one thing we’re known for? Close elections. Trump won Michigan by less than a single percentage point. Elissa Slotkin (now Senator Slotkin) won her seat by less than 20,000 votes. And Republicans flipped control of the state House by fewer than 7,000 votes spread across four districts. The margins in Michigan are often razor-thin — making voter turnout so important here. We need people across the state heading to the polls if we want any shot of winning this seat. And that’s where you come in. It’s easy for people to feel burned out, checked out, and hopeless about politics. So much so that they stop showing up. Your support helps me share ads online and on TV that offer a vision of a New American Dream — one that people can see themselves in. It helps me connect with people from across Michigan about how we’re going to improve lives, not tear people down. And it helps me stand up to the B.S. lies from the Republicans trying to drag me down. = | | = "" | = "" | = "" | = "" Thanks, friend. – Mallory McMorrow = = = OHDC 545 E.
