| | Hi Friend, Thank you for being part of this movement. As we closed out our end-of-quarter deadline, we were moved by the support that came in—the encouragement and the belief in what we’re building together. But we want to be honest with you: **we didn’t hit our fundraising goal.** We came close—but not quite over the line. And that means we have some ground to make up to ensure we have the resources to keep fighting for affordable, accessible health care, lower housing costs, better child and elder care, and more. **Whether you gave, shared, organized, or simply stayed in this fight with us, please know this: your support fuels everything we do next.** If you weren’t able to chip in before the deadline but want to help us close the gap, now is a powerful time to do it: | [**Help us catch up →** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110755940/555228087/1626305413?&refcode=E14014-20250702-EOQGoal-SB-DeadlineEOQ&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWI4NDI2ZGQtOTY1Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_sfgnSqLDYqP_uzRmWPYLiQqi2refoMScbn-bWI9Xr8=)

body:

#
Hi there, First off, I want to extend a huge THANK YOU to everyone who helped meet our fundraising goal. I’m so grateful for your support -- it means the world. But while we’ve been organizing and campaigning to protect our services, Republicans in Washington are trying to pass Trump’s disastrous "BS" budget \-- **and our own Rep. David Valadao is considering voting for it.** If it passes, that would mean: \- Nearly $1 trillion cut from Medicaid
\- Devastating cuts to public schools
\- Huge tax breaks for billionaires In CA-22, where nearly 70% of us rely on Medi-Cal, this is a _betrayal_. Valadao promised he wouldn’t vote to cut Medicaid, and the fact that it’s even on the table for him is _outrageous_. Peter, I won’t beat around the bush here:

_I don't have ultra-rich donors on speed-dial.

I don't come from a wealthy family. I was raised in public housing.

I don’t have a college degree or fancy connections.

I don’t do a single second of call time._

I do, however, rely on grassroots donations from people like you to keep the wheels turning on this people-powered coalition.

[Peter, we missed our mid-year goal by just 16 donations. Just _16 people_ stand between us and hitting our time-sensitive goal, which my team has extended until midnight tonight. To help me continue my fight for everything from Social Security and Medicare to affordable housing and more, will you be one of the 16 donors I need to step up and chip in $3 today to help save my seat and flip the House? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110756479/555229989/-721819307?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250702_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGI4NTQ0My05ODU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=70Y6-z6JZOItzcfvHL85edHNZWBgPSpVlCshnUdhL94=) | **[16 DONATIONS NEEDED BY MIDNIGHT: RUSH $3 TO RE-ELECT RITCHIE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110756480/555229990/-721819307?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250702_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGI4NTQ0My05ODU3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=70Y6-z6JZOItzcfvHL85edHNZWBgPSpVlCshnUdhL94=)**

Thank you,
_Ritchie_

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: Team AOC
subject: Big, Ugly Bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Donald Trump is lying to you
#
It doesn't take a genius to know when you're being lied to.
Donald Trump has claimed on multiple occasions that his 'Big, Beautiful Bill' does not cut Medicaid.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250702-2.dWZMw8&refcode=em20250702-9231-P_FND_CTR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9231%2E2526796%2Eklembi)
To the American people: right now, **Donald Trump is lying to you**. 17 million people will lose their health care.
But while MAGA pulls out the stops to pay for tax cuts for billionaires, people across the country are standing up against these attacks on the working class.
[Will you chip in $5 today to help Alexandria meet these folks on the road and host more town halls across the country? Every contribution helps us fight for the working class in the places that need it most.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250702-2.dWZMw8&refcode=em20250702-9231-P_FND_CTR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9231%2E2526796%2Eklembi)

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: We’re endorsing Deja Foxx for Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Deja Foxx is ready to lead. We’re with her.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250702-1&t=1&akid=2332%2E587540%2E-x2K_6)
Peter, we’ve got exciting news to share:
**Leaders We Deserve is proud to endorse Deja Foxx in the special election for Arizona’s 7th Congressional District.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250702_1_dejafoxx?refcode=em20250702-2332&amount=5&refcode2=2332_587540_-x2K_6&akid=2332%2E587540%2E-x2K_6)
**At just 24 years old** , Deja has already taken on some of the toughest fights in politics. She’s a reproductive justice advocate. A former strategist for Planned Parenthood. A movement-builder who’s organizing where others won’t — from Tucson to Yuma to rural border towns.
**And she’s not just running a campaign. She’s running to win a future that includes all of us.**
_“I’m not running to play politics as usual. I’m running to fight for a future
that includes all of us, where healthcare is a right, housing is
affordable, and every young person knows their voice matters.”_
— Deja Foxx, Candidate for AZ-07
**[Please make a $5 contribution to Deja Foxx and Leaders We Deserve today to help us win this special election and bring Deja’s voice to Congress.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250702_1_dejafoxx?refcode=em20250702-2332&amount=5&refcode2=2332_587540_-x2K_6&akid=2332%2E587540%2E-x2K_6)**
**Deja knows what this fight means.** She relied on Medicaid and food stamps. She lived in Section 8 housing. She worked at a gas station to support herself while her single mom battled addiction. She depended on Planned Parenthood without insurance.
She is building the kind of campaign that career politicians never expect. She’s showing up in real life and online. Her debate moments are going viral. Young people are organizing behind her. And momentum is growing.
**This race is close.** A new poll shows Deja within a few points of her opponent. The special election is on July 15, and we have just days to help her surge to the finish line.
**[Will you split a $5 donation between Deja’s campaign and Leaders We Deserve to help her close the gap and win?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250702_1_dejafoxx?refcode=em20250702-2332&amount=5&refcode2=2332_587540_-x2K_6&akid=2332%2E587540%2E-x2K_6)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250702_1_dejafoxx?amount=5&refcode=em20250702-2332&refcode2=2332_587540_-x2K_6&akid=2332%2E587540%2E-x2K_6)**
We believe in a future where young people lead. Where lived experience matters. Where bold vision wins.
Thank you for standing with us,
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250702-1&t=2&refcode2=2332_587540_-x2K_6&akid=2332%2E587540%2E-x2K_6)**

Let me be clear: I will not be intimidated.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250702-5207-footer&t=1&akid=5207%2E420207%2EuFCFru)
Peter, I went on CNN earlier today to tell the truth about ICE: They’re acting like a terrorist force, with masked men jumping out of unmarked cars to kidnap, detain, and disappear people without explanation.
It’s unconstitutional, illegal, and they’re terrorizing innocent people.
**What I said is the truth, and it clearly struck a nerve. Because now the White House is calling me “deranged” for standing up for immigrants:**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250702-2?refcode=em20250702-5207&amount=3&refcode2=5207_420207_uFCFru&akid=5207%2E420207%2EuFCFru)
Let me be clear: I will not be intimidated, and I am _never_ going to stop fighting for the rights and dignity of every person, everywhere, regardless of their immigration status.
The White House can come after me all they want, but if they don’t want ICE to be compared to a terrorist force, they should stop acting like one. Period.
**Republicans are trying to silence me, but with your support, they won’t succeed.[Will you pitch in now to help me keep standing up against Trump’s radical right-wing immigration policy?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250702-2?refcode=em20250702-5207&amount=3&refcode2=5207_420207_uFCFru&akid=5207%2E420207%2EuFCFru)**

In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal

President Trump knows this is the ONE thing that can save me now.
President Trump knows this is the ONE thing that can save me now.
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMFuqzAQRb_G7ILssQ1m4UVI5Ld4VaRWqqJ2Z2xTnNiBAIHQr6-SptnOnJl7dHXsgq8XifISATTeDggA0TUCOH_Msb8c4v9_q719Yatztov8toXNA53gCZ-MXpdBse_j5jDo13197EQ5kSc-Lp17wo_Q1EXtw22abxMraW0xS5wkOSesELwokkYWnHCRC5FZbGnNCk5AC2wcBRA0I0XiJWDgOMcAFCgWKVSiMtZluhY1aIYRw_ecVEfXe6PJMM6679s2pqaNSZDNOHbDXUwhUHPfpqeLCe4y_J6ZNiJQD2UEakKgPq_L0lRXUTJE1b00ut29Ze0721X7pJe2m30IfshyxPDX35tkkvATAAD__-kMbmw)

---
Dear Patriot,
---
As we celebrate our nation’s independence, I felt moved to write you this private letter. I promise you, every word is from the bottom of my heart.
---
With President Trump back at the helm, it’s truly inspiring to see our country victorious once again.
---
Our President is racking up so many wins, even CNN was forced to admit President Trump just had the _“best week as President.”_
---
**And the cherry on top? He scored a momentous judicial victory as the Supreme Court ruled to bring an end to the Left’s tyrannical nationwide injunctions and LAWFARE posed by radical Democrat judges across the country!**
---
**But while it certainly feels that _America_ has found her way out of those four long and dark years of Joe Biden’s disastrous presidency and weaponized justice system, I must admit, my journey out of that darkness is __not__ yet finished.**
---
The 4th of July is a stark reminder that our Founders created a nation where we are _guaranteed_ our indelible rights to **LIFE** and **LIBERTY**.
---
_But the Democrats and the Deep State’s LAWFARE against me is very much alive and well..._
---
... __And make no mistake, they are coming for my liberty and my life!__
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
This entire scheme by the Left all to destroy a close friend of the President’s is truly the type of vindictive and sinister plot you’d think would only exist in the movies.
---
_But believe me, Patriot, it exists; I’m living it. And if I fail to win this trial, the Democrats will be able to**JAIL** me for the rest of my life!_
---
I’ve been left with no escape, no lifeline – especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!
---
_No pardon.
No protection.
No cavalry coming over the hill. _
---
_But even though the most powerful man in the country _legally_ cannot step in to save me, that doesn’t mean he isn’t sending out a CALL TO ACTION_...
---
[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kM2OozAQhJ_G3ECmbWx88GEyiD3s7O8l2tOo45_EMxiIwYmyT78iyuZa9amrqjHOQ_A3TeSOAJyCXQgAYS8E4PznGlP-iF-_lHv7xsuz-B6bzYXXB3qBJzwafNkNPf_7-fqx4K-9_5zb3aV-4uttdk_4EVq5iGHYVNkVVjNvKS-crmVTc9U2ShUn7UzdoFPAlFHKH7xgQlracsUNMuFpETRQaKikAAwYbSs4tAdjnUDfekBOCaf3nAqjS8FgvaxXTGmaYmWmWAz6tK7zci_WE-gXZ3Jy1TWMydmNINCnbG_lMeQh4BhKn5yzUyx9Hm0pFTK0Hgn0IBswaJTn7IC1Fds91uc1vhuMM4bjSFj3vywBsTnR2ZAjYd3jFXdxmXIyjrDu9_5999DMNK5uXAnrfrx9-1kkbedrGIawCEk4Pd4HbnMuGv4FAAD__xPwj9I)
__
---
With my back now against the wall, the President knows there is only ONE thing that can save me: **_the collective strength of MILLIONS of grassroots patriots like _YOU_._**
---
[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kM2OozAQhJ_G3ECmbWx88GEyiD3s7O8l2tOo45_EMxiIwYmyT78iyuZa9amrqjHOQ_A3TeSOAJyCXQgAYS8E4PznGlP-iF-_lHv7xsuz-B6bzYXXB3qBJzwafNkNPf_7-fqx4K-9_5zb3aV-4uttdk_4EVq5iGHYVNkVVjNvKS-crmVTc9U2ShUn7UzdoFPAlFHKH7xgQlracsUNMuFpETRQaKikAAwYbSs4tAdjnUDfekBOCaf3nAqjS8FgvaxXTGmaYmWmWAz6tK7zci_WE-gXZ3Jy1TWMydmNINCnbG_lMeQh4BhKn5yzUyx9Hm0pFTK0Hgn0IBswaJTn7IC1Fds91uc1vhuMM4bjSFj3vywBsTnR2ZAjYd3jFXdxmXIyjrDu9_5999DMNK5uXAnrfrx9-1kkbedrGIawCEk4Pd4HbnMuGv4FAAD__xPwj9I)
__
---
[**So please, answer President Trump’s call and make a grassroots contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kM2OozAQhJ_G3ECmbWx88GEyiD3s7O8l2tOo45_EMxiIwYmyT78iyuZa9amrqjHOQ_A3TeSOAJyCXQgAYS8E4PznGlP-iF-_lHv7xsuz-B6bzYXXB3qBJzwafNkNPf_7-fqx4K-9_5zb3aV-4uttdk_4EVq5iGHYVNkVVjNvKS-crmVTc9U2ShUn7UzdoFPAlFHKH7xgQlracsUNMuFpETRQaKikAAwYbSs4tAdjnUDfekBOCaf3nAqjS8FgvaxXTGmaYmWmWAz6tK7zci_WE-gXZ3Jy1TWMydmNINCnbG_lMeQh4BhKn5yzUyx9Hm0pFTK0Hgn0IBswaJTn7IC1Fds91uc1vhuMM4bjSFj3vywBsTnR2ZAjYd3jFXdxmXIyjrDu9_5999DMNK5uXAnrfrx9-1kkbedrGIawCEk4Pd4HbnMuGv4FAAD__xPwj9I)

clean_body: President Trump knows this is the ONE thing that can save me now. President Trump knows this is the ONE thing that can save me now. | Dear Patriot, As we celebrate our nation’s independence, I felt moved to write you this private letter. I promise you, every word is from the bottom of my heart. With President Trump back at the helm, it’s truly inspiring to see our country victorious once again. Our President is racking up so many wins, even CNN was forced to admit President Trump just had the “best week as President.” And the cherry on top? He scored a momentous judicial victory as the Supreme Court ruled to bring an end to the Left’s tyrannical nationwide injunctions and LAWFARE posed by radical Democrat judges across the country! But while it certainly feels that America has found her way out of those four long and dark years of Joe Biden’s disastrous presidency and weaponized justice system, I must admit, my journey out of that darkness is not yet finished. The 4th of July is a stark reminder that our Founders created a nation where we are guaranteed our indelible rights to LIFE and LIBERTY. But the Democrats and the Deep State’s LAWFARE against me is very much alive and well... ... And make no mistake, they are coming for my liberty and my life! A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a federal pardon in state court. This entire scheme by the Left all to destroy a close friend of the President’s is truly the type of vindictive and sinister plot you’d think would only exist in the movies. But believe me, Patriot, it exists; I’m living it. And if I fail to win this trial, the Democrats will be able toJAIL me for the rest of my life! I’ve been left with no escape, no lifeline – especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses! No pardon. No protection. No cavalry coming over the hill. But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, that doesn’t mean he isn’t sending out a CALL TO ACTION... With my back now against the wall, the President knows there is only ONE thing that can save me: the collective strength of MILLIONS of grassroots patriots like YOU. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/u/r8Fz_UXp2CihCmlVk1uyCP9ovp1WEyVTxAlkzDzC6Owho3L1UIskkVUmmZTXMLn18O8e5vX0s6_7oyrpM-IHGXgxQCC7NOYUJgPGFShR4tX17olV7JtebHObudCeKAaVWTIxpU_RPXcFXt6HMoIxaL5qKATA8ke81SwRPwSvDu2VeVr3bFDoWsXt/1lZSwGPCkmXH4H-1W1SoWZkVMziR5x0g/10)_
---
[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/x9SuiMvT62bWgspO4gaiaJJyjF5Wzpv3vK0tKuXik0CV14VTeQVTjW4lzCyofgEWga76P8Gr5UAkWExLeZVO97vcJQPQ1aWFJV4EWX3asS2f9Qxp5AYExseBY0trDqfuGK15RN5XQ1I8W9IgVZ6FV1SlbWqnXoQn3I5wHlwupLCGlvCOBrLOLDYFrxb7znSWExFfILXYIr-IeZDDIMrrkE_pwlawR_jMciZjBab1poupQKwtSp1cuSGkwR2M5yrpyWFPhfYTmRRpPrRXI3bpCgYs6ei9hqP02B3fXuHRev_GaXgcFC_inLfGA8kRNxFO0BTJW2hmTw35Cko66k6o5ULHxS6eEx0fiRf71OOz0T0ClZxmpK7-QQ_tzDxdOexZOyFCRcKJa4Z6Fnocg-w8FNM-LEv7zAx_ZwRvSInyK5jxgIfUQbH_cwpxw7C6NE7WRb1dKjwg_5JD6p7ZoEd3ox8RaPZIDuLvrn7iZeYIeKoT8Z_4sRx_yKWQu0fcvtp4ksovAvWbOQJ87QmxvwzInEqpdGtWItT9zljh5p7kJS4mAv7ieiCDNg-ugLxp7lB-SOIG-a2nPomIirG3VtIuh29kp2q1jP1NAsgngAN3P8TzQtxkGDETWmD3mEXFgJ_tiWwzMYKuMZRpfBBQ0JRMbeoI3tv7mXmtdaxVtIVzcZUB1jK7_ZHUFj1vSSJ6zeVLXXxrYAbUI_tN6LWx-1AVIt4qX4l-2U74BHBUUZDbYwaPKtL9FoYRCV080yMrSIuU9K1BXvf4_NfHLqUHPlOC/JOF5n7tm3ksgB3rDElmbGgj2drtmBwnh/10) Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **[National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/fpI5MYyva6JY-EgF5ju4yIcCYpewfJnFcHAUneYsDQ3NFmqS9zI514Yfpj9ymtAumszEKs7V8nlc6EiPYw5oO05fF4_tWr1hviBfeuxpjASIX8zqbmoT0GblncnwPBxOHmA97XesquYSR_wodlCCixFeDC1_SK0WWA42rJFLZGvl36P4oJLajasC3wX9wI5THlRGGEjuCxU3e3WyJt0xljwThKLSqiFX7dPJstdlURjYXbWofzrc70Vr5kFaHPdUWLo9d_wKQ4VN4a5f8x7mJVWekbyB2IWvYnnh5kSI1upo8QiBzydGeU_NQJnjijya4j4InwKOad0hf6_Ks9IuGj5wsQyKWJYXgL8WhYYMhkvaCY3kjLuyK4Vzvw3GD0oTXqA--L9xPopTZBG0K2Hta4P-IwngWHL44yS1-vZ7KDMflY_6tgtcYz24xe6mUK3JfaUTmTRN0yi4mG7GkpmlS1tOAEAFaiYjh2hmqRwDvEQGNOdlYQ7rx_d_3K3vNMStL3NnBMpgefQWArZEqOjEJg4reij2WGqE7z07lRqn2vAvX8FfaUMUOUoRfCRkb3E1M66-K0uyfMkRZV9T8BjXByYVojya2cPMEer7aYcI5yOx9n7YqrIMUOlYTGTAFaIGPViDMbeAEYtCRiUMCw7zfbO4ED-qG_9fyhBrzPjG7rfHx3fneUtNPmoXUWxKWKG3tzNbynJYIn-vGw3DGI-56Wf3J-yVLmrIKnLHH_LFfZ0ocBzNWnEPwJ9lbAhHtMuZvkAxVbTTQyiNNMY/vB7hsn5L8ymg9sJ9t6h_ZgD89r3Z-3-D/10)** is urgently requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, and the survey topic is crucial to the future of liberty and separation of powers in America.

Our country is in the midst of a constitutional crisis. Federal judges have issued a flood of injunctions aimed at subverting the will of a majority of Americans.

To give you a sense of the magnitude of the problem we're facing, consider that federal judges have BLOCKED the following...
* An executive order regarding the waste of your tax dollars in federal grant spending

* The return of "trans-identifying" male inmates to male-only prisons where they belong

* An executive order regarding buyouts for federal workers aimed at reducing the size of the administrative state

* An executive order ending birthright citizenship, a policy that poses a threat to our national sovereignty

* An executive order suspending USAID funding of foreign coups and transgender theater productions

The U.S. Constitution does not give judges the power to prevent the president from exercising his constitutional authority based on anecdotal evidence provided by far-Left activists.

**If we don 't fix this crisis ...**

**> >>** We will not be able to defeat bureaucratic despotism and reestablish a government that operates with the consent of the people.

**> >>** We will not be able to defeat the far-Left ideologies that are taught in far too many classrooms.

**And, most importantly, we will not be able to preserve liberty in America.**

That's why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the role of the judiciary in our constitutional republic?_

Your response will help Hillsdale College form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the separation of powers and checks and balances--including the judiciary's proper role in our government.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch** using this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-the-us-judicial-branch**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/HdfYN2EAt-k1ztx5kfaTvBb5QOB9iMMnXZrhnh1F2er2cnfnZgplPV3A6Vy53_co2TACQXE3UUM5xcjM-XLyvwffyUU8QWQ0G4pzialcUZMvNIT6sDlnJAwXCRR_0C4-O7hPsEhRgJZNTed5B-IF7u9YK_-GjfycfwZ0rq8UA1IiELzp8pUhLYymZMR5uQ2Ij7SHyM7OZIFmSWcf33dW0O9rXpR56dL4eSokxBvqio0CLu3Z9XyfOrFKg-zztF2cOB3rg_UO9Qlc-rYAbon4nqldbjJjQWoSyoNy3LBiqe_sKFQG5Qkf1Svs32InpSBbjWHJafgTic1htEGjp3y8dGGYfz0ubmJpgm1O34n-NB_Ex7phacbTjnCRHAEu3pxipWIZmIztnMAx4A3j8xEMZBTNmNous-ZeBOH4HVJTQ9Vtkkr3PqBNrYPDH_FEVHeslD_QvK2Qork8UF1YjFDPDDzFaQaq2AKT9zG9fIq0G80yUdmLQfkDauCSA3UOnxJsjquDbpCfjrcdXhccFxD4TSuOclKnlhDuYWooIWEnqK8XPUZbtTkvhk-6XYpoG1iloI5LezWNR9HBwr4-IXlG2emGenLR4CjqYHSbZmPpOObnCJxxuPOo8RtF1VzdAaDtmYpUnrXv-YrxjkPHfovOfPXTfq0imij2bWsyz8Smj1xs5fdE64kthsibXw52zQftffXavqYel3Md4joJDZ6ECdBx7JBux3lRzGFpfDMFXXVrEQB6_dtNYJwHiedWV-f8JXu_OPxhStnD1v4/B2_SKlKYrFp8QyMXRC2pzXDqVD65e83V/10)

And after you complete your survey, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of so many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for far-Left activists to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the proper role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of the anti-American ideologies that are being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Founding and guiding additional classical K-12 schools nationwide.** In addition to expanding the number of Hillsdale-affiliated K-12 schools, you will help us restore love for our country among young Americans by distributing _The Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum_ free of charge to thousands more parents, homeschoolers, and concerned citizens.

* **Expanding the circulation of _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is currently mailed free of charge to more than 6.7 million American households and businesses ten times per year.

* **Producing and promoting additional free online courses** on topics such as "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism," "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," and "The Presidency and the Constitution." Your generosity will help us expand this education on behalf of liberty to millions more Americans.

* **Sending FREE copies of the U.S. Constitution and Declaration of Independence** to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America. Since last year's election, the number of requests for our pocket Constitutions has increased significantly. You will help us meet this rising demand.

We undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale by filling out the College's **National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch** --the link is below.

clean_body: Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch is urgently requested. | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's is urgently requested. Your response will only take a few minutes, and the survey topic is crucial to the future of liberty and separation of powers in America. Our country is in the midst of a constitutional crisis. Federal judges have issued a flood of injunctions aimed at subverting the will of a majority of Americans. To give you a sense of the magnitude of the problem we're facing, consider that federal judges have BLOCKED the following... An executive order regarding the waste of your tax dollars in federal grant spending The return of "trans-identifying" male inmates to male-only prisons where they belong An executive order regarding buyouts for federal workers aimed at reducing the size of the administrative state An executive order ending birthright citizenship, a policy that poses a threat to our national sovereignty An executive order suspending USAID funding of foreign coups and transgender theater productions The U.S. Constitution does not give judges the power to prevent the president from exercising his constitutional authority based on anecdotal evidence provided by far-Left activists. If we don 't fix this crisis ... >> We will not be able to defeat bureaucratic despotism and reestablish a government that operates with the consent of the people. >> We will not be able to defeat the far-Left ideologies that are taught in far too many classrooms. And, most importantly, we will not be able to preserve liberty in America. That's why I'm reaching out to you today... What is your opinion about the role of the judiciary in our constitutional republic? Your response will help Hillsdale College form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the separation of powers and checks and balances--including the judiciary's proper role in our government. You can easily complete your National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch using this secure link: And after you complete your survey, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. The failure of so many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for far-Left activists to undermine the separation of powers at the heart of limited government. I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the proper role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order. That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, reaching and teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours! These efforts counter the influence of the anti-American ideologies that are being taught in classrooms all across America. Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including: Founding and guiding additional classical K-12 schools nationwide. In addition to expanding the number of Hillsdale-affiliated K-12 schools, you will help us restore love for our country among young Americans by distributing The Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum free of charge to thousands more parents, homeschoolers, and concerned citizens. Expanding the circulation of Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is currently mailed free of charge to more than 6.7 million American households and businesses ten times per year. Producing and promoting additional free online courses on topics such as "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism," "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," and "The Presidency and the Constitution." Your generosity will help us expand this education on behalf of liberty to millions more Americans. Sending FREE copies of the U.S. Constitution and Declaration of Independence to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America. Since last year's election, the number of requests for our pocket Constitutions has increased significantly. You will help us meet this rising demand. We undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. That means our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale by filling out the College's National Survey on the U.S. Judicial Branch** --the link is below. Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to help us preserve liberty for future generations through education. Thank you for your time and attention--and for joining us in the defense of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | .

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Murkowski’s Betrayal. Sullivan’s Silence. We Can Still Stop This—But Not Without You
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Peter -
Tonight, I’m joining Alaska Democrats for an emergency town hall to do one thing: Hold Republicans accountable.
Why Alaska? Republicans just pushed through a cruel budget that rips health care from millions, hikes energy prices, and slashes food assistance. All to fund billionaire tax breaks. And Sen. Lisa Murkowski made it possible.
She was the final hold out. She knew the damage this bill would cause and publicly admitted that this bill would ruin families across the country. But she caved and allowed her Republican colleagues to bribe her with a Kodiak Kickback — special tax breaks and cash for Alaska.
Not long after she cast the deciding vote, she had the gall to tell reporters that she hoped it would not pass the House because the bill needed more work. Too late.
She had the power to protect millions of people from losing access to health care and force Republicans back to the drawing board, and she willingly gave it up.
Her Fairbanks flip flop was an absolute betrayal, and her constituents know it.
And let’s be clear: she was not alone. With a 50-50 vote, Dan Sullivan, Alaska’s other senator, also had the power to stop this bill with his vote. And now that the bill is back in the House, Rep. Nick Begich still refuses to meet with the people who elected him to Congress.
We’ve got two jobs right now. First, the bill is struggling to pass the House. So we’ve got a narrow window here to try to kill this bill and protect millions of working families. But no matter what, nearly every Republican in Congress at some point has voted to push this bill toward Trump’s desk. They’ve supported drastic cuts to Medicaid and SNAP to fund tax cuts for corporations and billionaires that are doing just fine summering on their yachts.
We’re going to hold every single Republican without a backbone accountable. That requires a sustained grassroots mobilization — like I’m doing with tonight’s event with Alaska Democrats. Fighting back against the scale of corruption happening before us requires significant resources.
[**So please, if you’re with me in this fight, I hope you will consider making a contribution to support my work. Anything you can spare will make a difference.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july25.UmJNyp&refcode=em250702-2-160&t=1&akid=3911%2E734936%2EkBucQI)
[DONATE](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july25.UmJNyp&refcode=em250702-2-160&t=2&akid=3911%2E734936%2EkBucQI)
Thank you in advance for your support. It would mean a lot to me to know you have my back before tonight’s rally.
Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
